name: Local Democracy Project
subject: The chaos we're living through right now is ridiculous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
The chaos we're living through right now is ridiculous.
❌ No, we shouldn’t send U.S. troops to ethnically cleanse and conquer Gaza. ❌ No, we shouldn’t abolish the Department of Education. ❌ No, we shouldn’t let the Oligarch-in-Chief (looking at you, Musk) dismantle USAID and block us from filing taxes online. ❌ No, we shouldn’t have ICE tearing families apart. ❌ No, we shouldn’t be bullying other countries with tariffs or land grabs like this is ancient Rome. ❌ No, we shouldn’t be telling trans people they can’t use their pronouns.
**There are a million things we should be doing—none of them involve this clown car of chaos.**
So what do we do instead?
We stay focused. We keep our energy targeted. We don’t waste the next four years reacting to every single banana thrown by the monkeys in charge.
**🔹 1. Use the courts**. Block every harmful policy. Support the ACLU. Push for state budgets that fund legal challenges. Block, block, block. **🔹 2. Build power locally.** Run for school board, city council, or water board. Get friends involved. Organize. Protect your community where it matters most. **🔹 3. Donate where it counts.** Support local races and orgs like the Local Democracy Project and the ACLU—groups fighting legal battles and building real power.
Stay sharp. Stay focused. Stay in the fight.
\- Local Democracy Project

name: Bryan
subject: February 17 Campaign Update
body:
Take my ONE question survey! President Trump has directed Elon Musk . . .

| | | | |
---
| | | | | **February 17, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# Take My 1-Minute Survey!
---
| President Trump has directed Elon Musk to reign in government spending and reduce the deficit. _**Which area of waste reduction is most important to you?**_ _**Take my 1-minute survey below!**_
---
| [START SURVEY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=4ed4c38182&e=e907534017)
---
|
# Vote Tomorrow!
---
| The Superintendent of Public Schools Primary Election is taking place tomorrow along with several local races and referendums across the district.
_Not sure who to vote for?_ Check your local [County Republican Party website](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=34372791d1&e=e907534017) for more information.
---
| [FIND YOUR COUNTY PARTY](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=937f0fd287&e=e907534017)

---
|
# ICYMI: Voter ID Under Attack in WI
---
| George Soros and other out-of-state billionaires are funding Judge Crawford’s campaign for Wisconsin Supreme Court and if elected, she will overturn Voter ID.
---
| _**We must ensure that Judge Brad Schimel is elected in April!**_
---
| [READ MORE HERE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=34c1d1359c&e=e907534017)

[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=8a5fbf9617&e=e907534017)
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil

| | **_Meet Kat_** Kat Cammack is currently serving her third term representing the FREE state of Florida in the People’s House as FL-03 Congresswoman. And her road from the small cattle ranch she grew up on to the halls of Congress in our nation’s capital has been far from ordinary. A third generation commercial sandblaster, Kat originally aspired to take over her family’s business and continue the rural, rodeo lifestyle she had grown so accustomed to. That was until a failed Obama-era housing policy caused Kat’s family to lose their ranch, leaving her and her mother homeless. They lived in their car and bounced from cheap motel to cheap motel just to keep a roof over their heads. But overcoming these hardships moulded Kat into the gritty and unapologetic leader she is today. After her family’s livelihood was destroyed by big government, she made it her life mission to deliver federal reform in the DC Swamp for the American people. So she packed her belongings and moved to Florida’s 3rd Congressional District – where she would serve as a Deputy Chief of Staff for nearly a decade before running for Congress herself. After emerging victorious in a brutal, 10-way GOP primary contest, the people of FL-03 elected Kat to serve them in the People’s House in November of 2020. Throughout her journey from homelessness to the House of Representatives, Kat Cammack has shown unwavering and unapologetic grit in her fight for the American people. And she has no plans of backing down until we truly have a government for the people, by the people once again here in the United States. When she’s not going toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp, Kat enjoys spending time with her loving husband Matt – who serves as a firefighter and SWAT Medic with the Gainesville Fire Rescue. In the little spare time that they have, you can find Kat and Matt fishing, skeet shooting, or watching Gators football. They are incredibly proud to call north central Florida’s “Gator Nation” home. Go Gators, and let’s keep Florida the most FREE state in the union!

clean_body: DJT & Elon need your input... | | | | | | Peter, They say the flack is heaviest when you’re right over the target . So the fake outrage being orchestrated by the Democrat establishment over should come as no surprise to the American people. After all, why would the career politicians who have blindly sent America’s tax dollars overseas for decades want their corruption exposed to the public? The entrenched bureaucrats who have facilitated TAX **SCAMS against the American people are only lashing out now because they’re afraid of what President Trump, Elon Musk, and D.O.G.E. will uncover. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | President Trump’s new Department of Government Efficiency has saved American citizens over already. But DJT, Elon, and every MAGA Republican working in 47’s administration know that we need to continue if we’re going to succeed in reforming the Fed. Peter, YOU have been selected to take Team Cammack’s and rate the Department of Government Efficiency’s job performance thus far. | | | | | Thank you for joining the fight to EXPOSE wasteful spending and rampant corruption in our nation’s capital. Sincerely, Team Cammack | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Meet Kat Kat Cammack is currently serving her third term representing the FREE state of Florida in the People’s House as FL-03 Congresswoman. And her road from the small cattle ranch she grew up on to the halls of Congress in our nation’s capital has been far from ordinary. A third generation commercial sandblaster, Kat originally aspired to take over her family’s business and continue the rural, rodeo lifestyle she had grown so accustomed to. That was until a failed Obama-era housing policy caused Kat’s family to lose their ranch, leaving her and her mother homeless. They lived in their car and bounced from cheap motel to cheap motel just to keep a roof over their heads. But overcoming these hardships moulded Kat into the gritty and unapologetic leader she is today. After her family’s livelihood was destroyed by big government, she made it her life mission to deliver federal reform in the DC Swamp for the American people. So she packed her belongings and moved to Florida’s 3rd Congressional District – where she would serve as a Deputy Chief of Staff for nearly a decade before running for Congress herself. After emerging victorious in a brutal, 10-way GOP primary contest, the people of FL-03 elected Kat to serve them in the People’s House in November of 2020. Throughout her journey from homelessness to the House of Representatives, Kat Cammack has shown unwavering and unapologetic grit in her fight for the American people. And she has no plans of backing down until we truly have a government for the people, by the people once again here in the United States. When she’s not going toe-to-toe with the Washington Swamp, Kat enjoys spending time with her loving husband Matt – who serves as a firefighter and SWAT Medic with the Gainesville Fire Rescue. In the little spare time that they have, you can find Kat and Matt fishing, skeet shooting, or watching Gators football. They are incredibly proud to call north central Florida’s “Gator Nation” home. Go Gators, and let’s keep Florida the most FREE state in the union! | | | | A Message From Congresswoman Kat, to You Peter, the opportunity to fight for YOU in the Washington Swamp has been the greatest honor of my life. If we’re going to guarantee a free and prosperous country for future generations of Americans, we need to shake up the status quo in our nation’s capital by cutting reckless government spending, securing our borders, and putting America FIRST in all facets of government operation once again. Can I count on you to chip in just $5 today so we can usher in a NEW era of leadership in our nation’s capital this year? | | | | | | | | | | Peter, my gratitude for your financial contributions can’t be put into words. But donating is just one of many ways you can get involved in the good fight for America’s future. Sign up to become an OFFICIAL VOLUNTEER and join Team Cammack today! | | | | | GRAB YOUR GEAR: We have great discounts running all year long. Click the link below to shop for official Team Cammack MERCH! | | | | | | | MAILING ADDRESS** KAT FOR CONGRESS 5200 NW 43RD STREET, SUITE 102-180 GAINESVILLE, FL 32606 | | | PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS | | | | CLICK HERE TO UNSUBSCRIBE |

This is what we're still up against: States have continued to execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here . It's scary and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go.
We've got to stop them wherever and however we can. RUSH $25 or more right now to fight back and defend our voting rights >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=021725_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021725_2&amount=25]
Team, we're not kidding: Ten states enacted new voting restrictions in 2024 .
Brennan Center map of 10 states that made it harder to vote in 2024 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=021725_2&amount=25]
In fact, according to the nonpartisan Brennan Center For Justice, " states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ".
From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference, states from Arizona to Georgia to North Carolina did their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Opponents of voting rights have spent the last two decades attacking voting rights and 2025 looks to be no different.
Unlike the vote suppressors driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count . That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now.
Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. Push back in 2025 by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=021725_2&amount=25]

It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: What I did last week to fight back against Trump and the GOP:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Folks, we’re about a month into the second Trump term, and so far, it’s a chaotic, lawless mess.
Already a convicted felon, Trump continues to act like he’s above the law. He’s directly violating the U.S. Constitution. He’s empowering an unelected billionaire to access Americans’ sensitive data and shut down critical programs. And he’s sowing discrimination, hate, and lies at every turn.
So what are Democrats doing about all this?
I’m glad you asked. It’s true that we’re in the minority in both the House and Senate, and frankly, there aren’t as many options as I would like for Members of Congress to push back. But that doesn’t mean we’re standing by and doing nothing – so let me tell you what I’ve been up to this past week:
* I introduced a bill to protect USAID, called the Protect U.S. National Security Act . It would prevent government funds from being used to eliminate USAID and affirms that only an act of Congress can shut down the agency. You can read more about my legislation here. [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/democratic-lawmakers-introduce-bill-aimed-halting-elimination-usaid-2025-02-11/]
* I highlighted the dangers of eliminating USAID in our House Foreign Affairs Committee hearing, making sure it’s in the Congressional record that shutting down this agency would put Americans at risk and actually increase the potential for fraud, waste, and abuse. You can watch my remarks here. [https://youtu.be/gslmLgDI_UQ?si=XE7ukqETQVE_Ryz_]
* I sent a letter to Secretary Pete Hegseth, signed by all of the Democratic women on the House Armed Services Committee, demanding answers on why military sexual assault trainings have been paused – with no explanation or timeline for resuming. You can read more about that letter here. [https://www.military.com/daily-news/2025/02/11/not-only-irresponsible-also-dangerous-democrats-demand-answers-paused-military-sexual-assault.html?amp]
* I led the charge with more than 40 of my colleagues in pushing to reverse Trump’s transgender military ban, which is not only discriminatory but detrimental to our military readiness and recruitment efforts. You can read more about that letter here. [https://www.advocate.com/politics/sara-jacobs-trans-military-ban]
* I delivered a speech on the House floor condemning my colleagues for simultaneously preaching about Congress’s importance while allowing unelected billionaire Elon Musk to hijack our constitutionally dictated power of the purse.
During this work within Congress, Democrats continue to partner with outside organizations to support legal action against the Trump Administration – and we’re seeing real successes from our efforts.
Already, the Administration has been ordered to pause their unconstitutional funding freeze, the slashing of scientific research funded through the National Institutes of Health, and the sidelining of thousands of USAID staff. And judicial action is being taken on everything from Trump’s executive order eliminating birthright citizenship to Elon Musks’ entire DOGE operation.
I know things feel overwhelming right now – and I understand the immense frustration so many are feeling about the Trump Administration’s onslaught of orders and the seemingly minimal power Democrats have to stop any of them.
But I can promise you two things:
1. I am doing every single thing in my power to fight back. I am not sitting idly by watching all of this without exploring every legislative tool possible to stop it.
2. We are gearing up for a fight in 2026 to take back the House so we can mount a true opposition to this extreme Administration.
I’ll continue to update you on this work, and I’m so grateful for your support. Democrats need to stick together now more than ever before – so thank you.
Sincerely,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Stand Against Musk With Me!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
I'm Gay Valimont, and I'm running to represent Florida's 1st Congressional District. It is no secret Musk is Trump’s new best friend, but thanks to Musk’s meddling has recently highlighted how important it is to maintain transparency and accountability. Elon Musk, once celebrated for his innovations in technology and space exploration, is now facing potential expulsion from the prestigious Royal Society. **Now is the time to double down, and put our government back on track to democracy, before special elections arrive.**
---
---
This 365-year-old scientific institution is deliberating this unprecedented action due to Musk's recent political behavior, which many believe undermines the very principles of scientific inquiry and objectivity. Over 2,700 scientists have signed an open letter calling for his removal, expressing deep concern over his actions and their impact on the scientific community. **This situation serves as a stark reminder that leadership is not solely about innovation but also about upholding ethical standards and fostering trust.** When influential figures prioritize personal or political agendas over empirical evidence and the collective good, it erodes public confidence in both science and governance.
---
**[Our community deserves representation that values truth, transparency, and the unwavering pursuit of knowledge for the betterment of all. Can I count on you to rush $8 now to make sure our government makes a change???](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102303416/528773562/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmU2OGI1YTAtOWNlZC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PUwQPqlQFxuydCm_1_T6gxYisSzHAOkjHXZ1yL2VLmE=)**

clean_body: | | | I'm Gay Valimont, and I'm running to represent Florida's 1st Congressional District. It is no secret Musk is Trump’s new best friend, but thanks to Musk’s meddling has recently highlighted how important it is to maintain transparency and accountability. Elon Musk, once celebrated for his innovations in technology and space exploration, is now facing potential expulsion from the prestigious Royal Society. Now is the time to double down, and put our government back on track to democracy, before special elections arrive. This 365-year-old scientific institution is deliberating this unprecedented action due to Musk's recent political behavior, which many believe undermines the very principles of scientific inquiry and objectivity. Over 2,700 scientists have signed an open letter calling for his removal, expressing deep concern over his actions and their impact on the scientific community. This situation serves as a stark reminder that leadership is not solely about innovation but also about upholding ethical standards and fostering trust. When influential figures prioritize personal or political agendas over empirical evidence and the collective good, it erodes public confidence in both science and governance. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Together, we can advocate for a future where innovation and ethics go hand in hand, restoring faith in our institutions and leaders. Thank you for your continued support. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What the media hides about birthright citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z076uan770oglaf0heoo3hn9t43ujijd1o9r8vb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob2c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkf1msbhjhgesa8c72agfpctvjekvslnnjin1ieo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob2c9h2bs)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: [1] New Message
subject: Democrats go BALLISTIC over government efficiency efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’re in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we’re doing:

| |
---
| | | Here's some food for thought:

_Why are the Democrats going COMPLETELY BALLISTIC over Elon Musk, President Trump, Congressional Republicans, and DOGE trying to make our government more efficient and cut costs???_

We're in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we're doing:
- The Hill fired off this headline: "A tidal wave of resistance is coming for Elon Musk"
- Ranking Member Jaime Raskin raised the idea of IMPEACHING Elon Musk
- Liberals are holding anti-Musk protests in front of government buildings
- Fake News outlets are trashing every plan we come up with
- The Democrat Legal Machine is bogging us down in dozens of court battles
**It 's a disgrace. All of it. Unfortunately, the Democrats are blasting out email after email to gin up their megadonor base whenever we defund one of their Liberal pet projects. **

That's why it's time for us to go on offense!

**_[I set a goal of raising an unprecedented one million dollars- in the next 72 hours - to make sure we have the power and resources needed to block every Democrat effort to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8iuidmdu762jjk1i7mcm214qh2esmlilspit3r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob4clh2bs "I set a goal of raising an unprecedented one million dollars – in the next 72 hours – to make sure we have the power and resources needed to block every Democrat effort to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump. ")_**

Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Democrats once and for all?
| | [ADD TEN BUCKS](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpv1rosr7em6ri33c3ojn6k5fesi2ugt4fv2gml0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob4clh2bs "ADD TEN BUCKS")
---

---
| [ADD MORE HERE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1a2mg0kegugeslkg0l6fn316frfvo0i5f6um9p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob4clh2bs "ADD MORE HERE")
---

It makes my skin crawl seeing how much of our tax dollars were wasted on behalf of fringe Democrat priorities...

❌ 59 million dollars to house illegals in luxury hotel rooms
❌ 45 million dollars for DEI scholarships in Burma
❌ 20 million dollars for a Sesame Street show in Iraq
❌ 2 million dollars for sex changes in Guatemala
❌ 1.5 million dollars for DEI programs in Serbia

The Democrat Machine enriched themselves and their friends - for years - on our dime. If that doesn't anger you to your core, I don't know what will.

Luckily, that's ending RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW.

Our House Majority is working around the clock with President Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE to investigate, audit, and eliminate waste everywhere we possibly can. **But the Democrats are desperate to stop us from seeing this through to the very end. **

So let me reiterate:

**_[I'm hoping to raise a million dollars in the next few days to make sure we can prevent every Liberal push to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm286h4cc0f92957nvtu4lco76hvtdbqartqt0vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob4clh2bs "I’m hoping to raise a million dollars in the next few days to make sure we can prevent every Liberal push to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump. ")_**

Please don't underestimate the importance of our fight OR the impact you can make by contributing right now.

Thanks for all you do,
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fqnfgp915i3uh24rqiia51rv43fdm3pcs1srag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3jm6ob4clh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn: Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate. And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this Imprimis issue with them. You can receive your FREE copy of " Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link: Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: [1] New Message
subject: Democrats go BALLISTIC over government efficiency efforts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’re in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we’re doing:

| |
---
| | | Here's some food for thought:

_Why are the Democrats going COMPLETELY BALLISTIC over Elon Musk, President Trump, Congressional Republicans, and DOGE trying to make our government more efficient and cut costs???_

We're in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we're doing:
- The Hill fired off this headline: "A tidal wave of resistance is coming for Elon Musk"
- Ranking Member Jaime Raskin raised the idea of IMPEACHING Elon Musk
- Liberals are holding anti-Musk protests in front of government buildings
- Fake News outlets are trashing every plan we come up with
- The Democrat Legal Machine is bogging us down in dozens of court battles
**It 's a disgrace. All of it. Unfortunately, the Democrats are blasting out email after email to gin up their megadonor base whenever we defund one of their Liberal pet projects. **

That's why it's time for us to go on offense!

**_[I set a goal of raising an unprecedented one million dollars- in the next 72 hours - to make sure we have the power and resources needed to block every Democrat effort to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsl7lpgseiaie10uv0meseas5hofe1n3don5clio_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ge0o34cjh2bs "I set a goal of raising an unprecedented one million dollars – in the next 72 hours – to make sure we have the power and resources needed to block every Democrat effort to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump. ")_**

Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Democrats once and for all?

---

It makes my skin crawl seeing how much of our tax dollars were wasted on behalf of fringe Democrat priorities...

❌ 59 million dollars to house illegals in luxury hotel rooms
❌ 45 million dollars for DEI scholarships in Burma
❌ 20 million dollars for a Sesame Street show in Iraq
❌ 2 million dollars for sex changes in Guatemala
❌ 1.5 million dollars for DEI programs in Serbia

The Democrat Machine enriched themselves and their friends - for years - on our dime. If that doesn't anger you to your core, I don't know what will.

Luckily, that's ending RIGHT HERE AND RIGHT NOW.

Our House Majority is working around the clock with President Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE to investigate, audit, and eliminate waste everywhere we possibly can. **But the Democrats are desperate to stop us from seeing this through to the very end. **

So let me reiterate:

**_[I'm hoping to raise a million dollars in the next few days to make sure we can prevent every Liberal push to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2ncvipkcokrpsfut9t2ptgknmj0t1bs7kn5hdp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ge0o34cjh2bs "I’m hoping to raise a million dollars in the next few days to make sure we can prevent every Liberal push to sabotage DOGE, take back the House, and undermine President Trump. ")_**

Please don't underestimate the importance of our fight OR the impact you can make by contributing right now.

Thanks for all you do,
_- Steve_

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Urgent CTA: Help Defund & Dismantle USAID Today
body:
Your voice can shut down wasteful, unaccountable spending!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** I hope you enjoyed President's Day--I certainly did, given who's in the White House right now! Today, we're calling on you to help end the corruption the DOGE team continues to expose. While DOGE is uncovering outrageous and unaccountable spending in many agencies, **this call to action focuses on defunding and dismantling USAID**. We've never had an opportunity like this, where we have **concrete, undeniable proof** of the widespread corruption and abuse of your tax dollars. We must take action before this moment slips away.
**ACTION: Tell your representative and both senators you want them to defund and dismantle USAID now.** We have **two** action pages--both important but targeting different audiences.****
* [**Align Act Action Page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ba4f5d/1edb9794a9b74172 "Align Act Action Page")
* [**Patriot Project Action Page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ba4f5d/1edb9794a9b74174 "Patriot Project Action Page")
Filling out each one only takes a minute--please be sure to complete both, and while you're at it, make sure to use the phone call option through our action pages. **Calls make the most impact.** Finally, give Joe Rogan's interview with Mike Benz a listen. He shines a spotlight on just how corrupt and un-American USAID really is. After hearing the full story, you'll see exactly why it really needs to be defunded and dismantled. Here it is on [**Spotify**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ba4f5d/1edb9794a9b74176) and here it is on [**YouTube****.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ba4f5d/1edb9794a9b74178)
**ACTION: [Share our pre-written post on social media.](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9ba4f5d/1edb9794a9b7417a "Share our pre-written post on social media.")** If you're active online, here's a tweet to put a spotlight on two Republican congressmen--@TomColeOK04 and @MarioDB--who chair the committee and subcommittee, respectively, that decides on funding for USAID. **They aren 't feeling enough pressure. Let's change that!****
****Sample X Post**
_Americans won 't stand for D.C. bureaucrats siphoning our hard-earned money. @TomColeOK04 @MarioDB, you have the power & it's your duty to protect our tax dollars. Defund and dismantle USAID NOW!_
This call to action is the **first** in a two-part series this week. Later this week, we'll share steps you can take to ensure President Trump's nominees get confirmed. Let's keep the pressure on our elected officials to do what's right for the American people--and not cave to the deep state or a bloated bureaucracy scrambling to keep secrets hidden.
Thank you for taking action. **Together, we can achieve the goals we 've been working toward for almost sixteen years!****
** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__** **** ************
---
| **** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************

clean_body: Your voice can shut down wasteful, unaccountable spending! | | | | | | Patriot- | ** I hope you enjoyed President's Day--I certainly did, given who's in the White House right now! Today, we're calling on you to help end the corruption the DOGE team continues to expose. While DOGE is uncovering outrageous and unaccountable spending in many agencies, this call to action focuses on defunding and dismantling USAID. We've never had an opportunity like this, where we have concrete, undeniable proof of the widespread corruption and abuse of your tax dollars. We must take action before this moment slips away. ACTION: Tell your representative and both senators you want them to defund and dismantle USAID now. We have two action pages--both important but targeting different audiences. "Align Act Action Page" "Patriot Project Action Page" Filling out each one only takes a minute--please be sure to complete both, and while you're at it, make sure to use the phone call option through our action pages. Calls make the most impact. Finally, give Joe Rogan's interview with Mike Benz a listen. He shines a spotlight on just how corrupt and un-American USAID really is. After hearing the full story, you'll see exactly why it really needs to be defunded and dismantled. Here it is on and here it is on ACTION: "Share our pre-written post on social media." If you're active online, here's a tweet to put a spotlight on two Republican congressmen--@TomColeOK04 and @MarioDB--who chair the committee and subcommittee, respectively, that decides on funding for USAID. They aren 't feeling enough pressure. Let's change that!** Sample X Post Americans won 't stand for D.C. bureaucrats siphoning our hard-earned money. @TomColeOK04 @MarioDB, you have the power & it's your duty to protect our tax dollars. Defund and dismantle USAID NOW! This call to action is the first in a two-part series this week. Later this week, we'll share steps you can take to ensure President Trump's nominees get confirmed. Let's keep the pressure on our elected officials to do what's right for the American people--and not cave to the deep state or a bloated bureaucracy scrambling to keep secrets hidden. Thank you for taking action. Together, we can achieve the goals we 've been working toward for almost sixteen years! name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: Join me at CPAC on Thursday
body:
Let me know if you’ll join me at CPAC to make history together
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YGl2sZ0MEspi9T8OwlsgsSlOh86j7DjXM7kioKtFAvHg8so9oz0fD2MnBp_m9t1K7AEfRaRtF75peC7L8SUzM8ao5eDi-nXcA9hBub4TiGOiejr2D2miHF1ABXOjCizpaKGzzCA9_sOQhfMwdUiPY3k9arzUiHbWtQ==&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==)
---
| Good morning Friends,
---
| When I think back to my early days in politics, attending CPAC was one of the most exciting experiences I looked forward to every year. The energy is unmatched--especially for interns, new Hill staffers, and grassroots fighters.
For many, it's their first chance to see, in person, the people they've only watched on TV or online.
There's nothing like it.
And then there's the WORLD-CHANGING history that has taken place on their stage. Think about Trump's first CPAC speech in 2011, Rush Limbaugh's in 2009 (goodness, the years are flying by)--and even before my time, Ronald Reagan himself.
LEGENDARY moments happen at CPAC, and we're lucky to witness history in action.
Just a few days from now, I'll have the honor of taking that stage. When I think about all that's happened over the years, it is truly humbling to be a part of this important weekend and continue to be a voice for families all across America.
Not only that, but this year we'll be joined by our friends and allies like Steve Bannon, Robby Starbuck, Senator Jim Banks, National Security Advisor Mike Waltz, Governor Sanders, United States Secretary of the Interior Doug Burgum, and Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt.
---
| CPAC is near and dear to my heart, and [it's something Katie and I are very passionate about](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YNNituMuaM_Box-XwHXNsBaOjYQzgCv9OyRVswshYJTRR8_WC7M7gWmcv09o_x3C8Nsi6QPKxkSlbekRbsbsfSip2PXhSfLhFRgVvW_95dLMrS6fJeJsbmYmRw5NzSUDBkK8rVoyA9A5ckREh5OOted_ouAEUMFr8vYbs5NNRqzEgS9qM_r6vC7Erxi3f-plrQ==&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==), and I hope some of you will join us.
I'll be speaking at 1:20 pm on the main stage on Thursday.
Reply to this email and let me know if you'll join me at CPAC to make history together!
Hope to see you there,
---
| |
---
| Terry Schilling President American Principles Project
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YMVu9llUCkbsdpwVUUURIfI7ZWgR1JOTEZm_ixODUd4gEWOaXYE1JatmSRZUD2Ih2UbCiHcPh7PZ7jX2QDXsnu3QSd-IsSJUQhSpuZToORGM&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==)
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YNX-CNo7UZpeaqxNGN99YxAPCbLWrl5qIZ---trcgk8P3gH-Ae9PztStCjsNmrVQHqXkp31zfHvM22fhiwsBFpqlRta8przthUZ6RqqxpUJB0DJavKsyuldWCoiOIg0ESzkVoRg1gu1JC5pVxPtWzG-4hg14pvQyDw==&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==) [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YNX-CNo7UZpeFZieCsCGG-477bWQmyAIlo3T_8aHJehhsyAbG_3djG9P4RokaQxMfJRl9Lm9zoPgKWzsRJ_fG1tc8-BrDs26EUvHs84pVZIReI24juQ89PMZFmGT6I7DmmJfLeGHE8pL&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==) [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YGGQq7fROWbv16W3ktO03X1AocBwE6wSxPxrKIF7cEMQgjM_HXFX5NbqevCeG33ajUAii4t65cqMGcHU32lPDgcCZhnJ1v9eC2EPlUNx8J6SqrmEHKi4_kf-YHvVLxqjRKTKVJwq6Ge4&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==) [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HmiwgKvLhwKAu55zs8YKlHlW9aK-7YqQberrHaRMqTo8IbZ_pqV9YE6Vnd9gFia-Om9_NOZgkjn3_nHMVsYMJxS_6PIXNyHnu2BjBqj6Uu38kTY36NxuBzs45yGTH0e5xwzT6VqhrSqMJXBpqahUuf349Iwk3YXli04rNCYHiow=&c=m-OaqtEqoWTGGMxJ1ezsELzJghruDlIlHWHAoRgJv7Ru0dQcILQGEg==&ch=4M3ZLuo0_6hghTW1i2iHsq3-mGOp-WCcrLyaotMHDOWgsfluVby1MQ==)

name: Blackburn, Marsha
subject: I’m missing YOUR NAME on my petition to demand voter ID laws!

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What the media hides about birthright citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/GUJj3huq8YeeR8M540z14LnAyqFBj0O1hpIzy_mFuIhyiGCJ18h_QjGIm-tHt2nb7HZwnAD9I4YAn6P_rUHTNLq42LxP_Bl_3EiLCul0E6LzhdhRvQq7mxlCMtjuqnsYfFoO-tfGnA-41o8Uz-T2abHFNIJKc5rZA_2oAXVpdTlGAJniiez7bz97bI0DJMJduBlBIOhQoS-wscQGUzli7pfE_MgPH21xbh2G9lj-IxruZYdAJ3_cRp3mmlYo95feIQFmRMBATISNGcPTx0sAeULRlUiKLq-XvLCP1_L4Fb9-522Fzvxq_8sJx32nFHLKBqesVtewQna2JTEHuYAWd2iKEp5ELEoA_nrdM-yo6FjF8F9waVGjZ3zRmgidXCsKahg5PD5-vb0pXqTZnGgC9dTdzs_Y6EQGyCeFip6EeaxqM3uM9SqkGgBD4SBJ450SEfLgQLjIBtvSYHv1T0hi0-c_LeWHpS4f/EO3-qtL3dra9k--P7pm6SESkqlXNrb2D/6)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/qp0tOr1FhWSOnt72vXzqxualsaRKNLAP42wW-_Nbp4mkrXyXDxj6Og8L8KIPv2GdYJ55ykgDmR1_Ckwp1r1Qc63z92VaIORZdafbAn4jHPH4iEl-bZipfebMnfgPuIPfYYBBwA3jAMFFHu5CCeuYXsdbObMNaaBG3bFgvsR40-Mj5sThhP21TFbeGEyBwNaEzF35-VWh9RKKqAN5FMi0Zvue4-YHfeJrasW-AFMgh6GiHW4R_VlwUDIt1CwpyHPBFV_l0XvMw1hsgcvmaDBgum0VXL0tfdsL-zQSQnTNJXIh7RWT4OPIVcj1Na98J8vdG9y5N_IQFz0P7LpJAzM2PAu-OHeS3dfnI97aNMrs5nZXsFZXnzlKhyC6tc8qLQArl1JdTnKXo3boYp3gMWsguKKHkb2TRnE7DqvmGbDmRd70Svcofd_Fut3xUIWib_7buAot0Y5PJ-iTZN9C5q15K5Hhnqc2fWyq/SdsRMnsz2Nvfd7ZlJvXKJmGpeMPPgQui/6)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Greg Stamps
subject: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z517jeospl4gnpf37s4vkipsf9vlqori41npi8fo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z625494usf8d73ft52nc0k1antaoaerqv4o7oer8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ie2ob3cph2bs)_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp71us90dm2f5hhdcailsqhdqpgesiqnvevioas0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ie2ob3cph2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdski2up8fshdto1ltp5qh9lue6uefau4l4tgdv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ie2ob3cph2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpho44b8keenlt9k1rpkud44h0q5q3jl895q7iqo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ie2ob3cph2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

---

| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/k0tGESPz4YtXyYpxppe3JA~~/AARclBA~/SWFRySGr9uKPWCDxecuZpfTLhQWBJRim7_LNumgjyFo0CVEGjLL0rcmjYTi04wzphoQcOHODYSS1bUTzTURaUhUbWP5-9p8Gwt7B7JSQ5NkjGcbeESn6PVMLgcWw9aTAfZ8wdc-vRtvt8hCST8eixJoCzZaNuRcu1ajFcZgS8Q1EnwKl34MUMah79zeEaTADmwBU8QiT7HHQ1WCCIRhjev4wewLAAeyzgGHlhMDklnSwBFu4KqWru-NTqQKLYgAlvIS5zUUXvm7SeStIdKaoajP8Xfqy9ZrU90B5kxbXXWEm4jF2soDjdN78vkMHy73znHA_aP7s-aV89gbXlwUvwg~~)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Greg Stamps
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi9trak6se2qbhmtle1ecugdsv25gkskguvthhdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ieao30clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their heroes. For those people--and you may be among them--I'm thrilled to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you, absolutely free: _[**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze6adje3rs3knmocepvtkev9c29ninudcjvqtgao_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ieao30clh2bs)_
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z49hrq77dlo20kqdf3h9jtdng0u6qq2fib276ooo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ieao30clh2bs)
---
| | "Tax cuts for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the federal government? Hoover Institution Senior Fellow **Thomas Sowell takes an empirical approach** in his commentary, [**_"_****_Trickle Down " Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich._****_"_**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0bensq8bv7judm33irjb4bj4nude59ihfe8c0f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ieao30clh2bs) Sowell separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all actually lead to greater revenue for the government. As a friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of charge.[**Click here to get your free copy of**** _ "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" _****now.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z26snhoehivvpsm5fln9gsib48dnth2dg3vom5qo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s3ieao30clh2bs) Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | _Online Development_ Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

Your America
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Bracing for Cold, IRS Scams, and… Afraid of the Phone?
body:
The National Weather Service issued an [extreme cold warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp8GOiw4YH4Kitu4y223tDAcx6yIiQyJlbdfefvtPumTZqT5us23kEve7__DA31f6wwcRsaBCTunkMtnVjT5FRFQUvTCSGeNlcLSzStnxmWJS5SOo46ca621WE0KMHIHimZ_0TgIK4QUoxmiU06A0RFsUkZJojim3OsxfNe89w3X8qlvPIZYH7T4rfdnI_IfgYnAdJ7nEJe249mun8B0TQLTknvHg8VaEou49yMU9mosYUjlw9ZSa8r7nbX66huBiR4-Pc9cSm7aEMXvj5DLr7H_VeDt4ScAAP__5Q1dsA) for 11 states, from the Canadian border to Oklahoma and central Texas, with wind chills expected to bring life-threatening sub-zero temperatures.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-r4zAQxD_NurPR7sqSUqg4MO6SKnClkfUn1qHExtblyLc__Hjta3YZZhh-zO_rdHW55Nfj5p7R1rROJKhvBbVopuBy-UyyCTbFSJGbaFHzxWjDaJrFkvfK9IalcjFEaeY0G68iokk6zVI02Z5tgtAgMva68xd5QdLKkwlSSwYpYsh13bs_a37VJabyWd9x7_z6bIpdat0O4F9AI9CY5u7lan7HzdXlTACNezhPty0b8HjkADwgoQFS298ZeCApes1AyuOpvmna-3hLeT9qS1KI0yXg4fwMPNzHW7PbsP3LpeRDaZDi8XS5fEHVn0Z6W_ofAAD__wH5YVI) | |
# Tuesday, February 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1930, Clyde Tombaugh, an astronomer at the Lowell Observatory in Flagstaff, Arizona, [discovered Pluto](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhSAUxvGngQ3DOaDAwNDF7XbtaFTwehoUo_Qa376x6Xrnf_L78n09ukdPidbnZ79EX6bcocRaSBRgu9BTujrNg59ixKh49GCUs8YqsHz2k4QBYDLjgDUO0MRgG2uwcdIE5-LAyd-aRLAACmpTjU47QNOMaIM2WjEtY6CS9-o701rmOKUrv-JejXnhyc-lbAdTHwxbhu15ntVMR8n7dXeGbZnpEKG_BK3ivzBst_RTsgh0jDcVA9992E5KiY7GMC2fS0_pb6G8e_zy-BsAAP__WhpYmQ). For decades afterward, Pluto was considered the ninth planet of our solar system. _Telephobia_ is a recent phenomenon among young people. According to a story in today's edition, schools in the UK are now offering courses on how to use the telephone for a generation that has grown up with text-based communication and experiences significant anxiety at the prospect of making phone calls. [Read all about it below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMdsh--zEZvDQhS1dO6KLOcCtwZFxg9Knr-je-ZN--vT_uA03iilu8zut7OuUB5R4AYmg3DBSTK_BNKOfmJF1w15Z3TnrtHLN4l0IciRmIztDSFaGuzZ8sZ1yHCZjm-hPTaJySml1sW3oTKfQXgO60VijhZE8xppL-5njVhee0is_ubQhr03yS62PXeg3gb3A_jiONmz3cI4C-5MW2EsU2CsrsJ95gx-gwlDpK24zVE78WPI9EoT8XXbeoWZITGWDujCkvFegUiFPQBAopXapa2qKHx9HTCnuVyuMnFeK6e9R_a_Q0-NvAAAA___YwWdK). We're sponsored today by [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-r4zAQxD_NurPR7sqSUqg4MO6SKnClkfUn1qHExtblyLc__Hjta3YZZhh-zO_rdHW55Nfj5p7R1rROJKhvBbVopuBy-UyyCTbFSJGbaFHzxWjDaJrFkvfK9IalcjFEaeY0G68iokk6zVI02Z5tgtAgMva68xd5QdLKkwlSSwYpYsh13bs_a37VJabyWd9x7_z6bIpdat0O4F9AI9CY5u7lan7HzdXlTACNezhPty0b8HjkADwgoQFS298ZeCApes1AyuOpvmna-3hLeT9qS1KI0yXg4fwMPNzHW7PbsP3LpeRDaZDi8XS5fEHVn0Z6W_ofAAD__wH5YVI). Check out their nutrition advice in today's edition.
|
---
## Extreme Weather to Strike Again
The National Weather Service issued an [extreme cold warning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAUBp8GOiw4YH4Kitu4y223tDAcx6yIiQyJlbdfefvtPumTZqT5us23kEve7__DA31f6wwcRsaBCTunkMtnVjT5FRFQUvTCSGeNlcLSzStnxmWJS5SOo46ca621WE0KMHIHimZ_0TgIK4QUoxmiU06A0RFsUkZJojim3OsxfNe89w3X8qlvPIZYH7T4rfdnI_IfgYnAdJ7nEJe249mun8B0TQLTknvHg8VaEou49yMU9mosYUjlw9ZSa8r7nbX66huBiR4-Pc9cSm7aEMXvj5DLr7H_VeDt4ScAAP__5Q1dsA) for 11 states, from the Canadian border to Oklahoma and central Texas, with wind chills expected to bring life-threatening, sub-zero temperatures. States along the Rockies and Northern Plains were [hit by the polar vortex](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7uO6yAURb8GOkecA-ZRUNwmXW47pUXgEDPCD2EUK38_8vRTbm1pLa2vx_QIpZb19T8s5HveJhQ4DgIHsFMKpX4mxZPPREiSkwcjnTVWguWzBx2sykKPCcIzyhBNdvHpJGRCZ6LmxV80gWABJIzmFp1ygEZHtEkZJZkSlErf2u17K2ufKdfP9qZ2i9vCq5973w8m_zG8M7yHfaXzuK5rtF5iJYb3s6yd2nBS6DO1QQsD4zMSOEOgtSUXEEcrIMTotCHefNrPUms5tGFKvJZQ6q-v_9X_9vgTAAD__8uqWlA) Monday, with ice and snow in Nebraska and Michigan, and temperatures as low as -60°F in North Dakota and -50°F in Montana. The storm is expected to move into the [South and East on Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd0RmIQEXFH_jLn97pYVhHe8dhgi4WHn7kxPpuit3v9FoZj6u09VRpHT77za0bckT9HDmPXBhpuAoPifVBbsgAsoOrdByMNpIYbrVovQGwlnNEv1sQA9aht4YMwNKJQfsyB5uPQgjhBRnffKDGgToiwcTlFaSqR4DtVxOn5lSW3GJz_zAcvJ566JdW7tXJv8xGBmMO7q2vhmDsbZctnq8KTUsDMaE-3H_FrjwN-IvKf-idKstJ77gXL5defKa8s7JI0-5oKsNS1dsuO8UI9WLZqq_bY7iK0z7a5yHhZ8AAAD__y42ZsI) before heading out to the Atlantic on Thursday. Major snowfall is likely in the Ozarks, North Carolina, and Virginia, with possible ice storms in North Carolina. Kentucky is also in the storm's path, with snow expected to reach the Bluegrass State late Tuesday, [hindering recovery efforts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GOiNmPGAoXLwmXV67JXLsIXhj7Mh4g_L3K2-z1XajM0dXV_fjulyNDz7e_5uddVnTgj0OokcB0-KMD--FWqdXZmTZsgYl50lNEqZ206DGlUbHhIZXIprngYBgxBu6gXtuva5pPcIEIGFQnZ1pBlSjxcmRItlQz86XlLvP5GPZeA3v9OLc2bS3QW-lPI9G_mvw0uDlPM8u3mzk86j_StiUjXO9fCycxS94cCxf9vEWmTkcYg0pOR_v4uFDYCcAhImpuuIoKe_i9CGIW67KEdMpbApOZBsNzEiDbLN2z-r4Y1QN9ffd-PDTsvy12kvjdwAAAP__ddBwbA) from recent flooding that killed at least 11 people and left thousands without power.
## Europe Pushes for Role in Ukraine Talks
European leaders gathered [in Paris on Monday for emergency talks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OqzAQxfGnMd0ge_iwKVzchi633RJNzBC8MRjZJihvv8r2Wx_pp6P_1226kQ9-f_ynjW1Z4oQSO5AIykwz-fCe2mq2CzNyU7FVuhmMNo0y1WoVy6VVM3LXd93dSackk9POyH6gXpnK248mURmlGtXp2g3toFD3Ds3c6rYRreTZl5jq7-j3svIS3vHFqXZxq4JdSzmyaP4JHAWO13XVbr-7zyhw_NACR4kCR6UFjnymeDC4QNudU4YSYYlpg_OZyO8MR6AdKMOZIZ05e4KDyTEUCs8MibYDzqNeyxaqZOfj8iH43GvRysdGPvx-Kn81eln8CQAA__9xb2gj) after the U.S. pushed ahead with unilateral Russia-Ukraine peace negotiations in Saudi Arabia, heightening concerns that Europe would be sidelined. [No concrete outcomes emerged](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvRHBgeE8MHTJlq4dLYKP5FpsLIwT5d9X6d7x0yc9Pb2vy3QJnHm9fYaFfEtlAgmDkCAUTnPg_JpMP_tEBKR78srpER1qhf3dawiUzJUSSivN1TqlpQI0yQIQBezZv2kSFCql1eBOcTSjAmcj4Gyc0Z2RNHMr9fRdeG13SvlVHlRPsSx99vfWtr3THx2cOziHbaXn_r7eozaOmTo40yHoqGUjcfzUwCuJNbQidopH5fYS-7Es3ESrx7IJaWVEa1UcxoTJDdfROqVmjThGGoaxr37enpwz79Z1Rt6WwPnPpv1X5-HhNwAA__9dJGUf) from the Paris meeting, but European leaders reiterated that any lasting peace would require their involvement alongside continued U.S. support. The U.K. and Sweden signaled a [willingness to deploy troops to Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAUBb8Gd1hwwQEXFK9xl9duaWG4TthgYwEOyt-vvP12RzrSaDRf9_luQwz747_d0NQ1zcBgoAwo17O3IX5m2XmzIgKKDg1XYtRKC667pxnkAgKEW0ftLLKV85UPSolRerYwu3TBXDQGXHMu-KB6N8qRg7o50F4qKYhk6ENNuf9OYa9PXOMnvTH3Lm1dNM9aj0LEPwITgam11rul7NjK9ROYrklgqvncDprPUoKlzWZ6vrINO9Ld1kTPFy0NPe605pSOQvHM6UBa0J051A-BqcvGHy3EGMpNEckemw3x16H-1eRt4CcAAP__dKZlZA) as part of a future peacekeeping force, while Poland ruled out sending troops but urged greater defense spending. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer stressed that European security was at stake and confirmed his visit to Washington next week to meet President Trump.
## Avoid IRS Scams This Tax Season
Scammers are [impersonating the IRS](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL_G3rDgIAEPDF2ypWtH6woX-1owkUGh-fsq3bs_vaf3cV2uyIn39R0z-XYrC0g4CQlCuSUip-dixuhvREB6JK-snp11Wrlx82ZG82mtMXKOJuBsEc5SRw0WlZMBR_YvmwTllNLqZKcwm1mBPQdw0VijByMpcivH9FV4bxvd0rM86JhCyWPyW2v3Oui3AS4DXHrv0069dqLvFzDAhY8qasAsGv00kalWXElspQt8FI6iZq4b76sAqUGd1Hj4eO-cEtezHYxcM3L6i7X_5h8efgMAAP__3RZbGw) this tax season, offering economic recovery funds in exchange for personal and financial information, according to the Better Business Bureau. Criminals, posing as federal agents [via text messages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAURb8GNix4kAADQxdv6drRIvCcvAqMZaO4-fvK3btd6Urn6HzdplukQsvjM1YMfW4TSLgICUK5KUcq78nwHGZEQM0xKKu9s04rx58B5mvWBu85-kt2SqLWcY4gU_ZeGoycwkmToJxSWl3skLzxCuw1gcvGGs2MxEy9bcN3o6U_cS7v9sJtSK3yEp69rzvTHwxGBuNxHEO67wse-_kzGM_JYKRtF5ja0iolQXWNqYs1visuXXT86QxGvoW8HlQK7VfLjHzUSOXP0v-rfgX4DQAA__8ul1ol), are offering $1,400 checks to taxpayers who missed the Recovery Rebate Credit on their 2021 tax returns, aiming to steal personal information. The fraudulent attempt also uses a link that resembles the IRS website, promising quick payments through either checks or electronic deposits. The BBB also warns people to [be cautious of emails](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGnwZ0tGMaGFBS3octtt7QQDPGscIgCipO3X3n7rY_0Hf1f1_UauPD99j_s5HquK0iYRwmjsmsKXD4rDsllIiA9kFNGX6yxWtlhczouGQmzRbJaz3kOOKe0hIQWI1kzsDs1CcoqpdVspnjBiwKzRLAJDWqBkhL3-py-K9_7Rrl86oueU6z7UNzW-6MJ_U-AF-CP45gOLu9zFOBPWoCXIMArI8CHV-U0thj2NvaN29jDe2wUWr0L8MPTpcfBpXBbjEB52wOX35_-V_fLwU8AAAD__520V6A) with similar claims, stating that the IRS will always contact you by mail first, not by phone or email. When in doubt, the BBB advises contacting the IRS directly.

clean_body: The National Weather Service issued an for 11 states, from the Canadian border to Oklahoma and central Texas, with wind chills expected to bring life-threatening sub-zero temperatures. | | | | | | Tuesday, February 18, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1930, Clyde Tombaugh, an astronomer at the Lowell Observatory in Flagstaff, Arizona, . For decades afterward, Pluto was considered the ninth planet of our solar system. Telephobia is a recent phenomenon among young people. According to a story in today's edition, schools in the UK are now offering courses on how to use the telephone for a generation that has grown up with text-based communication and experiences significant anxiety at the prospect of making phone calls. . We're sponsored today by . Check out their nutrition advice in today's edition. | Extreme Weather to Strike Again The National Weather Service issued an for 11 states, from the Canadian border to Oklahoma and central Texas, with wind chills expected to bring life-threatening, sub-zero temperatures. States along the Rockies and Northern Plains were Monday, with ice and snow in Nebraska and Michigan, and temperatures as low as -60°F in North Dakota and -50°F in Montana. The storm is expected to move into the before heading out to the Atlantic on Thursday. Major snowfall is likely in the Ozarks, North Carolina, and Virginia, with possible ice storms in North Carolina. Kentucky is also in the storm's path, with snow expected to reach the Bluegrass State late Tuesday, from recent flooding that killed at least 11 people and left thousands without power. Europe Pushes for Role in Ukraine Talks European leaders gathered after the U.S. pushed ahead with unilateral Russia-Ukraine peace negotiations in Saudi Arabia, heightening concerns that Europe would be sidelined. from the Paris meeting, but European leaders reiterated that any lasting peace would require their involvement alongside continued U.S. support. The U.K. and Sweden signaled a as part of a future peacekeeping force, while Poland ruled out sending troops but urged greater defense spending. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer stressed that European security was at stake and confirmed his visit to Washington next week to meet President Trump. Avoid IRS Scams This Tax Season Scammers are this tax season, offering economic recovery funds in exchange for personal and financial information, according to the Better Business Bureau. Criminals, posing as federal agents , are offering $1,400 checks to taxpayers who missed the Recovery Rebate Credit on their 2021 tax returns, aiming to steal personal information. The fraudulent attempt also uses a link that resembles the IRS website, promising quick payments through either checks or electronic deposits. The BBB also warns people to with similar claims, stating that the IRS will always contact you by mail first, not by phone or email. When in doubt, the BBB advises contacting the IRS directly. Trout, who is widely considered one of the greatest baseball players of this generation, has only played 266 games in the last four years due to multiple injuries. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Hiring private security
body:
The threats against me and Elon are getting worse by the day

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend,
I’m going to get straight to the point.
**Democrat Representative Robert Garcia went on CNN and issued a chilling call to violence against me and Elon Musk, calling for “ACTUAL WEAPONS” to be used against us.**
This is not new for me. Extremist Democrats have sent me countless death threats and I’ve been “swatted” too many times to count, but there is one big difference.
**_This is the first time a sitting member of Congress has gone on national television to issue a violent threat against me._**
I didn’t know much about Rep. Garcia before he went on national television to incite people to kill me and Elon Musk, but I did some digging and found out quite a bit.
Garcia, who proudly boasts about being the first gay former illegal immigrant elected to Congress, has been obsessed with me for quite some time.
**In just over two years in office,****_Garcia has sent over 60 emails to his supporters attacking me as a threat to democracy, a right wing extremist, and as a voice of hatred, lies, and conspiracies._**
But now his threats are being aired to every liberal zealot watching CNN, with absolutely no pushback from anchor Brianna Keller.
**This is exactly how President Trump’s would-be assassin Ryan Routh was radicalized, and with the rhetoric coming from the Democrats, I’m afraid it’s going to happen again.**
As a rank and file member of Congress, I don’t get a government security detail, I have to pay for that out of my campaign funds or my own personal.
**_[I’m asking for your help in the form of a donation to my campaign so that I can increase my security and keep myself, my staff, and my family safe](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I hate to ask, but I truly need the help right now.
[DONATE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Your support truly means so much to me, and I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart._
_In Liberty,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_[P.S. Please don’t think for one second that these threats are going to stop me from fighting for you every single day. I’ve never been more committed to our mission](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a219/?__vbtrk=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc1OTQ0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
| |
---

name: History Facts
subject: In 1800, about 1 in 3 people lived in this country
body:
There are around 8 billion people on Earth today, and 1.4 billion of them are in China, making the country home to around 17.5% of the global population.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68doi9q6t4o8duqfmu43di164v2nxox1bew2llweqrul6krray3wacqzzqq38pl13xgbrds8ctgsunsk80wgro6ocw438fu8f09almhvo646pxok5br4femdca3ye4zmacb9kr7jrt1obi8pl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [In 1800, about 1 in 3 people lived in China.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| T here are around 8 billion people on Earth today, and 1.4 billion of them are in China, making the country home to around 17.5% of the global population. If that seems high, consider that at the turn of the 19th century, a whopping 1 in 3 people lived in China.
---
Between 1700 and 1800, the population of China more than doubled. There are [a few reasons](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for this. For one, the mortality rate went down, in part because China practiced widespread inoculation for diseases such as smallpox. Other medical technologies became more commonplace, too, including birthing techniques that reduced infant mortality.
At the same time, the global population in general was on a dramatic upswing, [growing about 45%](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) over the course of the 18th century. Still, the population growth in China far outpaced that in the rest of the world. By the year 1800, the population of China was about [300 million](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and the worldwide population was, by some estimates, [about 900 million](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) (other estimates [say](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 1 billion). That places roughly a third of Earth’s population in China at the start of the 19th century.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Smallpox immunization goes back to the 15th century.
For thousands of years, smallpox was one of the deadliest diseases circling the globe, and it’s now been eradicated due to widespread vaccination. And while the smallpox vaccine was technically invented at the end of the 18th century, the basic concept behind it — introducing a small amount of pathogen to guard against future infection — goes back to [at least 1549](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srvocq&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). At the time, a small amount of the virus, taken from the sore of an infected person, would either be scratched into someone’s skin or inhaled through their nose. It seems gross, but it worked: The disease was less fatal in people who got smallpox after inoculation.

clean_body: There are around 8 billion people on Earth today, and 1.4 billion of them are in China, making the country home to around 17.5% of the global population. | T here are around 8 billion people on Earth today, and 1.4 billion of them are in China, making the country home to around 17.5% of the global population. If that seems high, consider that at the turn of the 19th century, a whopping 1 in 3 people lived in China. Between 1700 and 1800, the population of China more than doubled. There are for this. For one, the mortality rate went down, in part because China practiced widespread inoculation for diseases such as smallpox. Other medical technologies became more commonplace, too, including birthing techniques that reduced infant mortality. At the same time, the global population in general was on a dramatic upswing, over the course of the 18th century. Still, the population growth in China far outpaced that in the rest of the world. By the year 1800, the population of China was about , and the worldwide population was, by some estimates, (other estimates 1 billion). That places roughly a third of Earth’s population in China at the start of the 19th century. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Length (in years) of the Qing dynasty (1644 to 1911) 267 | | Length (in miles) of the Yangtze River 3,915 | Length (in miles) of the Yangtze River 3,915 | | Year smallpox was declared eradicated by the World Health Organization 1980 | | Population of the U.S. in January 2024 341 million | Population of the U.S. in January 2024 341 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Smallpox immunization goes back to the 15th century. For thousands of years, smallpox was one of the deadliest diseases circling the globe, and it’s now been eradicated due to widespread vaccination. And while the smallpox vaccine was technically invented at the end of the 18th century, the basic concept behind it — introducing a small amount of pathogen to guard against future infection — goes back to . At the time, a small amount of the virus, taken from the sore of an infected person, would either be scratched into someone’s skin or inhaled through their nose. It seems gross, but it worked: The disease was less fatal in people who got smallpox after inoculation. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Measles Outbreak Grows, Manufacturer Moves, and a 13.1-Mile Crawl
body:
A measles outbreak in Gaines County has grown to at least 49 confirmed cases. Lubbock Public Health announced the city’s first confirmed case on Friday. The outbreak is the state’s worst in nearly 30 years, and health officials suspect there could be hundreds more untested infections.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvozAMgH9N2ECOkxIYMpxUdeutNyJD3GKJAErSXvvvT_Se3vZWf59s6_tzHa4ki6z33xTZl9dtGxDwVAPWuhsCyfIebBX8CKHXFXvtTN91CNZWsydwrW2ZwIXJsm01hFH3kyY3dsbpUIk_lgHqTiN2-tSMwdgWAgfdG5wIlQUOUrbUlJkLvyjflvf25NRMW6wWP5eyZ2V-KbwovMj65FyaW9rWIpwoH9aBzOVR4pC3R5pYmTNHkkVhewwjB3lEZc47Sah3SmXllGfZv_hEcSe5rx_jG-oOagtu-J9BO9P24HpEqJIP-19ZFsmtUxbux6nPs-XHek-P_wIAAP__cLVxeA) | |
# Tuesday, February 18, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1910, French aviator Louis Paulhan made the [first recorded airplane flight](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAQgOGngU4DIy5YUFxjt9deaVgZdBKUDU7W9e0vt_29wPfn_7lP90CZ9uU7bOj5ncoECvpGQaPdFAPlazIy-oeKg5bote0G50AZI1dvEdFFCw5tr_p5dsEOIaXuZm2ER1CS_B-mQDsN4HTfPmJnbipi1EMHcwBhFEbiUltekfEdjpSv8sLazmWT2a_Mz0N0XwJGAeN5nq0ejApUGetGe8htqYuAcaWDS70EjInqwU3KtKzc0N58UFl9fJ6UMx03K4xatkD5k-B_n18efgMAAP__AxRaSQ) in Texas. Paulhan flew a Farman biplane in Houston before a crowd of 25,000 who paid $1 each to see the aerial demonstration. Another [round of cold weather](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOm0AMwPGngc3RYUggA0OWqMtXqVPHyGBznHTcoTvzEfr0FZE6dv5Zf9n-_fX6IuddsD9pkV7fU3yhwSsYhKp7MTl_vJqS-8HwvSqlr9r63nVomqac-1ZoEukEsb1zPdVtSy1fu5pu3HZXg6Xrz5jBqqsQu-p6GbhuboaFq3uNI2HRGGGnMV10FpU35ckf8VvSZYxL6ftZdc1F_SjwWeBz3_fLksNpBT4lwJYLfK7b4N0ImSbRAygwyCLJShidnD4LeZ0_8G_GS9KTKANTsJLilmGMnkHnJKQSMny2AZvEAg1DVIUtWckw0qYuBhg2hUxHhjXuksAmx-AyJCE-znSCx6P6Iz-OX2Xqed2d9y7f2qIxdiHnPwfqfz_-3ePfAAAA___bSog3) is on its way. Stay warm! Did you know that the team that makes _The Texas Flyover_ also produces a national publication called _The Flyover_? [Click here to subscribe](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FuwyAQQL8GtljHQezzwNDFW7p2tCAc8VU4RDZK47-v2qlL9_ee9D4u8yVIkfvtPazs2yvXGQHPJ8CToTkFKcfsdPIR0mg0ezPYkQjBOb34aIlin9lRABPskEYwvYVIGSgzkhb_EwM0ZBDJnLuYrOshcTKjxWtA5YCTtLp1beHGr7DnctQnb921rrr4pbXHruybwknh9Fnl3hb-gyic9ObT40tKkb0flIPbGqT86u3fn6fH7wAAAP__lwlMxw) and stay up to date with the latest national headlines—without the bias of legacy media outlets. We're flying today with our sponsors at [Frontieras](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvozAMgH9N2ECOkxIYMpxUdeutNyJD3GKJAErSXvvvT_Se3vZWf59s6_tzHa4ki6z33xTZl9dtGxDwVAPWuhsCyfIebBX8CKHXFXvtTN91CNZWsydwrW2ZwIXJsm01hFH3kyY3dsbpUIk_lgHqTiN2-tSMwdgWAgfdG5wIlQUOUrbUlJkLvyjflvf25NRMW6wWP5eyZ2V-KbwovMj65FyaW9rWIpwoH9aBzOVR4pC3R5pYmTNHkkVhewwjB3lEZc47Sah3SmXllGfZv_hEcSe5rx_jG-oOagtu-J9BO9P24HpEqJIP-19ZFsmtUxbux6nPs-XHek-P_wIAAP__cLVxeA), offering a unique investment opportunity in the energy sector.
