## Cold Weather Coming
A mass of arctic air will [descend on much of the state](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OwyAQBOCnwR3WshBiFxTXuMu1V1r8LAGJBIugOLmnPzn9laORvpHm57JebC75fv22NzL9FeuKgCcOyMW0BpvLe1VDMA7CLAYy4iznaUJQakhG-Nnrk1QkNWAgnK0j7aNyTjnwEYdsDgxQTAJxEqfRBak0BApilugtMgUUcq9t7Ik6vewjlnd9Uht9vQ3FpN63B5NfDBeGy77vo0-t3o_2yGR7osZwsa1nX4jh8kF4bES_xH0tgcdW750jiDMC6nFL29BM2PZcSn7oM1NwvdlcPov93wueBv8CAAD__1R-Xmo) this evening and linger until Friday, causing temperatures to plunge. Gov. Greg Abbott warned Monday that this could be “the coldest weather event of the year.” Temperatures are expected to reach the single digits in the Panhandle, and residents there and in North Texas could see wintry precipitation today and tomorrow. The National Weather Service has [issued extreme cold watches and warnings](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2P8yAQhH8N7rBgIf4oKN7GXd72SguzS4yETYT34uTfn3LS6arrRvNIo9HzcZ2vPuW03_77jRw_Y5lBwUUqkHqY0af8mm2DblE46oac7s04DKCsbVZnx6gNBrMsg8dhRA1BLV2Mph89RK-a5N5jCvSgAQZ9aRc0tlNIqEcDwYOwijBxqS2vxPT0R8yv8qDahrI12a3M90OYfwImAdN5nu2-BIznG78L8rxS_U0ylH2nwKnsAiaqobD8QafnsEp6cqWNpK-BU5Cxlp0lf9KB_iVgMn0PynYCpqY6vJ8p53R0vbDqtvmUv2_xn54eDr4CAAD__-H-bHc) for large parts of North, West, and Central Texas. Despite the potential for temperature records to be set in some places, Abbott [assured Texans](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOm0AMwPGngc3RYUggA0OWqMtXqVPHyGBznHTcoTvzEfr0FZE6dv5Zf9n-_fX6IuddsD9pkV7fU3yhwSsYhKp7MTl_vJqS-8HwvSqlr9r63nVomqac-1ZoEukEsb1zPdVtSy1fu5pu3HZXg6Xrz5jBqqsQu-p6GbhuboaFq3uNI2HRGGGnMV10FpU35ckf8VvSZYxL6ftZdc1F_SjwWeBz3_fLksNpBT4lwJYLfK7b4N0ImSbRAygwyCLJShidnD4LeZ0_8G_GS9KTKANTsJLilmGMnkHnJKQSMny2AZvEAg1DVIUtWckw0qYuBhg2hUxHhjXuksAmx-AyJCE-znSCx6P6Iz-OX2Xqed2d9y7f2qIxdiHnPwfqfz_-3ePfAAAA___bSog3) they can be “100% confident” the state’s power grid will hold up, saying it “has never been stronger than it is now.” Pablo Vegas, the CEO of power grid operator ERCOT, [echoed that sentiment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvozAQBOBfYzqj9WKDKVxc4y7XXokWvATrnBgZX0ju1z8l0itfNcVIn0bz5zJdKKZ4v_6mG7v6XPOEgEYCSmWnQDG9Jt0EN0MYVcNODd1oLYLWzeZQB6V6a0YEGHkcjIK1Z9ILzbNmVE10bwxQWYVolWnn0OkeAgc1drgQCg0cYs2lrRtXftKxpld-cGmXfGuS22rdD9H9EugF-vM8279b_vcuBXoqNS6JBfo7n4dAn_JCSaD_QN8pNypBroX5P8u98E6Fasx3gR6tkYYUEFmSRsEgtdEgZ16D7ANpDb0xxoxNcWE_Y0rx6Aeh4XqjmD4L64-XPRx-BQAA__8JuWsC), citing improved weatherization of power plants and the addition of 13,500 megawatts of generating capacity—enough to power nearly 3.4 million homes—since Winter Storm Uri in 2021.
## Measles Outbreak Grows
A [measles outbreak in Gaines County](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdKD1YmJTuLjGXa69Ei14SawzOMJOCH9_Iv1VM8Vo3mh-rsOVQgzr7ZsWtuU9pwEBuxqwlmbwFOIxqMrbEXwvK7ZSt70xCEpVdwvkJcuun1vvtTekWwAzz9OoRg2TmatgzzJAaSSikV0z-lZdwLOXfYsToVDAPpS0NeXOhd-U53ikF2_NlJYq2nspjyzaL4FOoNv3vXlmKsnTcQYEulzSdgh0K-_5FCohrQLdyRXoAAU6ebqFKUfOdXqWcWP6rSfKnOsPs155rxd-hykJdNpoowx2AFqgqzbrH3uIMeSLFgpuC4X4WVf-vetl8S8AAP__PzNq-g) has grown to at least 49 confirmed cases. Lubbock Public Health announced the city’s first confirmed case on Friday. The outbreak is the state’s worst in nearly 30 years, and health officials suspect there could be hundreds more untested infections. Gaines County [has](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwEIILite4y2u3tAaYxGixHRkSkr9fOcV2213pSEdX5-syXTDltN7-40Kuvq7bBAJOXACXdoqY8nvSXXRexEF25ORZDdaC0LqbnVLeUiSjrx6tITWAl2chtYEhmJPVXXKHTIC0EsDKU--j0kZEinJQEBCYFhRT3fa-zlTpheWa39uT9j5sS5fdXOu9MPWPwchgbK31qw8rtXJwBuNMmOv8O_iBGIwLYclU-Paofif85o1K5R8_v-1bK_yxPjGEtGKlyPewohxAGtXtLt5byjkVc2Za3BZM-fOl_hnn6eAnAAD__324aHc)[ a large Mennonite population](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwEIILite4y2u3tAaYxGixHRkSkr9fOcV2213pSEdX5-syXTDltN7-40Kuvq7bBAJOXACXdoqY8nvSXXRexEF25ORZDdaC0LqbnVLeUiSjrx6tITWAl2chtYEhmJPVXXKHTIC0EsDKU--j0kZEinJQEBCYFhRT3fa-zlTpheWa39uT9j5sS5fdXOu9MPWPwchgbK31qw8rtXJwBuNMmOv8O_iBGIwLYclU-Paofif85o1K5R8_v-1bK_yxPjGEtGKlyPewohxAGtXtLt5byjkVc2Za3BZM-fOl_hnn6eAnAAD__324aHc), many of whom are averse to vaccination. Its 18% vaccine exemption rate among school-age children is one of the highest in the state. [Thirteen people have been hospitalized](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAUheGnwRsWXHDAA0MXb-na0YLc6xgVm8iQkLx9lezdj74j_T_n-exjivv122_k6nPJMwgYuAAu7Yw-ptesO3RB4Cg7ctKo0VoQWnerG2lQdlDBax3ICBxOi7Kg7GJMQGuwi-6NCZBWAlg59AGVPgkklKOCiwemBWGs-ejrSpWevizplR909Je8dcmttd4KU18MJgZTa61_5fsRfIn7e8Fg2qkVBtNGviQq_OILFY75HhLxuPNGpfIPzFc6iMfC2-orb8R_99wYTN3h8NZiSrGcDNPiuvmYPvf13x4PB38BAAD__2MBZA0) thus far, and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has provided the state with 2,000 doses of the measles vaccine. Measles is a highly contagious disease characterized by symptoms such as fever, cough, and rash. In severe cases, it can [cause pneumonia and swelling of the brain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j79uwyAchJ8GNiz4QTAMDF28pWtHi3-OUbCJDA3J21fO3u2k092n7-c6X23Kab992y2a9lrKDBQuhAJhag425fcscDCOBs1wNGzkWimgQuDVLNQt3AvJ-OioZEzrhclRhuC1uoxe4GTOMwpMMQDFLoMLXEgaYmCag7eABI0htXIMbY0tvmxd8rs84zH4suFs1tYeFfEvBBOCqfc-eFf32OvZI5jOiGD6LMkWbc2xkvLb3BHtnfTVNtIKue-lI5jwYcKjp5xTlSMS9LbZlD-g9q_508BfAAAA__-uvFvK). The measles vaccine became available in the 1960s and is typically administered to young children in two doses.
## North Texan Inundated with Mystery Seeds
Earlier this month, unsolicited [packages containing mystery seeds](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAUhH8Ndhh4omJBcY3dXnuleSvPlRzCRlhZ__3F7a-dzHyZfD-36YbOu_D4xo1Mfi9xAgEtF8Clniw6f06qsuYu7CArMrJvBq1BKFWtppV0n0mj7UgPhNgMXb-odpmxH2BZVOXMBRMgtQTQsq3vtlGdsGTl0MCMwJQg63Lc67xSpjemxZ_xoL2e41Z5s-b8TKz5YjAyGEspdaCSAmYXQ4jlajEYX4lfMYMxxVdeC6XMYPzg-HamTPvJE5HlT5x_8UGJz6sLlIgfFGzcr2W1G_ssznuXup4p8djQ-c-L_K-Ww8BfAAAA__-Cx2iC) began showing up in Texans’ mailboxes, prompting an advisory from Texas Agriculture Commissioner Sid Miller asking recipients to report such packages to the state. Now, it appears a North Texas resident's address was [fraudulently used as the return address](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGSgyAUheGnwQ4HrqhYUGxjl223dAj3kjCLkgGM8e13kn77M-eb-X8uy8WGGLbbt13J1JdPCwjouQAu9YI2xHNRDZqrwEk2ZOTYTVqDUKq5G7TODYrk4B1op0d_BeonManOud5L3wTzPhMgtQTQsm-v2KlBIKGcOnAWmBKEoabc1jtVetni45melFuX1iaae62PwrovBjOD-TiO1qfXaPdSw_aeMJg3OgqDeT1LpXzyQoT8Yd0v1cJ9tjvukbbKLWKmUvhe7I24z6G4xD9ikw0-jhBjKMPIlLitNsSPX_8N8jTwFwAA___K6GZe) for these packages, leading to a daily stream of 5-10 seed packages at the address. The seeds have been identified as those of invasive water lilies and are thought to originate from China, where popular e-retailers Temu and Shein are based. In one instance, a man who [ordered a dog toy](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQAL_GdEb2YohduLjGXa69Ei3eJVhnQoSdEP7-KelfPdJoNP-u4xVTTvfbX1zZ1_e8jaCglwqktiNhyudoGvKTIqcb9vrSOWtBGdMsvicbDfY4YQfRKCS0riflops0T3hpkv_IFGirAazu24k6Myhi0q6DiCCMYkp129u6cOU3ljmf24v3Nm5rk_1S66OI7o-AICAcx9H-X7bnBwoIuNcUMwsIdz6KgJC3iFlA-IoEhPUslfdTFmYqMi7pjvLL5MzT_sT9lJ8-AQFsL50eyNpulrMeUBpFg3RmdpIHjmSj02DmZvf0OFLOqQwXYdRtxZS_rfXXeS8PPwEAAP__t5Vvmw) through Temu received a package of seeds instead. Miller has asked anyone who receives seeds in the mail to [alert the Texas Department of Agriculture](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kMGuoyAYRp8Gdxj4RcUFCzPFjEnVidjM7AwVtCT0eqPUtm8_me5n9y2-nJyc383YaOfd19LquxXhNa8jEEgxAUz5aLTz75FFRlyJKWhkBc2TgnMgjEU3weeCp8CIzpjV6cwTwq-GkKzQc55ZlkdO_IMRoJwCcJrGV5OwjBhraJHApAExYo0L6xaHmw32pffZv9fDbvG03iMvbiF87ygpEVQIqs9BL5ubHj48Nhsv64Ggau1zx_KwX2FHUJVbcJO3CCpKgGcIqh9d09RK1V0re6zqE27q81n2uJe_un5QePgp8UVJ3FV4kH9KhXs5XPoWl6dTL5XC3WfWQ9215Rlfok2Y76fz3u1ZjhhZ7tr5j2_4b8BDwN8AAAD__zr3bYE), which will pick them up and destroy them using a steam sterilization process.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Misunderstanding American citizenship
body:
Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/f_6DHDU38brfr78KuTdV348J0z6QyVnfuXaYUMtvXTswoBUyUK6FTxNZxVZmFOzbDKI_e8HbgRoVfc1Ob2pFmNSoKtn3HdpNOfTXemc2517na7e8VKu799lwQI0zeDops7y-MhCoIoi1eW70q_LMzTvSEbhrMXHBCGaM2v6jLkIIDltSDjn_W41GCOsKxOETPi0S3ET37DLMZ2_4vhFctXHlTc1QM19lCAl45dQdP7uZbSM8R-yurlju7KJmpdxF-CvQljAB3BT_tf4Vq5xr6M9g9mpsTn4siL_FOlzoaT3b44-yR1JoXUQJUPoOweaahmq6QfhvQ2Z5uAFP5ccVfWIRg3w6lAcmuSSPrvh0oVLc2LUnOHDvnHD0uXS-Mm7HTRDayhJdk5mFc0kj-_oimhfDQncbuGLXoeuWxMuiwt6_uWTi_fW__jPBPied7caRFb-R9fGicaVxNz7iny6mgWX1iAflYdyO/cs306rH-_P0LHO2GnS39a81qRxGMJTJ-/6)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that America's Founders rejected birthright citizenship--the idea that someone who is born within our country's borders is automatically a citizen?

This idea--which is a misunderstanding of the meaning of citizenship--is the subject of an ongoing national debate that will have long-lasting implications for our nation.

I'm writing today to offer you a FREE issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty, that explains the facts about birthright citizenship.

**In this FREE issue, "Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny," you'll learn:**

* Why the Founders rejected automatic citizenship based on birthplace
* How the 14th Amendment has been misinterpreted over the years
* What reforms are needed to restore the true meaning of citizenship

Since you're a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you'll find this issue interesting and informative. It will help equip you to engage in this critical debate.

And, if your friends and family have questions about this topic, you may want to share this _Imprimis_ issue with them.

You can receive your FREE copy of **" Birthright Citizenship and Dual Citizenship: Harbingers of Administrative Tyranny"** at this secure link:

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/birthright-citizenship-imprimis](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/exb5YTBaRiCH4BFawVltk4tp1JiHeqzofnUrOrto0OEgZfX8I6Ij0UYpGEOXct-Z-TTLz-ePhQXDf2_2U4lzWV1m818G_tKujp-rwZ4I27Q1WtfSYopUSIY4QmkZ2CgfPFiagD7G1tgcILXokbyaqE_UyMmb0Y_k3l4USYQX5zqIMZnbuSK9Gj84GhEv5tex5u4cv_Pn51sokfkcRURBnOj2aHEcDmQvXxlGZBYDYdS9I3L9UbirK7JxpxTe4kk2Lte88jw_7meNVpvN9bCXluxj4KWWhaEmtvVDoTl5uZNOOEZmtMsj20uONA-BKUb24Gi04-pFzTVWoqsH620wyBZCU_fVbSQ0nnzKToHttrBbDQ0NyyCEhNdwl5fSQartVvePWINgIJEaZbGuduQF_EHdRnp-OGnEIBm9pIfr3qMAJ9BiakpNssTxylAe76tj1r7YBdKfnxhiOPzQnfxmoANl-xX6RBdK/1J6WiWSEsX6YjxWcghNxAHyfkbyOULQE/6)

Please don't delay! Get your free copy right away.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Democrats can flip this key Senate seat in 2026
body:
Susan Collins has announced she intends to run for re-election in 2026, a possible pick up for Democrats in a swing state.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2whdpt-v1z1f7-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Maine's Senate Seat 2026: Pickup Opportunity for Dems**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2whdpt-v1z1f8-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | This is a great opportunity for Democrats, friend, The 2026 midterms are fast approaching, and we need to make big moves to win the House and the Senate. One of the most critical races will be the re-election of Republican Senator Susan Collins of Maine. While she has managed to hold onto her seat in past elections, 2026 is shaping up to be one of the toughest cycles yet for Senate Republicans – and we have an opportunity to flip it. **Why It Matters:** Susan Collins has long been seen as one of the most moderate and centrist Republicans in the Senate. In fact, she’s often been a key bipartisan figure, but her recent votes – especially her support for Justice Brett Kavanaugh and her history of aligning with Trump – have made her a target for Democrats. Collins narrowly survived a tough race in 2020, despite President Biden winning Maine, and now she’s planning to run for a sixth term in a state that’s been trending more Democratic. But 2026 will be even tougher, friend. Collins will face a wave of Democratic challengers who are determined to flip her seat, and she’s not the only vulnerable Republican in 2026. There are 19 Senate seats Republicans will have to defend, compared to just 14 for Democrats.
**How You Can Make a Difference:** To win big in 2026, we need to ensure we’re putting the right resources into key battleground states like Maine. Here’s how you can help: **Donate** to campaigns that are fighting to flip these seats. Your support directly funds ads, grassroots organizing, and outreach efforts to make sure voters know the stakes of the 2026 elections. **Volunteer** your time. Whether it’s phone banking, canvassing, or helping with digital outreach, every effort counts in these pivotal races. **Spread the Word.** The fight for the Senate is going to be intense, and we need to keep people engaged and informed. Share updates, write to your local representatives, and get others involved in the cause. [**_We cannot afford to let Republicans like Susan Collins hold onto power, especially when it’s clear that the future of our democracy depends on flipping key Senate seats in 2026. Let’s work together to build momentum, take action, and make this election a turning point for our country._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2whdpt-v1z1f9-kyd76rh3/) It’s time to take back control – for our future and for the next generation. Let’s make it happen. **Join us today.**

name: Troy Downing
subject: Democrats are trying to ruin our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We can’t afford to lose DOGE

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Just days after President Trump’s plan to dismantle USAID because of the tremendous amount of waste and fraud discovered, Democrats have found their next boogeyman:

The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).

DOGE is one of the best things to come out of this new Administration. Just weeks into the administration, we’ve already seen its impact by scoping out the waste at USAID and just this week eliminated another $182 million from HHS. **However, Democrats are starting to go after it with everything they have.**

They’re even going so far as to call Elon Musk a “Nazi” and say he’s orchestrating a “coup.”

First, they tried to stall Elon Musk by denying him access to critical data. Now, they're calling for the complete elimination of DOGE. Any hope of restoring fiscal sanity in our government will be gone in one fell swoop. _We can’t let them get away with this._ **[**Peter, will you sign my petition to support DOGE and protect it from the Democrats?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._G2vRdIVscTH9KgMJQ)**
---
[ SAVE DOGE](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---

Thank you for signing,Congressman Troy Downing

* * *
* **TOP NEWS**

"**ERCOT grid expected to hold ahead of freeze in Texas,** " Houston Chronicle's**Sam Gonz alez Kelly **-- "The Electric Reliability Council of Texas issued a weather watch Monday for a [possible freeze later this week](https://substack.com/redirect/179a402e-de6b-4a0d-9f65-a64faa879d15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as Gov. **Greg Abbott** warned Texans to prepare for what could be the "[coldest weather event of the year](https://substack.com/redirect/8ab61fd6-ba58-47e5-8e9f-6aef2d0e3090?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."

ERCOT, which manages electricity for more than 90% of the state, [said they expect the Texas grid to hold up to the freeze](https://substack.com/redirect/a52f23a0-a317-4e82-8c2a-c5e537d090fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), though they anticipate high demand and "the potential for lower reserves."

The council's [public forecasts](https://substack.com/redirect/59b0a5f9-1273-4ac7-9273-87eed4c22c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) indicate more than enough capacity to keep the power on through the week, with a gap of around 12,000 megawatts between supply and demand at their narrowest point Thursday morning. The threshold for a grid emergency, by contrast, is 2,500 megawatts.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/5f043248-e8e1-4947-9373-3cf001b615e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5f043248-e8e1-4947-9373-3cf001b615e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees.

Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas.

"There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/5e00dba1-1e0e-4f9d-8359-34d217b6350e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "ERCOT grid expected to hold ahead of freeze in Texas, " Houston Chronicle'sSam Gonz alez Kelly -- "The Electric Reliability Council of Texas issued a weather watch Monday for a as Gov. Greg Abbott warned Texans to prepare for what could be the "." ERCOT, which manages electricity for more than 90% of the state, , though they anticipate high demand and "the potential for lower reserves." The council's indicate more than enough capacity to keep the power on through the week, with a gap of around 12,000 megawatts between supply and demand at their narrowest point Thursday morning. The threshold for a grid emergency, by contrast, is 2,500 megawatts. After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees. Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas. "There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: How YOU can stop bad candidates
body:
Peter, Last week I wrote to you and shared this disturbing statistic: only 22 percent of common sense New Jersey voters vote
|
---
| Peter, Last week I wrote to you and shared this disturbing statistic: only 22 percent of common sense New Jersey voters vote in primaries. That’s only 2 out of every 10. The result? We have an abundance of Lemons–disappointing, do-nothing, status-quo candidates–on our general election ballots. **So this year we’re doing something about it.** Want to join us? Here’s a critical first step we’re asking you to take: **Sign up to vote by mail TODAY.** You can do so [here.](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/a792405f99fea88db5812aa85285d3af/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1rWprQ_oTkSkVF2IriXaQaNpEpKxtUr_3fjAlYLbmXPPcOcGhIorygpI4ULXOE4gAIs7YQQqGmtFfPfcxv1eN-kGIIU6Ta0-G0hvX8Mf4DFOhtEgAGoMemS1HI3zbDHdzLJF7knDrb_xn6cfRR_PZD7KZtC2P8VYCppU3u0gJXvGR6NC-Fa0ttLzByLjUsbqug7VMdzrijnihAylZ4RWjlWasLNtOiUXMnQHKqX3cmNQFe-n5Ni87O0dWZ9rVg==) Why vote by mail? A few reasons...
1. Beat the Left at their own game.

The Left count on running up the score before Election Day and cast a majority of the early mail-in votes. It’s time for us to beat them at their own game. We need to FLOOD the ballot boxes with Common Sense votes this November.

2. Don’t risk last-minute Election Day problems.

Suddenly sick on Election Day? Car out of gas? Can’t step away from work? Long lines, shenanigans and malfunctions at your polling place? No problem. You’ll have the peace of mind that your vote has already been cast.

Convinced? [**Sign up to vote by mail by following this link**](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/59294fa86a116047644ad6f31f2fa6fb/eJyNkMsKwjAQRf9l1rWxrSJ0J1KkVF2IriXaQaNpEpKxtUr_3fjAlYLbmXPPcOcGhIoryktI4ULXOE4gAIs7YQQqmmhFfPfcxsNBlEQBSKFOU6vPBtLb1_AHeIyTURQHQK1Bj6yW40mRL6abWb4oPGm49Tf-8wz7_Y8nm4_zGXTdTzFWgrLaux2kZM_4aFQK34rWVnr-QGRcyljTNKE6hntdM0eckKH0jNDKsVoT9rZtr-JChu5AlfRebgyq8v2UAtuXvbsDVvprUw==): If more of us Common Sense voters show up, there will be fewer Lemons on the ballot–and, more importantly, fewer Lemons in Trenton this coming year. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club
---
|

Why You’re Receiving This Email You’re receiving this email because at some point, you opted in to receive updates, news, or information on a specific topic we’ve previously discussed or shared. Whether it was through a subscription, a form submission, or another form of communication, your information was shared willingly, and we respect your decision to connect with us. If you’re wondering about the nature of our correspondence, rest assured that we aim to keep all emails relevant, timely, and free from unnecessary clutter. This includes respecting your inbox and refraining from sending irrelevant messages. Your Privacy is Important We value your trust and take your privacy very seriously. The information you provide is securely stored and never shared, sold, or used outside the purpose for which you provided it. If you ever want to review how we handle your data, feel free to contact us directly. Transparency is our priority, and we’re happy to address any questions you might have. You are always in control of the information you share. If you feel that any part of your subscription or interaction needs clarification, let us know. We’re here to provide accurate answers and ensure your satisfaction. How to Unsubscribe or Manage Your Preferences We understand that everyone’s inbox is different. If you ever find our emails no longer relevant, there’s no hard feelings. You can easily manage your email preferences or unsubscribe using the link provided below. By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org
Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line)
Mailing Address:
Common Sense Club
165 Route 35
Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen.

By clicking the unsubscribe link, you’ll be taken to a page where you can either adjust your communication preferences (such as receiving fewer emails or only on specific topics) or completely remove yourself from our list. The process is straightforward, and any changes will take effect promptly. We don’t use tricks or gimmicks to keep you subscribed. Our priority is to ensure that our emails add value to your day, and if they don’t, we respect your decision to part ways. Accessibility and Communication If you have any trouble accessing the unsubscribe page, managing preferences, or understanding why you’re receiving this email, you can reach out directly to our support team at info@commonsense.org. We aim to provide a response within a reasonable time frame and address your concerns effectively. Our communication is designed to be as inclusive as possible, but we know there’s always room for improvement. If you have any feedback on how we can make our emails more accessible or relevant, please don’t hesitate to share. A Commitment to Non-Intrusive Emails We aim to create a non-intrusive communication experience. This means we won’t overwhelm your inbox with excessive messages, and we work hard to ensure our content remains clear and concise. The purpose of this email is to stay connected with you and provide updates or information that we believe is meaningful. If we ever fail to meet these standards, we encourage you to let us know. Feedback, whether positive or constructive, is always appreciated. Your thoughts help us understand how we can do better and improve our communication approach. While we cannot guarantee every suggestion will be implemented, we will take the time to carefully review and consider your input. Contact Information If you’d like to get in touch with us outside of managing your preferences, here’s how you can reach us: Email: info@commonsense.org Phone: (866) 916-3221 (please note this is a text-only line) Mailing Address: Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey, 07701 We strive to ensure all communication channels are open and readily available to you. Whether it’s a question, comment, or concern, our team is ready to assist. Legal Information We comply with all applicable laws and regulations regarding email communication. This includes adhering to anti-spam laws and maintaining the highest standards for consent-based communication. Your trust matters, and we work diligently to ensure every email you receive meets these requirements. If you need further clarification on our compliance policies or legal obligations, please feel free to ask. Transparency and accountability are central to our communication strategy, and we’re happy to provide additional details if needed. A Final Note Emails are one of the many ways we stay connected, but we understand they aren’t perfect for everyone. If there’s another way you’d prefer to communicate or stay updated, let us know. Whether it’s through social media, a direct call, or another channel, we’re open to finding the most effective way to share information with you. We want to emphasize that our goal is never to disrupt or clutter your inbox. Every email sent is intended to provide value, and we genuinely appreciate your time and attention. Thank you for allowing us to stay in touch with you. This footer was designed to ensure transparency, provide essential information, and give you full control over your communication preferences. We hope it meets your expectations, but if there’s anything you’d like to see improved, we’re always here to listen. | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees.

Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas.

"There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" Sign up now at | TOP NEWS “ERCOT grid expected to hold ahead of freeze in Texas, ” Houston Chronicle'sSam González Kelly — “The Electric Reliability Council of Texas issued a weather watch Monday for a as Gov. Greg Abbott warned Texans to prepare for what could be the "." ERCOT, which manages electricity for more than 90% of the state, , though they anticipate high demand and "the potential for lower reserves." The council's indicate more than enough capacity to keep the power on through the week, with a gap of around 12,000 megawatts between supply and demand at their narrowest point Thursday morning. The threshold for a grid emergency, by contrast, is 2,500 megawatts. » » After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees. Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas. "There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" * **TOP NEWS**

"**ERCOT grid expected to hold ahead of freeze in Texas,** " Houston Chronicle's**Sam Gonz alez Kelly **-- "The Electric Reliability Council of Texas issued a weather watch Monday for a [possible freeze later this week](https://substack.com/redirect/7b411d6e-55ab-4c34-94e1-0b798b76c8b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as Gov. **Greg Abbott** warned Texans to prepare for what could be the "[coldest weather event of the year](https://substack.com/redirect/ce2becd8-36fc-4199-9c94-41bedc4b6ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."

ERCOT, which manages electricity for more than 90% of the state, [said they expect the Texas grid to hold up to the freeze](https://substack.com/redirect/de9c539f-ee30-4f6c-a35f-23f70ceacfd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), though they anticipate high demand and "the potential for lower reserves."

The council's [public forecasts](https://substack.com/redirect/c61945c7-2005-477c-85b0-3aa7075234e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) indicate more than enough capacity to keep the power on through the week, with a gap of around 12,000 megawatts between supply and demand at their narrowest point Thursday morning. The threshold for a grid emergency, by contrast, is 2,500 megawatts.

[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5881bdbb-da89-40fa-b1be-19413b4b5bc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees.

Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas.

"There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" [Houston Chronicle](https://substack.com/redirect/7df19679-785c-48af-b3bd-2083ebabd03c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

TOP NEWS "ERCOT grid expected to hold ahead of freeze in Texas, " Houston Chronicle'sSam Gonz alez Kelly -- "The Electric Reliability Council of Texas issued a weather watch Monday for a as Gov. Greg Abbott warned Texans to prepare for what could be the "." ERCOT, which manages electricity for more than 90% of the state, , though they anticipate high demand and "the potential for lower reserves." The council's indicate more than enough capacity to keep the power on through the week, with a gap of around 12,000 megawatts between supply and demand at their narrowest point Thursday morning. The threshold for a grid emergency, by contrast, is 2,500 megawatts. After mild weather in Houston on Monday, temperatures will start dropping on Tuesday, with the potential for strong storms around Southeast Texas. On Wednesday night and Thursday morning, temperatures in Houston are expected to plunge to their lowest levels of the week, with lows around 30 degrees. Abbott held a press conference Monday to discuss extreme weather events around the state, including what he described as the likely "coldest weather event of the year." Though temperatures in the Houston area are expected to drop only a few degrees below freezing on Wednesday night, other parts of the state are in for much colder weather, with wind chills below zero in parts of North and Central Texas. "There will be widespread freezing across the entire state with temperatures down to near zero degrees," Abbott said. "People need to be very cautious over the coming days as temperatures plummet, so make sure that you take care of yourself."" Now-Trump's Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth **[STEAMROLLED Jessica Tarlov](https://substack.com/redirect/0cbb7a78-13a2-4866-b5e6-6be3e91256d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Fox News for advocating for sending hundreds of millions of tax-payer dollars to woke organizations such as the UN and the World Health Organization.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0cbb7a78-13a2-4866-b5e6-6be3e91256d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0cbb7a78-13a2-4866-b5e6-6be3e91256d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We should not pay a dime! The UN is in the pocket of autocrats and the Chinese Communist Party! The longer we leave ourselves to be beholden to these international organizations, the weaker we become!" Hegseth continued his tirade, "Who is the head of the Human Rights Council right now at the UN? Is it North Korea or Iran?!"
Tarlov responded, "I think most people would disagree with you. I've got good things to say about the UN and the World Economic Forum!"
Hegseth ends the segment mocking Tarlov, "Yes! The blue helmets (the UN) are going to save the day!"
The resurfaced clip from Hegseth's days as a Fox News contributor showcases the new head of the Pentagon in action, standing up for America First principles.
Democrats like Tarlov fully support sending hard earned tax-payer dollars across the globe while neglecting hard working Americans here at home. The Whitehouse released a list of **[some of the most absurd USAID expenditures](https://substack.com/redirect/ab8a8046-f19a-40dd-acb7-d24b0bbbcaf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a few weeks ago, including foreign DEI programs, tax funded sex change surgeries, and transgender musical theater.
Watch Pete Hegseth DESTROY Jessica Tarlov here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0cbb7a78-13a2-4866-b5e6-6be3e91256d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump's top dog SCHOOLS CNN 's Jake Tapper on Trump's tariff's during embarrassing live interview**
Trump's Senior Counselor for Trade and Manufacturing Peter Navarro **[SCHOOLED Jake Tapper on how tariffs actually work](https://substack.com/redirect/65f9b39a-18df-4ad4-b302-b14fd9fb6117?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** live on his own show.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/65f9b39a-18df-4ad4-b302-b14fd9fb6117?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/65f9b39a-18df-4ad4-b302-b14fd9fb6117?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"There's a lot of people whose hair is on fire. Inflation, inflation, recession, recession. What we learned from the historic China tariffs, the steel and aluminum tariffs, the tariffs on dishwashers, we didn't get any inflation at all! We got price stability but more importantly, we got our jobs back!" Navarro told Tapper regarding Trump's first-term tariffs.
Rudely interrupting, Tapper exclaimed, "I hear what you're saying but I'm not the one that said prices are going to go up, President Trump is the one who said that prices could possibly go up in the short term."
Navarro fired back, dragging CNN White House Correspondent Kaitlan Collins into the mix, "I was in the room when they had that dialogue and what he said was there might be some modest effects but more importantly, jobs are going to go up and wages are going to go up!"
Watch Peter Navarro dismantle Jake Tapper here:

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Flip the House
disclaimer_text: paid for by cuts to programs families need like Head Start, food assistance, and Medicaid
body:
Republicans have a razor-thin House majority. If we can get just a few Republicans to vote against his tax cuts for billionaires or if we can just win a few of these special elections or toss-up races, we can stop Trump.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=399%2E2563979%2EQ9mpoY)

$10
That is the donation Kamala Harris is humbly asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee today.
$10 so the DNC has the resources to organize Democrats across the country to stop Trump's tax cuts for billionaires paid for by cuts to programs families need like Head Start, food assistance, and Medicaid.
$10 because Democrats must flip the House if we're going to stop anything Trump wants to do in Congress.
$10 because there are several special elections coming up to replace Republicans in the House that either resigned or who Trump nominated for positions in his administration.
Republicans have a razor-thin House majority. If we can get just a few Republicans to vote against his tax cuts for billionaires or if we can just win a few of these special elections or toss-up races, we can stop Trump.
But that requires resources. So we're asking everyone who knows how important that is to just chip in a few bucks today.
[**Please rush a $10 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. They will put your donation to work pressuring Republican legislators to vote against Trump's tax plan, and to flip the seats we need to take control of the House.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250218&refcode2=399_2563979_Q9mpoY&akid=399%2E2563979%2EQ9mpoY)

subject: A room that’s 77% men…

body:

Hi Peter,

A New York doctor was recently indicted by a Louisiana grand jury for prescribing an abortion pill to a young minor (under the supervision of her mother) across state lines.

Louisiana has a total abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. Under their state law, doctors face penalties of up to 15 years in prison and $200,000 in fines for facilitating an abortion. Since the state’s ban went into effect, pregnant women and children have been given “risky, unnecessary surgeries, denied treatment for miscarriages and ectopic pregnancies, and forced to wait until their life is at risk before getting the care they need.” _(NPR)_

**Louisiana’s State Legislature is 77% male lawmakers – one of the most underrepresented state governments for women in the country.**

[**We are no longer accepting the dangerous underrepresentation that has given rooms full of men the power to make laws about OUR bodies. We are working tirelessly to get more women elected. Help us chip away at male GOP supermajorities across the country by donating $25 today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102315167/528789663/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250218men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhMGM0ZWFjLTAwZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=87HUbdTLBPBOrGKDsBJSUtJhE3gCUPEIv1QhdUrhlEE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102315170/528789665/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250218men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhMGM0ZWFjLTAwZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=87HUbdTLBPBOrGKDsBJSUtJhE3gCUPEIv1QhdUrhlEE=)

---
Louisiana has some of the HIGHEST rates of maternal mortality and morbidity in the nation. **It is dangerous to be a woman in a red state – and there is virtually no infrastructure in place to change that.** The Democratic party, most progressive orgs, and virtually all other institutional funders dedicated to getting more women in office are directing their resources to – you guessed it – blue and purple states.

The reason for that is understandable. They want to put their money behind “winnable” races and they don’t believe red states have winnable seats worth fighting for.

But here’s the thing: in 2024, **44% of our Her Bold Move victories happened in red states.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102315196/528789799/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250218men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhMGM0ZWFjLTAwZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=87HUbdTLBPBOrGKDsBJSUtJhE3gCUPEIv1QhdUrhlEE=)
---
**That is why we at Her Bold Move have created a plan to support women candidates in underserved races and build infrastructure in underserved places. Because women across the country are counting on us – and they deserve real representation in their government. It’s our job to make that happen.**

[**We won’t leave any women behind – women in red states need our help urgently. You can join our fight today by donating $25 or more right now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102315202/528789805/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250218men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhMGM0ZWFjLTAwZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=87HUbdTLBPBOrGKDsBJSUtJhE3gCUPEIv1QhdUrhlEE=)

Together,

Ileana Paules-Bronet
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102315206/528789810/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250218men_N_JZ_90DO_9_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhMGM0ZWFjLTAwZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=87HUbdTLBPBOrGKDsBJSUtJhE3gCUPEIv1QhdUrhlEE=)

But here’s the thing: in 2024, 44% of our Her Bold Move victories happened in red states. = That is why we at Her Bold Move have created a plan to support women candidates in underserved races and build infrastructure in underserved places. Because women across the country are counting on us – and they deserve real representation in their government. It’s our job to make that happen. = Together, Ileana Paules-Bronet Her Bold Move | | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures. Support this work with a contribution today! = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. Her Bold Move One Park Row 5th Floor Providence, RI 02903 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe this email was sent in error, please contact us at info@herboldmove.org. We'd hate to see you go, but if you must, you can . To learn more about Her Bold Move Action, please visit us at herboldmove.org.

name: Amy Carnevale
subject: Yes, she really did this!
body:
Gov. Healey snuck a Rx drug tax into her budget...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011fk7WwoKNhP117sp4zAcHHPxLmUJpBuYl8gxLeU2kTgLd4HWTqT9eRs7gfEsKdY_L2wquzl1ewhKbiF0oRGVMaacl9P4b7BAvuy36WkkqpmoZt3pzRmhrlH80iPH25ou-v_irQrTYOSN9CWo1Ix11w==&c=jAQVEiAwLwih_v1uW15DAAD2NgHTgnpD1dTOenhp9EmnSsJdhdfl3Q==&ch=xENGSrnaoKsEG8Fg_YUqtMcVz1vNHZaUnUaex0ihlXAeOTZZWRvdgA==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Did you see the [Boston Herald](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011fk7WwoKNhP117sp4zAcHHPxLmUJpBuYl8gxLeU2kTgLd4HWTqT9eQHu3_OZCRX78t1oVlaxSjxqwn3bywY8seSx6GvCN1gPK1XRhlicznj-P0TuSw-sGBnpV8xBDDrP7O6frBTpXZTePfuJIVQUKGsUk1KgrFElKM7gx494B9wEzRMdOzoTD6HHr_iJv5mM0i5WnM9EvucBh0pmTC5SPE6Us8Lry88piJys2vlcNiWGC_diA0oBiFh3r9FR7hw7tKY9QtVFgpF9fZuhrG7dPDkyYLrdOBnY&c=jAQVEiAwLwih_v1uW15DAAD2NgHTgnpD1dTOenhp9EmnSsJdhdfl3Q==&ch=xENGSrnaoKsEG8Fg_YUqtMcVz1vNHZaUnUaex0ihlXAeOTZZWRvdgA==)[ today](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011fk7WwoKNhP117sp4zAcHHPxLmUJpBuYl8gxLeU2kTgLd4HWTqT9eQHu3_OZCRX78t1oVlaxSjxqwn3bywY8seSx6GvCN1gPK1XRhlicznj-P0TuSw-sGBnpV8xBDDrP7O6frBTpXZTePfuJIVQUKGsUk1KgrFElKM7gx494B9wEzRMdOzoTD6HHr_iJv5mM0i5WnM9EvucBh0pmTC5SPE6Us8Lry88piJys2vlcNiWGC_diA0oBiFh3r9FR7hw7tKY9QtVFgpF9fZuhrG7dPDkyYLrdOBnY&c=jAQVEiAwLwih_v1uW15DAAD2NgHTgnpD1dTOenhp9EmnSsJdhdfl3Q==&ch=xENGSrnaoKsEG8Fg_YUqtMcVz1vNHZaUnUaex0ihlXAeOTZZWRvdgA==)?
Governor Maura Healey snuck a prescription drug tax into her budget! That's right - Healey wants us paying more for our medications. Our Governor should look for ways to lower costs for prescription drugs which are a necessity - not increase them!
As you know, the MassGOP is laser focused on getting Gov. Healey and her allies out of office. With such outrageous proposals such as taxing medication, you would think defeating her next year would be like shooting fish in a barrel. But you and I both know it is not, because she has very well-funded allies.
Last week, the Office of Campaign and Political Finance released a list of Top PAC Expenditures. Healey's union allies were number one. And they still have lots of money on hand.
PAC expenditures and ending balances: 2024
---
| |
---
| That's why I'm reaching out today - we need your help to level the playing field.
Governor Healey must be defeated. We need to inform the voters over and over again how she is against them. [Will you help by making a donation today?](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011fk7WwoKNhP117sp4zAcHHPxLmUJpBuYl8gxLeU2kTgLd4HWTqT9eUjYYvQpsTIZuhGWU0fTOKNL2G2haRFxuFX6r7ML9vMJUxfUTkIG0C68rMuhRkBoL893WvyA0S2YV3CM_t48nuRlonza4-JBj3eUB8Cpxmq19EQScAFhl-aZB5X5Ig6KzdV3A1uhcvkcOrRAt3-XycA=&c=jAQVEiAwLwih_v1uW15DAAD2NgHTgnpD1dTOenhp9EmnSsJdhdfl3Q==&ch=xENGSrnaoKsEG8Fg_YUqtMcVz1vNHZaUnUaex0ihlXAeOTZZWRvdgA==)
We should not be taxing medications! Let's show Gov. Healey that her days in office are numbered.

---
| [HEALEY'S DAYS ARE NUMBERED - DONATE TO MASSGOP TODAY](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011fk7WwoKNhP117sp4zAcHHPxLmUJpBuYl8gxLeU2kTgLd4HWTqT9eUjYYvQpsTIZuhGWU0fTOKNL2G2haRFxuFX6r7ML9vMJUxfUTkIG0C68rMuhRkBoL893WvyA0S2YV3CM_t48nuRlonza4-JBj3eUB8Cpxmq19EQScAFhl-aZB5X5Ig6KzdV3A1uhcvkcOrRAt3-XycA=&c=jAQVEiAwLwih_v1uW15DAAD2NgHTgnpD1dTOenhp9EmnSsJdhdfl3Q==&ch=xENGSrnaoKsEG8Fg_YUqtMcVz1vNHZaUnUaex0ihlXAeOTZZWRvdgA==)
---
Thank you,
---
| |
---

Amy Carnevale
Chair, MassGOP

subject: Prince George’s Deserves Strong Leadership—Let’s Win This Together
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93538/images/Yard%20Signs%20%28March%202022%29%20%2815%29.png]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/links [https://www.rushernbaker.com/links]
Friends and Neighbors,
I’m running for Prince George’s County Executive because I believe in the power of leadership that listens, acts, and delivers real results. Our county deserves bold, experienced leadership to tackle the challenges we face and seize the opportunities ahead.
From protecting workers’ rights to strengthening public safety, I’ve always stood up for what’s right. I’m proud to have the support of labor unions, public safety professionals, and community leaders who know that I will always put Prince George’s County first.
But this campaign isn’t just about me—it’s about us . It’s about building a future where every resident has access to good jobs, safe neighborhoods, and a government that works for them. And to make that vision a reality, I need your help.
Every dollar we raise helps us get our message out, reach more voters, and build a campaign strong enough to win. Will you chip in today to power this movement?
So I’m asking—will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to keep up our momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
Thank you for believing in this campaign and in the future we’re building together.
With gratitude,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/ [https://www.rushernbaker.com/volunteer/]
By Authority: Friends of Rushern Baker III, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
9646 Marlboro Pike, Upper Marlboro, MD 20772

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: What does it take to retire in comfort?
body:
| Hi Peter, How much do you need to retire comfortably? What's that "magic number" your nest egg has to hit, so you can feel confident about retirement? Many Americans believe their nest egg needs to hit anywhere from $1.5 million to $4 million to retire well.1 But that number might look very different depending on your unique retirement goals and how far away your retirement date is.1 And while knowing your target number is important, it's just one piece of the retirement puzzle.1 To help you get a clearer picture of where you stand, I'm sharing a 5-question quiz on retirement planning in this month's Visual Insights Newsletter. It covers key concepts like Social Security, savings strategies, and health care – topics that can significantly impact your financial future.
---
|
---
**[Click here to take the 3-minute quiz now and see how you score.](https://financeinsights.net/PQqOt4MpLC8AknAIq6z2ls1QWjr?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** Retirement planning can feel complex because it's not just about hitting a number. It's about understanding the broader concepts that guide your decisions. When you understand the key elements, you can make more informed choices and better position yourself to achieve your retirement goals. Want to see how well you understand the essentials of retirement planning? Take this quick, 3-minute quiz to find out. **[Click here to test your knowledge now!](https://financeinsights.net/PQqOt4MpLC8AknAIq6z2ls1QWjr?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)** To living a richer life in retirement,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6IkIyYjdpTFdQOHVqMUFYOCIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. What would your "perfect" day as a retiree look like? What would you do, where would you be, and who would you want along for the experience? Hit "reply" and share your thoughts. I'd love to hear about what it would take to create your ideal day in retirement. Sources 1\. Kiplinger, 2024 [URL: [https://www.kiplinger.com/retirement/magic-number-to-retire-comfortably](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cua2lwbGluZ2VyLmNvbVwvcmV0aXJlbWVudFwvbWFnaWMtbnVtYmVyLXRvLXJldGlyZS1jb21mb3J0YWJseSIsImhhc2giOiJCMmI3aUxXUDh1ajFBWDgiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)]

| | Dear Reader,

Love him or hate him... Bill O’Reilly always manages to get people’s attention.

A short time ago... he got mine.

I’ve known him for years... he’s been a reader of mine and has become a good friend.

But recently he told me...

**“I came away from that cabinet meeting believing Trump is perhaps the best prepared new president in history.”**

[**(CLICK HERE TO SEE WHY)**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

In short... The next few years are going to change EVERYTHING in America.

Trump has already declared that he is going to unleash "**the most extraordinary economic boom the world has ever seen."**

And whether you like his politics or not...

The stage is set in America for the most pivotal point in our recent history.

I believe that the next four years will bring about the [**Rebirth of the American Dream** ...](https://link.myamericanpatriot.) and create 20 million NEW millionaires.

You read that right.

20 MILLION.

A new golden age is going to get started very shortly.

It’s all thanks to [**one secret power Trump is tapping into** ...](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

One piece of American-made technology will unleash a force that will expand our economy faster than ever _without_ triggering inflation.

[**See the tech that’s going to drive an entire shift to American-made products and American-made innovation. (Click Here!)**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

If you missed out on the big mega trends of the past few years...

Or if you are looking for what’s next...

[**I urge you to watch this sit-down interview I had with Bill O’Reilly right away.**](https://link.myamericanpatriot.)

Alexander Green

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join the Movement to Protect Women’s Rights
body:
Strength in Numbers Peter
| Peter, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. **_Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet!_**
However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front.
President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Peter. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. **Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights.** This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world.
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Your gift of $50, $100, or even more can empower us to continue our vital mission.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8b48e4af53b1419c8b348d475011634d&_e=17jAUKkErB5uhraR6Al50VnTVvGWx0PhqvcFGNGiPdVx58EyK0P4vubxPEAAgnNI9Assszm-DDYolddT554ljGpZVLmy5D0EoxatrMupRTuj4EpO00M2NgKk1HilBS4894hWYM_oDTnlFrxdEcErx0N7EjkAejp5dDVJJiREugnmlpKHOPLgVceWWIHriqeScp_Ug2Y7m0ugg_D9IDDBS-K5-92AtcWLbEr_v2FMXOoBdkJxBEizuWxRXQAJhCuB6Y0bcTvNbYqCXSRu1oZE3kPNFfuFpG37ucWuSq8jFw2w2IInNrKdQyR1sgbC9WVwmeHlJcJ7wlefazMXEJr5IWRVjNJwvFvS80SxiUNSAA1Peqn_XHzsxsEz5GHaW61qkSTAmqYACXE3_hq168Vh4w%3D%3D) Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute
---

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Peter,

I only reach out when it’s important, so hear me when I say: this is as important as it gets:

My friend Raja Krishnamoorthi is just 14 hours away from his midnight deadline -- and as of 10am, he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m rallying Democrats from coast to coast today to help Raja reach his critical goal, close this fundraising gap, and hand Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can I count on you before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Peter, let me explain:

Raja is working night and day to:

-- Defend healthcare access from Republican attacks
-- Protect our communities from gun violence
-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast
-- And so much more

Meanwhile, MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a MASSIVE tax increase on the middle class, and pushing baseless investigations against our Democrats.

Simply put, it’s never been more clear that Raja is exactly the kind of leader we need to keep in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

That’s why I’m proud to stand by Raja, Peter. But he still needs 600 gifts to reach his goal. Will you stand with Raja and rush in $14 before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Thank you, TedRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.

In 21st-century parenting, there is no way of avoiding social media. It's everywhere! Sarah Miller, digital marketing expert and
mom, joined the Moms for America Podcast to discuss how we can teach our kids to use social media in a safe and non-addictive way.
Sarah is also the Chief Concept Officer at TUVU, a faith-based social media platform, and has great tips for building authentic
relationships online. Like, share and subscribe.

Protecting Kids from Predators Online and in Your Communities

You've seen the headlines. You may even know families affected in your community. Unfortunately, grooming and predatory behavior
is all too common in-person and online. There is a lot that we can do today to protect our children before the threat arises.

In this week's blog, we're sharing the steps involved when a predator grooms a victim, the signs it might be happening, and how to
talk with your kids and prepare them without destroying their innocence. This information could make all the difference.

clean_body: This week is all about how to protect our kids online. It's hard to avoid social media, but how can we engage with it safely? Learn more. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] February 18, 2025 • Newsletter Social Media and Kids Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] In 21st-century parenting, there is no way of avoiding social media. It's everywhere! Sarah Miller, digital marketing expert and mom, joined the Moms for America Podcast to discuss how we can teach our kids to use social media in a safe and non-addictive way. Sarah is also the Chief Concept Officer at TUVU, a faith-based social media platform, and has great tips for building authentic relationships online. Like, share and subscribe. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] [] Protecting Kids from Predators Online and in Your Communities You've seen the headlines. You may even know families affected in your community. Unfortunately, grooming and predatory behavior is all too common in-person and online. There is a lot that we can do today to protect our children before the threat arises. In this week's blog, we're sharing the steps involved when a predator grooms a victim, the signs it might be happening, and how to talk with your kids and prepare them without destroying their innocence. This information could make all the difference. Read the Blog [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ttps://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBBQ2X9bkXLgOhh-7RE0Yzw] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans _will_ flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDBs5M1B9a8Y0-8wJfrZEwELPRFh99Fqz6hJ4PdGpvqC2ldAaekZPSztEJoexS73nMOagvpnAJAvlkjEi2mD2J7Lv1Jub5jlV0hJA7X7ipr11FJSM6924anNfpx7in9ofEjiMwBzoPOAHGvGzZchXtd_u_b5X4SUb6kdgZH6_6C0YL5AHEANSJ5imuaMx7V8PX8_KVy-CdeP8XoHagavFIbrFfQ6HIHEglMNXJ20gmx6b-1pvkLizGAkEumm8b5Pw85SODcoNzeHfGBYe9N9Rz_G1uWpi1ZP8JpLPytWQtKvA58NHj4SnQYiRCtlkYYDMWwzzir1IUn1-Pkp2-6KQCdUQadcJSa2EIFLws_B6Us34wMa0YRkssUYETwCa2LPSGuWuDGf_94FCLRpkdaFCpUHobEhMWCutmJy1oteD1xkw/4e4/H2hhvuk-QcKeOj1W6oqGfg/h0/h001.L7svczY-HvIFI_5X9pyM_XuuQlKTeOwFLygSlJFS8t8)

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans will flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. name: Youth Vote HQ (via NextGen America)
subject: Our voting rights are under attack
body:
Tell Congress: Stop the SAVE Act
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102329620/528830969/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg2NmQ1OS0wZmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sU2w6f7lZilkdbLea5oWlo5jvsMEUmZfZqVEmqBFZ_4=&emci=cae7f86c-0cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=37866d59-0fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6787172)
---
Here’s the situation, folks:
You already know that Trump is a threat to our democracy. Now Congressional Republicans are trying to push through legislation that would make it even harder for millions of people to vote.
The Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is the GOP’s latest attempt to curtail voting rights. The bill would require voters all over the country to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to vote.
**Here’s the issue with that:**
* More than **21 million** Americans don’t have access to either of those documents
* _**Anyone**_ who’s changed their name since birth (including millions of married women) won’t have their new names on their birth certificates
* **Roughly 49% of Americans don’t have a passport** , especially people in poorer states and rural areas

This bill is nothing more than an attempt to keep people from voting. _**And we’re not going to stand for it.**_
[It only takes a second: Add your name RIGHT NOW and tell your legislators to vote NO on the SAVE Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102329622/528830972/-64077668?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg2NmQ1OS0wZmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sU2w6f7lZilkdbLea5oWlo5jvsMEUmZfZqVEmqBFZ_4=&emci=cae7f86c-0cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=37866d59-0fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6787172)
| [Protect Voting Rights →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102329623/528830974/-1986391969?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg2NmQ1OS0wZmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sU2w6f7lZilkdbLea5oWlo5jvsMEUmZfZqVEmqBFZ_4=&emci=cae7f86c-0cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=37866d59-0fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6787172)
---
The MAGA game plan is simple: Spew toxic garbage and pass insane executive orders to keep us distracted from the real threats.
Republicans know their majority in Congress is slim, and in just a few weeks there’s a very real chance that control of the House will change due to special elections. When Kansas passed a similar law, **31,000 eligible American citizens were blocked from registering to vote.**
[We can’t let that happen on a national scale. So right now, before the bill goes to the floor of the House, tell Congress to vote NO on the SAVE Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102329624/528830976/742491386?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzg2NmQ1OS0wZmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sU2w6f7lZilkdbLea5oWlo5jvsMEUmZfZqVEmqBFZ_4=&emci=cae7f86c-0cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=37866d59-0fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6787172)

clean_body: Tell Congress: Stop the SAVE Act | Here’s the situation, folks: You already know that Trump is a threat to our democracy. Now Congressional Republicans are trying to push through legislation that would make it even harder for millions of people to vote. The Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act is the GOP’s latest attempt to curtail voting rights. The bill would require voters all over the country to provide either a passport or a birth certificate to vote. Here’s the issue with that: More than 21 million Americans don’t have access to either of those documents Anyone who’s changed their name since birth (including millions of married women) won’t have their new names on their birth certificates Roughly 49% of Americans don’t have a passport , especially people in poorer states and rural areas This bill is nothing more than an attempt to keep people from voting. And we’re not going to stand for it. | The MAGA game plan is simple: Spew toxic garbage and pass insane executive orders to keep us distracted from the real threats. Republicans know their majority in Congress is slim, and in just a few weeks there’s a very real chance that control of the House will change due to special elections. When Kansas passed a similar law, 31,000 eligible American citizens were blocked from registering to vote.** | Together, NextGen America | | = |

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: The truth about ICE arrests
body:
Paul Davis | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **__Paul Davis:_ ICE gives illegal immigrant criminals the boot_**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b947aa4a91&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
* * *
---
| "...anti-Trumpers urged illegal immigrants to forgo reporting to work, attending classes, and spending money, which they claim will point out dramatically just how vital illegal immigrants are to the American economy. The protest did not cause a ripple in the economy. And one should note that the illegal immigrants that ICE is deporting are hardly working honest jobs or attending classes. They are mostly hardened criminals who are preying on American citizens, just as they preyed on innocent victims in the counties they fled.

Who are the illegals getting the boot..."
---
| [Read More](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=610bdfcd1c&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read More")
---
|
---
|
## About Paul Davis:
---
| | [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4f00aeb2e&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
Paul Davis is a South Philadelphia writer and frequent contributor to _Broad + Liberty_. He is also a regular contributor to Counterterrorism magazine, and he writes the “On Crime” column for the _Washington Times_. He enlisted in the U.S. Navy when he was 17 and served two years aboard the aircraft carrier USS Kitty Hawk during the Vietnam War. He also served two years aboard a Navy harbor tugboat at the U.S. nuclear submarine base at Holy Loch, Scotland. He performed security work as a Defense Department civilian employee after serving in the Navy, and later became a full-time writer. His work has also appeared in the _Philadelphia Inquirer_ , the _Philadelphia Daily News_ , _Philadelphia Weekly_ , and other publications.

name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: Unions leading the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | As Donald Trump and Elon Musk attack our federal agencies, workers and unions are stepping up to fight back. They’re suing to uphold the law, block illegal firings, and defend our nonpartisan civil service. _Unions are leading the resistance - and more than ever, I believe every worker should have the right to organize a strong union to defend their rights._ **I’m Elizabeth Guzman: mom, social worker, and union leader running for Virginia State Delegate in a red-to-blue, nationally watched race.** **I’ll tell you more about me soon, but******[**if you’re ready to elect a union leader and defeat Trump in 2025, pitch in to my campaign here.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6NGpYwkrJt-z5pEUcrGXdeWRVC84WKUfiRajmBwkS-VN57u4eQ_DwPHQ8SEVbiUa0RBbUZkrBRbLXUU3ZLhVXk5mc8M1f6x7n9EbBLuKTJaQZwmVsC1UoQDW6rdaInA0dnHqaGRoFS9gpeD5rJN5uLAjNNPgFv9tpB-jUsEDBTlnLYccDGPn0YGzNU5OqIdjp_zt1jPzZUE-gqSuH7gktPc/4e4/o2xez00sQtC5TtmnqpNWdA/h0/h001.2QahU6ueubF3oOVJcQedwAs1lMr04csHUlAyxmM6Slc)**** In Peru, my father’s union bus driver job supported our family. I immigrated here as a single mother, working three minimum wage jobs at the same time to finish my education. I became a social worker, union leader, and Democratic lawmaker that passed a law allowing Virginia’s civil servants to unionize for the first time since Jim Crow. Trump and Musk face a crucial test this November, when Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates - the first general elections of this term. **We’re taking action NOW to defend America and flip red seats blue.** **[Stand in solidarity with workers and civil servants against billionaire-funded attack, and defeat Trump in 2025. Donate to my red-to-blue Delegate race today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviGMzxMP4ohWHcIzP9IGUdYuHJ5j9SCbuX374EUH50cBjrB_2kFbAQmZ4a89ZEQsNnqcSNbZjao-6-kstJSZXqL4XvPOOyRYzNH4BmFiI6yaX17yaK_kmQIwh7EdUJ2vzx3RmS0VWUSS_C82FKLSxdxjpvnT33hzHQVS-14Z6OgicCzhuN_ZwGIZeZi5t7U80zvjI1FJA8vgSRK648KE4-aw/4e4/o2xez00sQtC5TtmnqpNWdA/h1/h001.YEWNGVJoFAH0csnI2mxYCUg5b9EZxyBCvf1oD3kngBI)** Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3sDWiHXVnrD0CxMf5XeR3uYwuPnYUAZQURYaFwy8g5ApKIwZXDAGba-RljG5ImmPEMYfatoyboOfCPBhh8x-Ckrt4lkMqWtuaSmpisoXRzadFTTPCXz0PTaI6mNK1TNdha7hplVbq5P2lIesM3XkSUMb-N83_6b0TgBlbdmErRKiUmq30D2qRtdHxlimzAhd7wvNNPAoCkNhiYMrx16B-fsC0ujFPjWnVGK-WQL7yUHsNFU_HDbQdaiMf2pcam4n54GyjT0OL8D1fDCxr-R2NvfHeF4n7VXroU-c5ZUydSNGNOlFEeph8zHnPST0gjWAE/4e4/o2xez00sQtC5TtmnqpNWdA/h2/h001.qF1JW6_6lUFSBYVVphXr4PzlwAA33xOulFyf-AAJxrE)
