Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A-86k9LYpFPH3X4oKATuLnWYCbPAgJcU9dEcn1WjwrCoKChJil7x11NFOcsfsn9eOpoVQZ4Xe-mOTo3PEuFPIB-ZiYABlYJVYasuBPY7u61lri-ybTmqIbVmNFw0scgPJjWTHL5iTue4bKgq18jnWJGO0hNWplidxxsN20qiFf5NL7iY9PfQxERzS7WqCebK_4P0gHi9aLHk8fGw0Czc8DjYLtoFGWrC15fxnqEXjAjTA/4e4/o2xez00sQtC5TtmnqpNWdA/h3/h001.AOq0tjuCpnFWRqSiSgbLC26eTrVILhNnPH8RWm1wOxs) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. [Donate here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3sDWiHXVnrD0CxMf5XeR3uYwuPnYUAZQURYaFwy8g5ApqZUtA5Fzq-SDtX8sXTwPYdrDR5u_sxBm-6nwaOoHdR9frddCjIs-UK5NlmXIaFL0jN2ejrVgrLnq09vSZHlDgm0sIl4Bcchm5E5v1N7E9T_9CXZFyKkthBIVDI6A2996qf_-lUqE4GABuKrSJaCemRB_60dBtGJSA_hqH1nANc_f8pJTfZ7a2GPH59W7Ud8E3-QQFiq6M8nQggMrWP_pcvPaGMwfDwTXtd5cw6FJdAklKVWxytqcspczUCa8LIi3X4J7_7vwCs5k9qOCv2tSI/4e4/o2xez00sQtC5TtmnqpNWdA/h4/h001.mtxdZwjzfFGdI5ibtx6jk9f9oRuscGo6PN85KiVSSwE)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join the Movement to Protect Women’s Rights
body:
Making Women Female Again
| Friend, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. **_Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet!_**
However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front.
President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Friend. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. **Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights.** This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world.
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Your gift of $50, $100, or even more can empower us to continue our vital mission.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=94fbd18b01114f14a18933b9b5287fba&_e=pIWjU5t0bJgI6yj7RBxobNKOKl9PXaXcFooloJZ4vqU1YAuliJUivQdkFriCgSj07ushUTzzl7XsJDN1ZvYhGUdAt3AZLaXbkFH6BIfikzYIR70fBeBAB8fjZYZtTC0ZtWeP229jEY269Xh3y837x5p1OP6J2QTUXCFBCkUmabjp_W1SMElSh52QvtTXw4QJa9Pqb6t-P1H3gLTuGbV23bW-zHZgoyK_Hqht2abxjw06gYEtT2KeNZAf8HkkSiPChCh__GkaQGDPOxzB2BXgTFNhJZ89UYl8FMEPCzEEW3yvMNbXaf86x-2_iT9NFwkob0QYfVGA5ncVrOE72OzxJym7BoMaVG9xhQdXFOqxj4f4TeIYqKm0PR7QkH3RsZfcTRLvfaxk8XrEPPZxLDGLOw%3D%3D) Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute

clean_body: Making Women Female Again | Friend, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet! However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front. President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Friend. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights. This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world. Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country. Your support is essential in this fight. Contributions help us fund initiatives, organize events, and promote awareness about the challenges women face today. Together, you and I can amplify our message and reach more people than ever before. Don’t miss the chance to be part of this vital movement. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000 -

You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Early voting was an unqualified success again in 2024. Michael McDonald, a professor of political science at the University of Florida who helps run the school's election lab, told reporters that early voting exploded during the 2020 election, and its effectiveness since then has reshaped the way that voters and campaigns navigate elections.
" People find it easier to navigate and return the ballot at their convenience and it gives them more chances. They're more likely to cast a ballot with those options ," he said.
Team: We're looking to hear from our supporters about this way to participation in our elections. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Are you in favor of expanding early voting availability nationwide?

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

* * *

| | | The savage attack on October 7th and the ongoing war have left countless families in Israel devastated. Entire communities have been displaced. Lives have been shattered. **Homes have been destroyed.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002ddtryhq9ltolghgt4yws4hkw1mychp9liw364z64n0cbn6257nsot398cquw04qq2vdxti6su6byz4r4crhpyd1c&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
These families—**October 7th Survivors** —are enduring unthinkable hardship. From the brutality of the attacks in the south to the terror of missiles and bloodshed in the north, they have faced horrors that no one should ever experience. Many fled with only the clothes on their backs, and some have no home to return to. At the **International Christian Embassy Jerusalem (ICEJ),** we refuse to let these precious families suffer alone. God has called us to stand in the gap, bringing hope and aid to those who need it most.
We are providing:
| | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002dekptdmhpyo2knqjibg1wre49c5w8ypr4pfxdk5mc9a9p8wrxtr6fnfi4eyc1ocxszydmpfb4dgz093qdclkuk5t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
---
**Safe housing** for displaced families
| [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002dgrnoz7sddn61clqaf3yllxau5apxhsgo7w1r94t5uxfrn2blzq15wqvv6ci2x2egdtj2hsjdolzppdaf24vr59e&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
---
**Food and clothing** for urgent needs
| | [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002dhi97v425im956vhsip8rvr8cx76l4w9w1mt2w3zwdvptpx0pfohtel6jwh23fr08hp2hp46pk4zcurkgp94nopb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
---
**Trauma counseling** to heal broken hearts and minds
| [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002djp72r0zw19o8y4o8lyfh38el0c0opzadh0ibh2g00sjvs3mdlnbg1vgnkl851d7yl88zgdr0v9a3z48hapb7vt4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
---
**Bomb shelter** to ensure their protection
| | | The path to recovery is long, and the greatest challenge for many families still lies ahead. Can you imagine trying to rebuild after being without a home for over a year? Having no steady income, no direction, and no peace? But you can bring hope into their lives. [Your best gift today is a lifeline to October 7th Survivors](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002dkg4jmj8k68ro1af12irmz2p7s8fbyd3ladop620r9qtxuxx65mw6m4tcp3q6m3r133qsoqzz4qasdeuilum3cxx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h),**helping to meet their urgent needs and restore hope for their future.**
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002e0n2e6fgon7urt99f660c6hjrhdz2hgv7ute0t16guo1zx3hwn9quub54d7w7uryr6kw8g1i9bvafisekmygljbi&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)
[Every dollar you give](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002e1e0z2crcs6xuifcx9ry5cbtanmss4jkro87ze0p9d9xbzy5kt88gd9ev5nc8cdffmfc1nb4imab7152lxdri4ff&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h) provides critical aid and supports lifesaving programs for these families during their darkest hour. Together, we can remind them they are not alone and that God’s love surrounds them. Please do not wait—time is critical, and the need is urgent.
[Donate Now »](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=nj7fp644ntluybfi56nh0myipq4w2002e38ktkz14x5ayoq7pob7xmv1icf9fq1pz5kzn2lvb075dc4soz736lgrjvri9l417qahffopuhfbw5fp0ii0enjc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srw00l&__onlt=h)

body:

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgo246jnngrnoo64mhteicsamdlv9bund9t3598_rp22sh2s8i6epj4sji62oj4chh2bs)

_**“We will never back down.”**_
Pete Hegseth just sent the strongest message to the Deep State yet.

Pete Hegseth has been target **NUMBER ONE** of the Radical Left — they are hell-bent on destroying President Trump’s administration and our way of life.

Since the second that President Trump announced Pete Hegseth would be the Secretary of Defense the Warmongers in Washington have been in panic!
They are terrified that Pete will expose their corruption and end their **WOKE** ways.

It was just exposed that the Deep State Bureaucrats in Washington along with Democrats devised a plan that was meant to **DERAIL** and **DESTROY** Pete’s nomination.

Peter, Elon Musk recently weighed in on the race that will decide control of the Wisconsin Supreme Court. Musk took time away from his furious attempts to dismantle the federal government to throw his support behind conservative candidate Brad Schimel while spouting outlandish claims of voter fraud. The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — Musk’s endorsement of her opponent, and his reliance on anti-democratic claims of voter fraud, only reinforce that decision. Here’s why this development is concerning: **There’s already so much money pouring into this race — now, the richest man in the world is getting involved to try to secure a majority for conservatives on Wisconsin’s highest court. ** The work we do together over the next 46 days just got so much more important. The stakes of this race are sky-high, but we know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs.
_The New York Times_ is predicting this year’s race will be “a pitched political battle” — one that “is likely to be even more partisan, negative and expensive than the 2023 election, whose $56 million price tag shattered national spending records for a judicial contest.”
**With a billionaire like Musk wading into races like this one, we can’t risk getting blown out of the water in spending. We’re counting on every member of this grassroots team to step up if you can. **

The NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in this race — Musk’s endorsement of her opponent, and his reliance on anti-democratic claims of voter fraud, only reinforce that decision. Here’s why this development is concerning: There’s already so much money pouring into this race — now, the richest man in the world is getting involved to try to secure a majority for conservatives on Wisconsin’s highest court. The work we do together over the next 46 days just got so much more important. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The stakes of this race are sky-high, but we know how to win in the Badger State. In 2023, our grassroots movement helped deliver a resounding win for democracy in Wisconsin’s state supreme court race. Voters elected now-Justice Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin, making it clear that they’ve had enough of conservatives’ anti-democratic power grabs. The New York Times is predicting this year’s race will be “a pitched political battle” — one that “is likely to be even more partisan, negative and expensive than the 2023 election, whose $56 million price tag shattered national spending records for a judicial contest.” With a billionaire like Musk wading into races like this one, we can’t risk getting blown out of the water in spending. We’re counting on every member of this grassroots team to step up if you can. = More soon — thank you, —The NDRC team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

**Friend, this is urgent: Donald Trump has plans to _dismantle_ the Department of Education – a move that would be catastrophic for students, teachers and families across the country.**
The Department of Education is responsible for distributing federal student aid, managing Pell Grants and overseeing key college loan programs that make education accessible to millions. If Trump gets his way, it will be our students – especially those from low-income families – who suffer the most.
Education should _never_ be a political pawn – and we are not about to stand by while this reckless plan unfolds. But if we're going to fight back, we need you with us.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: 🚨URGENT: Prayer and Help for the Middle East 🙏🏽
body:
I'm off to minister to refugees in Iraq!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bf3d3930141b4518952fb55e222a7bef&_e=nUwdjK3Thsw5ya_PjuH_KD600_NBQvKuAPMSYjIi384NjlhOF8bO6r62xKrO2dbIOV1u9cblw1ZGfl01qndXT3hw93DcKnaX7wlnKd7C9u7C7zQJF3mkNUrPXG9NpDlHckHZ1wGxlYtnJ9xIqUMDl6y4oqYj6JAxVBqoumgk7upfvQpmZ9KrMWNQZ4bXxsUZjNotiPZMSV08d5vh0CfVAaeG32bJ6k7Pa4CLvrRpOIengCticG6ksLjshfk3DFGHzh-QTH5wUJiXmDqTGOX142ENduPkYQNDoiTNmK79zZkZ7-OpxP8mXBlPuC766Ci9)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I am **headed to Iraq** to continue what has been a **15-year long ministry** in the Middle East! As I depart, I have **two requests:** _**First** , **could you please pray for me?**_ Over the next week, God has opened incredible doors of favor in the Middle East, and I am truly blown away. _**Second** , **I ask for your financial support**_ —right now, we have a team of doctors, nurses, and medical professionals—including my mom—who have been on the ground for the past week, **ministering to** **Syrian refugees and those fleeing war**.
---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bf3d3930141b4518952fb55e222a7bef&_e=nUwdjK3Thsw5ya_PjuH_KD600_NBQvKuAPMSYjIi384NjlhOF8bO6r62xKrO2dbIOV1u9cblw1ZGfl01qndXT3hw93DcKnaX7wlnKd7C9u7C7zQJF3mkNUrPXG9NpDlHckHZ1wGxlYtnJ9xIqUMDl6y4oqYj6JAxVBqoumgk7uqIEBGa2R8mVuyKhFgwdDlcCqACLUqn0afBbJZy65Wx5gZvqxjFZPOrfGqsuW-wvdQIzu5JD3E1NBpAr-tjgqgGKk9YMSUL96bC76v26SzxMJDFR5ejHhm40pnbvE9XF-iDBGzaLoBtkEOdgZ_IJy-U)
---
| | _In the next**24 to 48 hours** , I would love to raise **$10,000** to bless the refugees and support upcoming outreaches_. We want to be the **hands and feet of Jesus** , providing **medical supplies, heaters, winter clothing, blankets, food, water,** and other essentials that we often take for granted. Many of these people have literally fled war with nothing but the clothes on their backs. **Stories are already pouring in** of how God is **moving in powerful ways** , and I can’t wait to join them on the ground!
---
[**DONATE TO THE REFUGEE BLESSING EFFORT >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bf3d3930141b4518952fb55e222a7bef&_e=nUwdjK3Thsw5ya_PjuH_KD600_NBQvKuAPMSYjIi384NjlhOF8bO6r62xKrO2dbIOV1u9cblw1ZGfl01qndXT3hw93DcKnaX7wlnKd7C9u7C7zQJF3mkNUrPXG9NpDlHckHZ1wGxlYtnJ9xIqUMDl6y4oqYj6JAxVBqoumgk7upT3x4WfatYc4WDHYdYeQ4ihyPfsQuICrHHmkb7ygkgOauhlhnr8ZWlVBnS3xus45PV7JE_YV9d8SpPzjlsnZEgAWztkXFVyAiuB8X8WB_ZuWG9MsEb8eS9jLiWrLM7djeaFi75LjiV53bnxZ2qrhw9)
---
Till all hear,
---
---
Sean
---
| |
---
| | **INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=bf3d3930141b4518952fb55e222a7bef&_e=nUwdjK3Thsw5ya_PjuH_KO5hwae9PdHq_wbfBLkeV-OwsdbJBoNQ8FuKuQF9SB_IZBticqeHcRXYib3hfPs-SzN4TLE3sMD3ZVSHOYedAAWYIMNOdmZ8LNcH-mBuWnUQgR58PRJa0oQ1b03FqEQ066sxNgrE8JYakdaxwX3dsuUlDNYn5VtPxfwPbguwSPyxn9paVt9Slzgcf7EDkZnIX-6JjkfgLYwZ0schecJF4SCk6cY_wJJXf5kWDPlKnEdfXj0wGckwhaQNDRsxOezl5EytW54Ql2GClmjesvBp5vuTw3hmG9GzJN11i5OsPNWN)** **Donate by Check or Money Order** Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 _Contributions are tax-deductible._

name: White House Poll Alert
subject: Karoline Leavitt Approval Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC) American Political Action Committee (AmeriPAC)
body:
Do you approve?

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/4SDtM36_JMj4I96W0jZsA9c2iP4GcyqUDD4YyA0k5kS7RHQnNvfU8_KuApnLGs4OKLCADaMH8oi5h5b2BX-_S5EXcW22W2rWpl_FCnGWhYI834t4S8ZkFM6a7CIc0ItWxLbYCI6IXcv6rhNbP09CYuVz3Oc8-z3ZGOvaFT7B10NZnzO55SfZ07CPOVBYCb2FykleS-DgtDhJlTj6rcvVSPj3bd5bWoIhfDax4AHS-9N35gVsieTzTKaPZXhqg-yLgvUyPojTHlijuuuOP_732hOJGgndENpf3xMydweGDXEBnTg7UY1Z5ADgjeTkkRm25nlDvp04CnOjhH8ioWruBjkIqMNwANCbGYeeQ-HVe-Vn_a8uQsxayaahAUdKDkuXgBaiNiqgLZY-YFp1aRqbBGjgL2e3fxyT4xv8PyvuQRLJZDwWJVLcAX6ybuhlEKC5xzEeI0PYOTkbsXIjcdoBf_dHVMQwtY8Nl9rQxUD2Pcaab_v3iXaMU2jzDnbJHCVpu-8FwxKmjEedg3YnnzE_Qw/xnp1eeH6o67jf57KS_RPJ9mDPKdvxuE4/6)
Friend,

_Have you watched any of President Trump 's White House press conferences?_

body:

**Louder than 5G.**
**Stronger than the signal.** Forget 5G towers.
This message covers the whole nation.
And it’s loud and clear: **Trump 2025 – Can You Hear Us Now?**

[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20352/6374453/5d9f680a251667a8a67158a0dac03ed646699ace/070791e1455752111efbd86336c5ac1bc62dcd3e)
---
We’re giving away **250 of these hilarious "Better Coverage Than 5G" Trump t-shirts for FREE.**
Yep, totally free.
All you need to do is cover shipping, and we’ll send one your way. This tee isn’t just funny—it’s bold.
It’s for patriots who aren’t afraid to stand tall, speak up, and make a statement.

**You’ll be heard.** But don’t wait too long.
Only **250 shirts** are up for grabs.
Once they’re gone, they’re gone.
So grab yours now and show that Trump’s message has better coverage than ever before!
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20352/6374453/5d9f680a251667a8a67158a0dac03ed646699ace/070791e1455752111efbd86336c5ac1bc62dcd3e)

**P.S.** Want to be louder than 5G?
Wear the shirt.
Make the statement.
And let everyone know—you can hear us now.

name: Sarah Kline
subject: Re: Urgent: Protect Voting Rights – Take Action Today

| | | Dear Peter, You may have missed Britney's last email. We need your help to stop the “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act, which would be one of the most restrictive voter ID requirements we've ever seen. [**It only takes a second to stop voter suppression!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337452/528852505/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

[**Take action**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337458/528852510/-202412641?contactdata=8rXqW217fi4oX/GRjVNX8USZQqKhjplayC2xaqU0ZZsUwG5qewJ6yfyCIMeyxsX+Ay7RrBWiV1eInoA/H5G24hI7n4V5SAWKheYOMqHjitR+Y6YaFSsQv+B709hSFj+l&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

The SAVE Act would create unnecessary barriers to voting, simply based on unfounded claims of voter fraud. This bill would suppress and silence millions of voters, by requiring every citizen to provide a passport or birth certificate in person to register or update their voter information. Don't be fooled, the SAVE Act is an unprecedented assault on voting rights. Our democracy only works when everyone has equal access to the ballot box. We can't let the SAVE Act pass. Now's the time to stand up for our access to the ballots. [**Will you take a few minutes and email your Member of Congress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337464/528852517/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)
---
[**Tell Congress to vote NO!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337468/528852521/-202412641?contactdata=8rXqW217fi4oX/GRjVNX8USZQqKhjplayC2xaqU0ZZsUwG5qewJ6yfyCIMeyxsX+Ay7RrBWiV1eInoA/H5G24hI7n4V5SAWKheYOMqHjitR+Y6YaFSsQv+B709hSFj+l&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

Hi Peter, We need your help to stop the harmful “Safeguard American Voter Eligibility” (SAVE) Act, a dangerous piece of legislation designed to make it harder for millions of eligible Americans to register and vote. This bill would enact the most restrictive voter ID requirement this country has ever seen, by requiring strict proof of citizenship, such as a passport or birth certificate, to register or update voter registration. [**Do you have a second to stop voter suppression?**
](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337476/528852532/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230) Requiring every citizen to provide a passport or birth certificate in person to register or update their voter information would impact all of us. It would especially impact working-class Americans, older voters, women who’ve changed their last name, and those who’ve lost essential documents due to natural disasters. Additionally, SAVE Act presents another barrier for low-income voters and voters from marginalized communities to participate in our elections. ** ** We need your support to stop this attempt at voter suppression. [**Email your Member of Congress today and tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337481/528852535/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

[**Tell Congress to vote NO!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337485/528852539/-202412641?contactdata=8rXqW217fi4oX/GRjVNX8USZQqKhjplayC2xaqU0ZZsUwG5qewJ6yfyCIMeyxsX+Ay7RrBWiV1eInoA/H5G24hI7n4V5SAWKheYOMqHjitR+Y6YaFSsQv+B709hSFj+l&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

| | The SAVE Act isn’t about protecting elections, it’s about creating unnecessary barriers that silence voters and weaken our democracy. Despite claims to the contrary, there is no evidence of widespread voter fraud. It’s already illegal for non-citizens to cast a ballot in federal elections, and states have secure systems in place to prevent noncitizens from voting. During this unprecedented assault on voting rights, we can’t allow bad actors to subvert our democracy, limit access to the ballot, and undermine faith in our elections.

Our democracy is strongest when everyone has equal access to the ballot box. By speaking up, you can help ensure voting rights are protected for all. [**Will you take a few minutes and email your Member of Congress today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102337487/528852543/-202412641?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMmRlOWQwLTE5ZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CRqOFkoCp-GYp03DJiQkBzeYDBCH3V_4QHMG0wPS-q0=&emci=8e44d1f9-8eed-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e22de9d0-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=2107230)

name: APL
subject: I will never lie to you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | **MESSAGE FROM:** **ANNA PAULINA LUNA**
---
[](https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=fls&utm_campaign=20250207_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&=&xuno=414d30303832&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02002901;_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)
Peter, I will never lie to you.
Washington is run by corrupt politicians who sell out America while hardworking patriots like you get left behind. **_They don’t care about you. But I do._**
I grew up in poverty, surrounded by crime, gangs, and violence. I wasn’t supposed to make it out. But I refused to be a victim.
I joined the United States Air Force and became the fighter I am today—the woman who will never back down, never sell out, and never stop fighting for YOU.
That’s why the DC Swamp is coming after me and veterans like Pete Hegseth.
They hate that I don’t play their games. They hate that I expose their corruption. **And they will do whatever it takes to destroy me.**
I’m fighting like hell to keep the House RED and stop the radical Left from destroying America. But I can’t do this alone.
**__The Swamp is dumping millions to take me out.____**
I need every patriot who cares about this country to step up right now and join me in this fight.
If we don’t hold the line, we lose everything.
_If you’re struggling to make ends meet right now, please just disregard the request and go about your day and know I’m fighting for you._
_**_[But if you’re not, I hope you’ll consider sparing a few dollars to stand with me today>>](https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=fls&utm_campaign=20250207_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&=&xuno=414d30303832&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02002901;_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)_**_
I’m not backing down. Will you stand with me?
_**[Please, please rush your support NOW before it’s too late>> ](https://secure.winred.com/annapaulinaluna/apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls?utm_medium=emailrental&utm_source=fls&utm_campaign=20250207_apl_apl-prsp-email-nolie-fls&utm_content=donate&amount=20.25&recurring=true&=&xuno=414d30303832&utm_term=aegean&xunv=aegean&xutm=02002901;_nlid=test123&_nhids=%recipient.hids%)**_

Thank you & God bless,

Anna Paulina Luna Congresswoman (FL-13)
U.S. Air Force Veteran

|
---

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: the GOP wants enormous tax handouts for Elon, Trump, their billionaire donors
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102339301/528858127/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBkMDUxMC0xY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAmCyTXcZPOlCeWD8lf5Udgc9DIuiBoQLxO_FGrUWzU=&emci=da0d0510-1cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=ee0d0510-1cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=13185894) Derek,

House Republicans just released their fiscally reckless budget plan, and it’s a disaster for the American people:

**They’re proposing raising the debt ceiling by $4.5 trillion so they can afford enormous tax handouts for Elon Musk, Trump, their billionaire donors, and wealthy CEOs and their large corporations._Trillion. With a T._**

_It would add $3 trillion to the deficit over the next decade, saddling all of us with more debt._

They’re calling to cut education by $330 billion. They’re calling for $2 trillion in cuts to health care—like Medicare.

Derek, this budget is fiscally reckless and a massive giveaway to billionaires and corporations, and they’re using the American people as a bargaining chip while they take our economy to the brink.

**I want to be very clear: hard-working Americans need tax cuts, not robber barons.**

House Republicans just reaffirmed their priorities, but let me tell you mine. I'll have no hand in slashing hard-earned benefits. And I won’t stand by as Republicans blow up the deficit, saddle us with debt, and make life more expensive for Americans just to give tax handouts to huge corporations and the richest few to ever walk Planet Earth. **[I’m proud to go to work every day for the people of PA-17, not corporations or robber barons. If you can, help me continue the fight for Western PA with a donation today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102339302/528858155/1407896248?refcode=email_021825_gopbudget&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBkMDUxMC0xY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAmCyTXcZPOlCeWD8lf5Udgc9DIuiBoQLxO_FGrUWzU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102339303/528858156/1407896248?refcode=email_021825_gopbudget&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTBkMDUxMC0xY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAmCyTXcZPOlCeWD8lf5Udgc9DIuiBoQLxO_FGrUWzU=)

clean_body: Derek, House Republicans just released their fiscally reckless budget plan, and it’s a disaster for the American people: They’re proposing raising the debt ceiling by $4.5 trillion so they can afford enormous tax handouts for Elon Musk, Trump, their billionaire donors, and wealthy CEOs and their large corporations.Trillion. With a T. It would add $3 trillion to the deficit over the next decade, saddling all of us with more debt. They’re calling to cut education by $330 billion. They’re calling for $2 trillion in cuts to health care—like Medicare. Derek, this budget is fiscally reckless and a massive giveaway to billionaires and corporations, and they’re using the American people as a bargaining chip while they take our economy to the brink. I want to be very clear: hard-working Americans need tax cuts, not robber barons. House Republicans just reaffirmed their priorities, but let me tell you mine. I'll have no hand in slashing hard-earned benefits. __ Under Trump, our current political climate has become increasingly hostile to people with disabilities. His administration has intensified its assault on Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies, even targeting people with disabilities. Trump’s Department of Education just canceled grant programs for students pursuing careers in special education. **We need your support to push back against these regressive measures and ensure that individuals with disabilities have a seat at the table where decisions are made.** [**We work tirelessly year-round to elect leaders who understand the unique challenges we face and are committed to fighting for our inclusion and rights. name: Gay Valimont
subject: Unpaid Insurance Claims Leave Florida Families in Crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friends, I'm Gay Valimont, a candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District. **In the wake of Hurricanes Helene and Milton, my community has faced unprecedented challenges.** Homes have been destroyed, lives uprooted, and the path to recovery has been arduous. **Disturbingly, nearly half of residential insurance claims remain unpaid, leaving countless families in financial limbo.** **Without**** _YOUR_ ****help, many of these families within my district and across our nation will face inadequate coverage for their homes, and the federal government’s rollbacks are _NOT helping._**
---
---
**Recent reports reveal that out of 264,763 residential property damage claims filed after Hurricane Milton, 104,789 have been closed without payment.** **Similarly, Hurricane Helene saw 13,895 claims closed without compensation.** This means that thousands of our neighbors, who diligently paid their insurance premiums, are now left without the support they were promised in their time of greatest need. _**One major cause of these delays is the confusion between federal relief and private insurance coverage**_. Too often, families desperate for assistance are caught in _bureaucratic red tape_ —waiting for flood payments that aren’t properly tracked by the state or struggling to navigate a system where insurers and government agencies pass responsibility back and forth. **This is unacceptable.** People shouldn’t need a law degree just to rebuild their homes. As your representative, I will fight to hold insurance companies accountable and push for federal-state coordination that ensures relief reaches families when they need it most. **Timely, transparent, and fair claim processing shouldn’t be the exception—it should be the rule. **
---
**[Wanting to roll back on the Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA), is already on Trump’s agenda, and our families cannot afford it. Help me fight back with a $9 donation today!!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102343108/528868953/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjYxM2JmNjUtMjJlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hOHZ9AsAl-r8-ualATo75fv7GjPdssLgc42OnoqsGMM=)**

name: Care in Action
subject: Take action to support care workers over billionaires
body:
Health care for millions is on the line.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343738/528870965/664783965?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)
Peter,
Right now, the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress want to take resources away from care workers and families in order to give tax breaks to billionaires. These tax cuts would **put health care coverage for millions at risk.**
Those at risk include children, people with disabilities, low-income families, and caregivers in our community. **Organizations like ours are rallying members to take action this week to stop tax breaks for billionaires and protect families.**
This is exactly the moment to raise your voice – lawmakers must hear from us during this recess while they're out listening to their constituents.
**[**_Contact your representatives and tell them that we refuse to let billionaires and corporations pay less in taxes than working families >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343739/528870968/1239597195?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)**
**_******__[Contact your representatives >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343741/528870971/1239597195?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)__******_**
**Here’s what’s at stake:**
**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343743/528870975/1239597195?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)**
We already saw just how far Trump and his billionaire friends are willing to go. In January, Medicaid portals went offline in all 50 states during a 24-hour funding freeze, causing widespread chaos and concern.
**Trump and the Republicans want us to forget** how important Medicaid and other federal safety net programs are so they can keep funding their tax cuts.
_Why should our health have to suffer so their bank accounts grow even more?_
**_**[**_Can you take a stand today by emailing your representatives? This week, they’ll be in their districts so this is the best time to make your voice heard._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343745/528870978/1239597195?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)**_**
**_**********__[Contact your representatives >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102343748/528870981/1239597195?ms=021825_taxbreaks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGQzM2MzZi0yM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StcdkeVf-NysKlRtztaiRmdVy7J0ch-O7vHRLMrED0Q=&emci=f8852942-07ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e0d33c3f-23ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=864787)__**********_**

Care in Action

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: NEW: Elon Musk buys ads in Wisconsin Supreme Court race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Why is the richest man in the world getting involved in a state supreme court race?
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250218-1-240&t=1&akid=5487%2E196590%2Ea0FWGh)
Friend, we’re just weeks away from an all-important election in Wisconsin, **and we just learned that Elon Musk is stepping in to support the far-right candidate.**
[**Please, rush a donation between The Long Run and Judge Susan Crawford and help us protect our pro-democracy majority on the Wisconsin Supreme Court >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250218-1-240&t=2&akid=5487%2E196590%2Ea0FWGh)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&amount=5&refcode=em250218-1-240&t=3&akid=5487%2E196590%2Ea0FWGh)
You may be wondering: Why is the richest man in the world getting involved in a state supreme court race?
**Because Elon Musk and the MAGA right understand the huge stakes here.**
If the GOP’s hand-picked candidate wins this race, the Wisconsin Supreme Court will fall into the hands of a right-wing, extremist majority.
If that happens, they could strike down our new fair maps, reinstate the ban on collective bargaining for workers, hand down new restrictions of abortion access, and completely wind back the clock on the important progress we’ve made in the last few years.
Plus, with the GOP’s increasingly anti-democratic, authoritarian rhetoric and policies, a loss here could mean locking Democrats out of electoral victory in Wisconsin for a long time.
[**So, with this election coming up at the start of April, we have to move quickly to counter Elon Musk’s money and reach more voters with a grassroots message. Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help us WIN?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-wi-sc-25.Q_KG1S&refcode=em250218-1-240&t=4&akid=5487%2E196590%2Ea0FWGh)

Americans are being hung out to dry by Donald Trump's reckless actions. | | | You know me, friends, I’ll be the first to say we need to cut waste and streamline government, but what Trump and Elon are doing is flat-out wrong. **Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s "burn down the house" approach is hurting families and making all of us less safe.** No one elected Elon. He is unvetted and out of control, hijacking our federal government. Elon and his team have installed private servers to rummage around Americans' private sensitive data. While Trump and Elon cause chaos, extremist Republicans are using the cover to push for trillions of dollars in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy — and leave the rest of us with the bill. _I’ll work with anyone_ to help families get ahead, but it is clear **Americans are being hung out to dry by Donald Trump's reckless actions.** **_[I'm standing up to fight back and I need you with me. clean_body: Americans are being hung out to dry by Donald Trump's reckless actions. | | | You know me, friends, I’ll be the first to say we need to cut waste and streamline government, but what Trump and Elon are doing is flat-out wrong. Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s "burn down the house" approach is hurting families and making all of us less safe. No one elected Elon. He is unvetted and out of control, hijacking our federal government. Elon and his team have installed private servers to rummage around Americans' private sensitive data. While Trump and Elon cause chaos, extremist Republicans are using the cover to push for trillions of dollars in tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy — and leave the rest of us with the bill. I’ll work with anyone to help families get ahead, but it is clear Americans are being hung out to dry by Donald Trump's reckless actions. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | ¡La lucha sigue! body:
It could be over before it even starts.

| |

| | | I'm running out of time.

The media labeled my district a serious **battleground** race, naming _**ME**_ one of America's most vulnerable Republicans right now.

The Democrats have unleashed a fundraising juggernaut in Montana before, and now, they just dumped $50 MILLION into House races across America to destroy conservatives. _**[My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/bFkYa2PjAlYxQ0oq8a7jewQZB6gQfRFiQj1eEUDBmaIGbtbpP1WFUANHOgFV0W2py6QV6SqwP5eOIlXaVoAF-Tzplju9UYsh66RpTaLt4sb2olYYHRxpLPHheHKBhst8dusKsPu1LQQB8uU8wwejzSe4GvyTQwVfMPPs_G4oZ3RbI_bvYdYHuHlhEm4KoO12Xx5JNi-uLBBZbxg379fxINuLZVLoc2d4OFiSq162TMqJH0u-nhXxtJyg_gysKxxLG1hph1e-Ky6kjrQHkV1U1HVO9PzuxkbKwYD_q7VBMndJQN4TwSLpUPAQADSj49iHrcERDPUxmCgNB4fc3SdlKIA98I2ps2Q6P41gJ1DdBIVkyOGLbNSzuPgti2MhNLOPFiOMJh8yqVPqoIQJX2kuzSVmdvIEwGPSn6AjLq1vhATBUhvDe9PgV2E6yu23wSItbMEdNnix5IZGmw9PlxVeTpX-iTYRwoHzHl26IjRNtBNmQClm87zDvf4onhayGGwIVWJ7-ss4yhF2Ah48iGCQlDbetkH8GvGqGYra5brG7UaqdFpaBp0/bH43_uGWUNy37aKd34NSdWQF6GfZljrX/6 "My campaign could be over before it even starts, and our conservative reforms could be dead in the water if I don't raise the necessary funds in the next 48 hours.")**_

As a Navy SEAL and Cabinet member for President Trump, I've fought for this nation my entire life. But I've never faced a challenge like this. **Democrats are on the warpath to get revenge after their embarrassing loss last year, and liberal elites are willing to open their checkbooks to make it happen. **

I only have 48 hours to do a complete 180 and keep up with their war chest. That's why I'm turning to you. I need your help to blow my fundraising goal out of the water and stop the Democrats' plan to destroy our nation and our values.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Humbly asking you: Don’t skip this email
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics.
#
Peter:
VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics.
If someone signed on to serve — no matter when, no matter the branch, no matter the ribbons on their chest, no matter who they voted for — it’s our fundamental belief that our country has a moral, ethical, and legally binding duty to care for them.
As you read this, that obligation is being abandoned.
Over the last week we’ve heard story after story of Veterans kicked to the curb by the Trump administration and the richest man on earth. Disabled Veterans fired from VA hospitals. VA staff, employed for years, terminated because they switched jobs. Veterans who served in uniform, employed by the Department of Education or USDA or Forest Service or National Parks — thousands of them fired.
These aren’t parasites. They are your friends, neighbors, and family.
They even fired folks working the Veterans Crisis Line. Remember when everybody cared that 22 Veterans took their lives every day? Trump and Elon just fired some of the people tasked with answering the phone.
There’s no time to waste. Lives are on the line. Each of us has to decide if we’re going to fight for everything we’ve worked for or let Trump and Elon take it all away.
VoteVets is going to be on the front line of that fight. We might not be able to stop every single thing they try to do, but we sure as hell are going to make them regret it.
If that sounds good to you, please:
[**Make a donation to VoteVets and help us keep going. We depend on contributions from supporters like you to power our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb25.EILYhu&refcode=em250218-1-f&t=1&akid=34182%2E3013755%2Ed1_Jnj)

clean_body: VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics. Peter: VoteVets, first and foremost, is an organization aimed at supporting Veterans. At the end of the day we are focused on improving outcomes and care for all Veterans, regardless of their politics. If someone signed on to serve — no matter when, no matter the branch, no matter the ribbons on their chest, no matter who they voted for — it’s our fundamental belief that our country has a moral, ethical, and legally binding duty to care for them. As you read this, that obligation is being abandoned. Over the last week we’ve heard story after story of Veterans kicked to the curb by the Trump administration and the richest man on earth. Disabled Veterans fired from VA hospitals. VA staff, employed for years, terminated because they switched jobs. Veterans who served in uniform, employed by the Department of Education or USDA or Forest Service or National Parks — thousands of them fired. These aren’t parasites. They are your friends, neighbors, and family. They even fired folks working the Veterans Crisis Line. Remember when everybody cared that 22 Veterans took their lives every day? Trump and Elon just fired some of the people tasked with answering the phone. There’s no time to waste. Lives are on the line. Each of us has to decide if we’re going to fight for everything we’ve worked for or let Trump and Elon take it all away. VoteVets is going to be on the front line of that fight. We might not be able to stop every single thing they try to do, but we sure as hell are going to make them regret it. If that sounds good to you, please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you. body:
Elon Musk is exercising unprecedented amounts of power and he needs to be stopped.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250218&t=1&akid=1647%2E1088799%2EON8L94)
Elon Musk is exercising unprecedented amounts of power and he needs to be stopped. **This is why I’ve joined a coalition of 14 attorneys general to sue the Trump Administration—again:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-1647&refcode2=1647_1088799_ON8L94&akid=1647%2E1088799%2EON8L94)

Elon is wielding an enormous amount of illegitimized, unconstitutional power over sensitive systems and government programs, ransacking federal agencies, creating chaos, and spreading distrust among the American people. His position was made up by Trump, bypassing Constitutional requirements.

Rob

Hey Peter, While Trump and Elon are throwing our country into chaos, Congressional Republicans are pushing their dangerous agenda. They’re carving up life-saving programs — from food assistance programs, social security, medicaid, and more — to make the ultra wealthy even richer at our expense. This is not normal and it is not okay. They want to confuse and frustrate us because they know if we come together and take action to reclaim our government, we will win. It is not an easy fight. We’re up against villains who have spent money over decades to rig the system in their favor but as much as they try, America is not an oligarchy. But it might become one if we do not stand up. That's why we are hosting neighborhood meetings across Pennsylvania, to speak out against the power grab. We’re also putting a spotlight on GOP Congressman Scott Perry, demanding he doesn’t cut his constituents' healthcare. America is still a democracy and it’s formed by our every action and inaction. _**[We’re fighting to take back what’s ours because Pennsylvania families are depending on it. clean_body: | = Hey Peter, While Trump and Elon are throwing our country into chaos, Congressional Republicans are pushing their dangerous agenda. They’re carving up life-saving programs — from food assistance programs, social security, medicaid, and more — to make the ultra wealthy even richer at our expense. This is not normal and it is not okay. They want to confuse and frustrate us because they know if we come together and take action to reclaim our government, we will win. It is not an easy fight. We’re up against villains who have spent money over decades to rig the system in their favor but as much as they try, America is not an oligarchy. But it might become one if we do not stand up. That's why we are hosting neighborhood meetings across Pennsylvania, to speak out against the power grab. We’re also putting a spotlight on GOP Congressman Scott Perry, demanding he doesn’t cut his constituents' healthcare. America is still a democracy and it’s formed by our every action and inaction. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = One PA | One PA is a grassroots movement for racial, economic, and social justice in Pennsylvania. I’ve heard enough to know that you’re the only one in your state who has what it takes. That’s why I’m going to give you a shot to join my team – but please don’t blow this opportunity! As my apprentice, you’ll have a direct line of communication to share ANYTHING you want with me through exclusive surveys, petitions, polls, and a WHOLE LOT MORE. I’ll also share confidential Trump updates with you personally. PLEASE don’t tell anyone! Thank you and may God bless you, Donald J. subject: The Taxpayer Data Protection Act

body:
Democrats are taking a stand against the Republican Rip-Off.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102346200/528877627/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODU1OTU3ZS0yOGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zs00eyic1v4NsStluo7tqww92tzUOavAq4-LWN-1vVM=&emci=bbc62d66-1eee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0855957e-28ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Democrats are taking a stand against the Republican Rip-Off.** A couple of weeks ago, I joined House Democrats to introduce the Taxpayer Data Protection Act, which will stop people like Elon Musk from accessing the highly sensitive Treasury Department payment system, which is responsible for Social Security and Medicare benefits. Trump has empowered an unvetted, unelected billionaire to poke around your highly sensitive data. This is illegal and all part of his plan to sow chaos and confusion to push forward with his Project 2025. **The Taxpayer Data Protection Act takes a direct stand against the Republican Rip-Off and aims to protect you.** Your sensitive information deserves the utmost protection, and a man with no clearance or authority should not be able to have access to it. Your public outrage is working, and we need to continue to stop this Administration at all levels. **Identify your voice, use it, and we can stand against this Republican Rip-Off.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Democrats are taking a stand against the Republican Rip-Off. | | | | Democrats are taking a stand against the Republican Rip-Off. A couple of weeks ago, I joined House Democrats to introduce the Taxpayer Data Protection Act, which will stop people like Elon Musk from accessing the highly sensitive Treasury Department payment system, which is responsible for Social Security and Medicare benefits. Trump has empowered an unvetted, unelected billionaire to poke around your highly sensitive data. This is illegal and all part of his plan to sow chaos and confusion to push forward with his Project 2025. The Taxpayer Data Protection Act takes a direct stand against the Republican Rip-Off and aims to protect you. Your sensitive information deserves the utmost protection, and a man with no clearance or authority should not be able to have access to it. Your public outrage is working, and we need to continue to stop this Administration at all levels. Identify your voice, use it, and we can stand against this Republican Rip-Off. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . More than ever, we can’t expect help to come from Washington. If we’re going to stop Musk’s attack on the federal government, we need to treat our state and local races like the frontline of democracy.
Republicans have already threatened to hold back federal disaster relief aid from California unless they comply with GOP demands. How long until they come for Pennsylvania and try to roll back everything we’ve accomplished?
I’m not waiting for them to come to us. I’m working around the clock, right now, to make sure our state is a leader in fighting back against this chaos.
That makes me a target. Pennsylvania is one of the tightest battleground states in the country, and the GOP is going to spend big money to win here next cycle.
[Can you make sure I have the resources to take on whatever they throw at me by chipping in now? Your contribution goes directly to helping me make sure Pennsylvania is Musk-proof.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102346255/528877720/-1030828174?amount=10&source=AD_021825_EM_FR_1_1_Musk&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODMzN2JhNi0yOGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tr-2kA42tKctBqlx4R1AUQBjKlcwYglwyqX0hRHF_BM=)
Thanks for your support,
Austin Davis

clean_body: Republicans have already threatened to hold back federal disaster relief aid from California unless they comply with far-right policies Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania Blue up and down the ballot in 2024. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, A recent watchdog report confirmed what we all already knew — Elon Musk’s rampage through the federal government is dangerous, unconstitutional, and leaving us all less safe. The richest man in the world is pausing cancer funding, repealing environmental protections, and shuttering organizations founded to protect American consumers. I’m hard at work making Pennsylvania Musk-proof, but I can’t do it alone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = More than ever, we can’t expect help to come from Washington. If we’re going to stop Musk’s attack on the federal government, we need to treat our state and local races like the frontline of democracy. Republicans have already threatened to hold back federal disaster relief aid from California unless they comply with GOP demands. How long until they come for Pennsylvania and try to roll back everything we’ve accomplished? I’m not waiting for them to come to us. I’m working around the clock, right now, to make sure our state is a leader in fighting back against this chaos. That makes me a target. Pennsylvania is one of the tightest battleground states in the country, and the GOP is going to spend big money to win here next cycle. = Thanks for your support, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as lieutenant governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania Blue up and down the ballot in 2024. Can you chip in today to help me keep Pennsylvania Blue? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

name: AOC
subject: He can threaten me with jail and call names all he wants.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
He’s got nothing else.
#
This is why you fight these cowards:
The moment you stand up to them, they crumble.
Homan has nothing. **The Fourth Amendment is clear and I am well within my duties to educate people of their rights.**
He can threaten me with jail and call names all he wants. He’s got nothing else.
Fox News and MAGA actively create fear to get us to give up in advance and withdraw from public life _without them lifting a finger_.
**Hell no**. We will not stop fighting to empower our community.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250218.ObFWkR&refcode=em20250218-8172-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8172%2E2526796%2EaHT7M_)

clean_body: He’s got nothing else. This is why you fight these cowards: The moment you stand up to them, they crumble. Homan has nothing. The Fourth Amendment is clear and I am well within my duties to educate people of their rights. He can threaten me with jail and call names all he wants. He’s got nothing else. Fox News and MAGA actively create fear to get us to give up in advance and withdraw from public life without them lifting a finger. Hell no. We will not stop fighting to empower our community. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Letitia James
subject: DEI is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Across the country, right-wing politicians are working to destroy these critical programs.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102348778/528884884/-1997846894?code=jtk1807-su-nd&refcode=jtk1807-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmQ4NGNhZS0yY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFJ60L-0BN4aIvSPcJOMqz96MFoVPqos5H8yReKRKQY=)
---
Peter, diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) programs open doors, level the playing field, and equal opportunities for all – **but right now, they're being dismantled by this administration.**
Across the country, right-wing politicians are working to destroy these critical programs, threatening the progress we've fought so hard to achieve.
As the first Black woman elected as New York attorney general, I know firsthand just how crucial this fight is. DEI isn’t about giving special treatment – it’s about ensuring that _everyone_ , no matter their background, has a chance to live out their American dream. **And I _refuse_ to stand by while these fundamental principles are threatened.**
**I promise to continue fighting for diversity, equity, and inclusion for all New Yorkers – because an attack on DEI is an attack on opportunity, justice, and progress. But to do that, I need your help to make our voices heard loud and clear. **
**Before midnight tonight, I need at least 10,000 fearless fighters to sign my petition to defend DEI – including YOU, Peter. _[Will you join me in this fight by adding your name to defend DEI programs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102348779/528884891/976492299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1807-su-nd&refcode=jtk1807-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmQ4NGNhZS0yY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFJ60L-0BN4aIvSPcJOMqz96MFoVPqos5H8yReKRKQY=&emci=1b39c913-e7e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=12d84cae-2cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=25369504)_**
| | [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102348780/528884898/976492299?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1807-su-nd&refcode=jtk1807-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmQ4NGNhZS0yY2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFJ60L-0BN4aIvSPcJOMqz96MFoVPqos5H8yReKRKQY=&emci=1b39c913-e7e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=12d84cae-2cee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=25369504)

subject: Remember Inflation? I DO.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Fellow Democrat:

Remember inflation? It was supposedly the central focus of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans, who promised ON DAY ONE that inflation would all but go away.

But ON DAY ONE, they pardoned January 6th terrorists and since then it’s been a carnival for ketamine-using billionaires and special interests, renaming bodies of water, seeking vengeance against the FBI and starting trade wars that are only going to make things worse.

I’m Gay Valimont, the Democratic nominee for Florida’s First Congressional Seat that’s vacant because Matt Gaetz took a very public dive. While HE went down, inflation hasn’t. That’s why I need your help.

We have a special election on April 1st - less than 50 days away - and if we flip this seat and two other special election seats up for the vote - Democrats could RETAKE THE HOUSE in 2025 - and start making laws to LOWER inflation.

Can you help my campaign for working families by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton. Can you do $5? Or $15? Or $30? Or MORE? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]In my race to replace Matt Gaetz, I’ve outlined several steps I’d take to help Floridians in the Panhandle: RAISE THE WAGE FOR ENLISTED FAMILIES. Protect the Affordable Care Act to keep costs low. Expand supports for child care and home healthcare. AND NO to stupid trade wars.

I know what it’s like to struggle with medical bills - and to make ends meet. I’ve heard the voices all over the 1st District: They gave Trump and MAGA Republicans a chance, thinking - HOPING - that they’d really do what they said and focus on the economy.

That’s why I need your help to deliver a real VICTORY for Democrats on April 1. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton right now to DEFEAT MAGA Extremism? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

Gay Valimont

Democratic Nominee (FL-01)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m26-valimont]

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The House's 'nonprofit killer" bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021825_2&amount=25]
Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021825_2&amount=25]
We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again.
The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons.
“ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin.
Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=021825_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=021825_2&amount=25]

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] Truthout: House Passes Chilling “Nonprofit Killer” Bill [] We've got to let you know, Team, that a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again. The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. “ Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will .” “ A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. That's why we need to start working now to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights? We need every supporter of voting rights with us >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? That's why they've taken to the streets, waving their signs and chanting their slogans. They're trying to intimidate us into backing down. But this simply tells us that we are on the scent. body:
I’m fighting for the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102349932/528888143/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzUwMmJkNy0yZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_Ub227VrD21cFSxbxkpeKAdlLa_R2-cN9iMgUkS0vE=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102349933/528888144/1759801021?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzUwMmJkNy0yZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_Ub227VrD21cFSxbxkpeKAdlLa_R2-cN9iMgUkS0vE=) In case you didn’t see, I announced that I’m running for Governor of New Mexico, Peter. As a 35th-generation New Mexican, I know firsthand the struggles that New Mexicans face. I understand what it's like to be a single mother, having to decide between rent and groceries, struggling to keep a roof over your head. I’m running to make life easier for our families and the future brighter for our kids. My campaign is about lowering costs, making rent and housing affordable, strengthening our schools, and preventing crimes so that you feel safe raising a family here. This is the future we all want and deserve for our beautiful state. **The solutions are there if we are bold enough to fight for them.** But we know we’ll have to build a strong campaign to get the future we deserve. That’s why our campaign set a goal of receiving support from thousands of grassroots donors in the first week of this campaign. We’ve come so far, and we’re so close to hitting our goal. _I hope to see your name on the list, Peter._ [**So, will you become a founding donor with a contribution to my campaign and Fair Shot PAC?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102349934/528888145/1759801021?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzUwMmJkNy0yZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_Ub227VrD21cFSxbxkpeKAdlLa_R2-cN9iMgUkS0vE=) With your donation, we can reach voters across New Mexico with our message. Thank you for your generosity and support. Be fierce, Deb

600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180
Washington, DC 20003
United States **[fairshotpac.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102349935/528888146/-1338460526?refcode=AU_FSP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzUwMmJkNy0yZWVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_Ub227VrD21cFSxbxkpeKAdlLa_R2-cN9iMgUkS0vE=&emci=e9502bd7-2eee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=f3502bd7-2eee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30620316) | [info@fairshotpac.org](mailto:info@fairshotpac.org)** | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

Peter,
