I didn’t see your response to my question below, and I wanted to make sure your answer was recorded. Please take a moment to look over my message and submit your response -- _it’s an important one!_

Thanks!

- Lindsey Graham

* * *
**From:** Lindsey Graham
**Date:** February 7, 2025
**Subject:** It’s time to act.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d50233cb0ae4d1fa2756f679775d131&_e=6lkoXo9wusruWFMubFDNFQV5_k6ip3YX0CCXj3hLXQF7fWPghpnR_tYgmC9NzTMa6-uVud-JdFYcaZpfdTeXW9h1Ir-YXUSRc_X9H9ScF58PA5cNWbwVwe8Ld6fy9NZMi-4rNE-_rKoV4UKJzyefbae7L1clCau2ZhanuI-fS-6jO0FZwe9XwSbUC6-adWPvFS2-gCmQyg0qStON5Sl9fSifcQDbjdyErIIT0lNNlId_q2mLUcg0AUvlP5pE8Ysmbl7zlFyaOzwuaCCP1CpoKjmeLiuceeCmNjih7YeRBbsB4u8mMJfWx9v4jFs1tHK6PFy8-FCojlMFwqZPl34XCBhj0pHq2ci1OnuO59hg-bv_jcSHi1FqQktDXMLFy3gI2c-kL8YkhcMJpqFGhJa-BA%3D%3D)
Peter, if you believe that Republicans should fulfill their promises on border security and mass deportation of criminal illegal aliens: _**I agree.**_

With President Trump in the White House, Tom Homan as the new Border Czar, and a Republican-led Senate, we have the ability to secure our nation and protect people.

_**The time to act is NOW.**_

**As Chairman of the Senate Budget Committee, I will ensure Tom Homan has the money he needs to finish the wall, hire ICE agents to deport criminal illegal immigrants, and create more detention beds so that we do not release more dangerous people into the country — NOW!**

| [** DO YOU AGREE? **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d50233cb0ae4d1fa2756f679775d131&_e=6lkoXo9wusruWFMubFDNFQV5_k6ip3YX0CCXj3hLXQF7fWPghpnR_tYgmC9NzTMa6-uVud-JdFYcaZpfdTeXW9h1Ir-YXUSRc_X9H9ScF58PA5cNWbwVwe8Ld6fy9NZMi-4rNE-_rKoV4UKJzyefbae7L1clCau2ZhanuI-fS-6jO0FZwe9XwSbUC6-adWPvFS2-gCmQyg0qStON5Sl9fSifcQDbjdyErIIT0lNNlIfBvsY4qqjtjx8GDYTADOzjkykRW1IMgcKXahLGDUYwIq6diTjUGQVX5GLLkgzVsAUg4Iz5HxdiAa4Q-ZqreKu_omeckuusqbvKa13LdyAyJUV9eUfBd-ZmyGej_UvN9MfoiDjzj2_s9LAYHKjUMqgpuBhxZTtJOExrtB-39aeOcw%3D%3D)
---

Peter, we will create the most transformational border security bill in the history of our country.

_**There is no time to waste; it’s time to take action.**_

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

name: COURIER
subject: See the front page ad the Washington Post killed calling on Trump to fire Musk
body:
The $115,000 front page ad called on Trump to fire Elon Musk. It's another sad day for a once great newspaper.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102350436/528889571/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzZDRiZDEtMmZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aMHyYXxwgdNrRPyMhxkgKAbhLtrJ8OK5IO9pgVkouwY=&emci=893d4bd1-2fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=8a3d4bd1-2fee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**Yesterday, news broke that The Washington Post backed out of a signed agreement to run a $115,000 ad calling on Trump to fire Elon Musk.**
The ad, funded by Common Cause and the Southern Poverty Law Center Action Fund, was set to wrap around the front and back pages of the Tuesday edition—distributed to Congress, the Pentagon, and the White House.
The newspaper had even provided the groups with sample artwork to guide their design. And what was the sample? A recently published pro-Trump ad praising Trump’s promise to roll back electric vehicle mandates.
Yet, just days before publication, The Post abruptly pulled the ad without explanation.
[**See the ad The Washington Post refused to run—then chip in $25 so COURIER can expand its fearless, independent journalism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102350437/528889572/219341289?refcode=20250218-em-wapo-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzZDRiZDEtMmZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aMHyYXxwgdNrRPyMhxkgKAbhLtrJ8OK5IO9pgVkouwY=)
**[SEE THE AD& DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102350438/528889573/219341289?refcode=20250218-em-wapo-ad&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGEzZDRiZDEtMmZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aMHyYXxwgdNrRPyMhxkgKAbhLtrJ8OK5IO9pgVkouwY=)**
Let’s be clear: this isn’t about advertising standards. The Post had no problem running a front-page wrap praising Trump for his electric vehicle rollback.
The difference? That ad didn’t run the risk of offending Donald Trump and Elon Musk.
**At a moment in American history when we desperately need The Washington Post to be the fearless, truth-telling institution it once was—the paper that boldly declared "Democracy Dies in Darkness"—it’s bending over backward to curry favor with the Trump administration—and to protect Jeff Bezos’ bottom line:**
* The Post killed its presidential endorsement for the first time in 40 years.
* Jeff Bezos sat front-row at Trump’s inauguration alongside Musk and others.
* A Washington Post cartoonist resigned after the paper killed a sketch that satirized tech moguls like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos for bowing to Trump.
* Now, his paper is protecting Elon Musk—pulling a signed $115,000 ad calling for Trump to fire him just days before publication.

**This is what a captured press looks like, Peter.**
The Washington Post’s decision isn’t just about one ad. It’s about who controls what Americans see, hear, and understand. When the press is afraid to hold power accountable, democracy dies.
**COURIER exists to fight back, reaching the millions of Americans legacy media have left behind.**
But as more billionaires and corporations fold to Trump and Musk, we need your help to grow.

clean_body: The $115,000 front page ad called on Trump to fire Elon Musk. It's another sad day for a once great newspaper. Peter, Yesterday, news broke that The Washington Post backed out of a signed agreement to run a $115,000 ad calling on Trump to fire Elon Musk. The ad, funded by Common Cause and the Southern Poverty Law Center Action Fund, was set to wrap around the front and back pages of the Tuesday edition—distributed to Congress, the Pentagon, and the White House. The newspaper had even provided the groups with sample artwork to guide their design. And what was the sample? A recently published pro-Trump ad praising Trump’s promise to roll back electric vehicle mandates. Yet, just days before publication, The Post abruptly pulled the ad without explanation. = = Let’s be clear: this isn’t about advertising standards. The Post had no problem running a front-page wrap praising Trump for his electric vehicle rollback. The difference? That ad didn’t run the risk of offending Donald Trump and Elon Musk. At a moment in American history when we desperately need The Washington Post to be the fearless, truth-telling institution it once was—the paper that boldly declared "Democracy Dies in Darkness"—it’s bending over backward to curry favor with the Trump administration—and to protect Jeff Bezos’ bottom line: The Post killed its presidential endorsement for the first time in 40 years. Jeff Bezos sat front-row at Trump’s inauguration alongside Musk and others. A Washington Post cartoonist resigned after the paper killed a sketch that satirized tech moguls like Elon Musk and Jeff Bezos for bowing to Trump. Now, his paper is protecting Elon Musk—pulling a signed $115,000 ad calling for Trump to fire him just days before publication. This is what a captured press looks like, Peter. The Washington Post’s decision isn’t just about one ad. It’s about who controls what Americans see, hear, and understand. When the press is afraid to hold power accountable, democracy dies. COURIER exists to fight back, reaching the millions of Americans legacy media have left behind. But as more billionaires and corporations fold to Trump and Musk, we need your help to grow. = = In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

subject: The GOP plan to “devastate health care and food stamp programs”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:

name: Gabe Evans
subject: The power of faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
| | | Peter, When I was flying my UH-60 Black Hawk helicopter in a combat zone in the Middle East, I knew that the only thing preventing me from crashing to the ground at any moment was the will of my Creator. **_Now, that didn’t mean I was never scared, but it did mean that I surrendered any fear and doubt to God._** I knew my fate was out of my hands, so I did everything I could and waited on God to guide me to the next step. I did the same thing last election. I put myself and my family in the spotlight and ran for Congress because I knew our nation deserved better than what we were getting. **Despite the millions spent against me and the relentless mudslinging by the DNC, we were victorious by the Grace of God.** This is Gabe Evans. In 2024, I won a majority-clinching House seat in one of the closest races in the country. **I spent my life serving my country, first as a U.S. Army Captain, as a pilot responding to wildfires in Colorado, then as a police officer for over a decade.** I can’t even count the number of times I’ve risked life and limb for America. And every single time, it was worth it. **_The reason I’m reaching out to you now is because our seat is already in jeopardy. _**
---
[**RUSH SUPPORT**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/xuuHhEHw8ruRlR7Npjw7lQLWS0kzkQcV5NDClyb5HcwgD1gmdAHG0pCR3gE443HcO8qtqWEh-dNxssN1YezJqZU0K1BoKrjphkRHMwSWTUAn87ZDFStscRpDWNBBdLYD9ioMgEF4duz5XiC27ifvoABAtsBBxtkbynTcrrL4kPI4xKhGM0oCQFTyuWsWdY2QCIp8qUG6rKz203Pp933ycSzQ1kNvLP-w1HQ2Do47PEWPQYwdA0_MWmz_mZp_Ar3vaMAgPeIW5FtK2W69lKs-0m6b4LA6ODkgf_3nLqu0oKH5zbuTre5C70tINz_ca7nXFXkg5Gr-ss9kgC_AV_MKpjABZWYBeaOiZkEzaDOMRIAzWDqqbJS0wZ72ZsIYpHAsPR0WdTMz-80n6YajvojLQLnTuPCFww8ENn4GFG2r9MQreE8lM8dpqVl5jWORwSoq_FlcNhZ1zpeQF-I17I6PmNMCkNwQ-aqYM7jgIcds4mjucSzwX_ZYkJi8dcGcjXpOp1OIeMVa/7SilSJeFyalUgbmsVc5NLgLeKZcMikqr/6)

I’m really relying on you in these critical early moments, Peter. **The Democrats know that if we lose this seat, we lose our majority, and that’s why they’re putting MAJOR money in against me. **** ** **[**If you support having a man of faith in Congress, I humbly ask that you consider joining our team.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/wHv45GVQ5a6jzJjzL7KmdSDd5DO2l9-wN4sieeyOkmI5RMzWriBaaNs3wX6ZXhcEiqpZmfNQ9eSESMfbLIuSeZngupsu35Hs5_FppHepZ0cOXwv2H1vqOC8Q7dQ07tZIhgpj-sDUQDf0qCXI111tSY8dWz7EsN6yapSAg85VdUj0FtoIZMnGOOjbt5qWEzN0E0kMdOSP2XHnoqRSL6xqcsMRSBQK5z3HJZZJMQH-EJiY9BOlLe3eg6kpaJ05YRMoaSboiRA3fxAVyESgZdsWt9UmErLTgRD125Fs0KsH6xVO-Ij7VsNLSoYyHPZmj4IOuR_ix_-pHlVP73YZdHALDufvmdXGPvyknSwdDloblnzSEbjmnf_qKTy9l8DI1LzjG5MkFXuQ0W5JF7TNTZ5GbjrMBikxA-_3o0VFZ9MYLxvWKlxuD5lfqGdELZmAAWu-uHfq_oafCo0BDxWP63gztXrMtZDN8T7CJUF5SOAITSdeCZZVb4kDnaCLoXl3SG63lSOf6NrQ/gwERIRfG10O33-05imiLwXlLf1J5ApVX/6)**

name: Austin Chenge
subject: Explain it Like I'm 5: The 2A, Shall Not Be Infringed.
body:
For Immediate Release February 18, 2025 – Grand Rapids, Michigan Explain it like I'm 5: The 2A, Shall Not Be Infringed. Explain It Like I'm 5: The 2A, Shall Not Be Infringed. Once upon a time, there was a big community called America. This community had a special rule about pet ownership. One
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://austinchenge.com/so/35PKQaiWr/c?w=p7wNzBKkya6tpD22AjuAfs5zLwzlMGcDPCpm1_Yox_w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9hdXN0aW5jaGVuZ2UuY29tL3NvLzM1UEtRYWlXcj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZDQwODBhLTEyOGQtNDlmZi1iZTVkLTExM2QyNTk5NmExNiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Explain it Like I'm 5: The 2A, Shall Not Be Infringed. "Once upon a time, there was a big community called America. This community had a special rule about pet ownership. One of those special rules was about dogs. It says, “You are allowed to have dogs, and no one can come along and say, 'You’re not allowed to have a dog anymore,' or make it super hard for you to keep your dog. It’s your right, and it’s protected. (Shall not be infringed)."

Jeff and Amy Smith just got a pet dog; his name is Sparky. Their daughter Joy loves Sparky. Sparky is a really good dog, he is well-trained and is like a new member of the family. Most of the time, Sparky is just at home, sleeping on the couch, and wagging his tail. But occasionally, Jeff takes Sparky on hunting trips, and Amy has been taking Sparky with her when she goes for her evening run since there has been a string of attacks on women running alone recently" In the above story and series, I use my legal background to explore the 2nd Amendment in America through a heartwarming story. Simplified for families and anyone curious about the constitution. Austin ChengeVeteran and Former Republican Gov Candidate for Michigan Alma Mater: The University of Birmingham Law School, England.

Once upon a time, there was a big community called America. This community had a special rule about pet ownership. One of those special rules was about dogs. It says, “You are allowed to have dogs, and no one can come along and say, 'You’re not allowed to have a dog anymore,' or make it super hard for you to keep your dog. It’s your right, and it’s protected. (Shall not be infringed)."

Jeff and Amy Smith just got a pet dog; his name is Sparky. Their daughter Joy loves Sparky. Sparky is a really good dog, he is well-trained and is like a new member of the family. Most of the time, Sparky is just at home, sleeping on the couch, and wagging his tail. But occasionally, Jeff takes Sparky on hunting trips, and Amy has been taking Sparky with her when she goes for her evening run since there has been a string of attacks on women running alone recently.

There have also been a couple of home invasions recently in the neighborhood. Just last week, someone tried to break into the Smith family house, but Sparky went on the offensive, barked really loud, and scared the intruder away. Sparky hadn't done this before, but when needed, he did a great job protecting the Smith family.

Now, some people in the neighborhood just hate dogs. They say some dogs have been leaving hot piles on their lawns and that all dogs are dangerous because sometimes owners use big, scary dogs to intimidate people, scare them, or make them bite others, so they think we should make a rule that no one can have a dog anymore. In their opinion, it's safer if no one has a dog at all.

But here’s the tricky part: even if the neighborhood makes that rule, bad dog owners don’t follow rules. They might sneak around and get a dog anyway, but now they use their dog to scare or hurt other people. Meanwhile, Jeff and his family don’t have Sparky anymore, so they can’t protect themselves if a bad person tries to break into their home again, and Amy is terrified to go on her evening run.

The rule was very clear: "the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed" in the 2nd Amendment means “You’re allowed to have a dog (or in real life, firearms) to protect yourself and your family.” No one can come along and say, “You’re not allowed to have a dog anymore,” or make it super hard for you to keep your dog. It’s your right, and it’s protected. It’s there because the people who made the rules a long time ago wanted to make sure you could defend yourself, just like your dog helps you when needed. They knew that bad people might still break the rules, so they wanted good people to have a way to stay safe.

And that's how the 2nd Amendment works in America.

In the above story and series, I use my legal background to explore the 2nd Amendment in America through a heartwarming story. Simplified for families and anyone curious about the constitution.

Austin Chenge
Veteran and Former Republican Gov Candidate for Michigan
Alma Mater: The University of Birmingham Law School, England. Note: This press release was issued by The Office of Austin Chenge.

name: David Hogg
subject: Are you ready to get back to winning?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Young people are the answer to Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250218-1&t=1&akid=1751%2E587540%2EJWiEtj)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg. Are you ready to get back to winning? Because I am.
After Parkland, our country had a Republican trifecta, like we do now. Consultants, pundits, and pollsters told us that we had no chance of creating real change.
**But we didn’t listen,_and that’s why we won._**
**We cannot accept defeat. We cannot accept cynicism. We need to roll up our sleeves and fight back.**
Leaders We Deserve is working to energize and mobilize young voters across the country because that’s the only way we will defeat Trump’s fascism.
**Young people are a critical part of the answer to Donald Trump.** And that’s why the work we’re doing together is so important.
We are changing the face of the Democratic Party and transforming it into the youthful, energetic, and progressive party of the future that we all want to see.
But this work is only possible with grassroots support. We don’t have a long line of billionaires waiting to fund us like the other side does. We have real people who give _$10, $30, $50_ or whatever they can to power this progressive movement.
**[Can we count on your support, Peter? Pitch in $5 right now to help us rebuild the Democratic Party and get back to winning.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250218-1?refcode=em20250218-1751&amount=5&refcode2=1751_587540_JWiEtj&akid=1751%2E587540%2EJWiEtj)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250218-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250218-1751&refcode2=1751_587540_JWiEtj&akid=1751%2E587540%2EJWiEtj)**
Thank you!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250218-1&t=2&refcode2=1751_587540_JWiEtj&akid=1751%2E587540%2EJWiEtj)**

subject: Momentum is Building—Let’s Keep It Going!
body:

Friends and Neighbors,
Our campaign is picking up momentum, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the support we’ve received. From community leaders to public safety professionals, people across Prince George’s County are standing with us because they know we need strong, experienced leadership.
But we can’t slow down now. Every hour, our opponents are raising funds to spread their message, and we need to make sure we have the resources to fight back. This race will be won by the people who show up and take action. That’s why I’m asking: Can you pitch in right now to keep our campaign moving forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
We’re in this together, and together, we will build a better future for Prince George’s County. Let’s keep pushing forward!
With gratitude,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive
P.S. Your support today will help us reach more voters and build the momentum we need to win. Please consider donating whatever you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: These women are leading the fight →
body:
EMILYs List exists to build women's political power. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102352456/528895726/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE236_20250218_Freshmen_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhNGI3NS0zM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOM_rQHSzjzbF_t9qzcCJYDxjmJElHvtlBwcItECQy4=) EMILYs List is committed to building women's political power so they can use it when it matters most, Peter.

And right now, having strong pro-choice women leaders in office is _critical._ As the Trump administration continues its relentless assault on our rights, and billionaires treat our democracy like a game, it's Democratic pro-choice women in Congress who are standing on the front lines and _fighting back_. They're defending reproductive freedom, protecting democracy, and advocating for real solutions that benefit every American.

[**These women are shaping the future, and they need our support. Donate today to help elect more EMILYs List women up and down the ballot:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102352458/528895728/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE236_20250218_Freshmen_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhNGI3NS0zM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOM_rQHSzjzbF_t9qzcCJYDxjmJElHvtlBwcItECQy4=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102352459/528895729/-1491281772?refcode=WUEFE236_20250218_Freshmen_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055717&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhNGI3NS0zM2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dOM_rQHSzjzbF_t9qzcCJYDxjmJElHvtlBwcItECQy4=)
---
Our 16 freshmen representatives, elected this past November, are already proving they can deliver for the American people. They come from all walks of life: they are physicians, attorneys, climate activists, small-business owners, and lifelong public servants. Many worked retail and food service jobs to put themselves through school. Some come from working-class backgrounds, and some are proud members of the LGBTQ+ community.

Rep. **Maxine Dexter (OR-03)** ran to bring a pro-choice physician's voice to public policy. Rep. **Luz Rivas (CA-29)** founded DIY Girls to empower young women in STEM. Rep. **Maggie Goodlander (NH-02)** served as counsel for the House Judiciary Committee during Trump's first impeachment trial. Rep. **Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03)** , the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council and the first Iranian American to represent Arizona in Congress, was previously the vice mayor of Phoenix.

These women aren't just making history — they're defining what comes next for our party and our country. But extremist Republicans, billionaire donors, and anti-choice special interests are working around the clock to stop them.

clean_body: EMILYs List exists to build women's political power. | = EMILYs List is committed to building women's political power so they can use it when it matters most, Peter. And right now, having strong pro-choice women leaders in office is critical. As the Trump administration continues its relentless assault on our rights, and billionaires treat our democracy like a game, it's Democratic pro-choice women in Congress who are standing on the front lines and fighting back. They're defending reproductive freedom, protecting democracy, and advocating for real solutions that benefit every American. = | = Our 16 freshmen representatives, elected this past November, are already proving they can deliver for the American people. They come from all walks of life: they are physicians, attorneys, climate activists, small-business owners, and lifelong public servants. Many worked retail and food service jobs to put themselves through school. Some come from working-class backgrounds, and some are proud members of the LGBTQ+ community. Rep. Maxine Dexter (OR-03) ran to bring a pro-choice physician's voice to public policy. Rep. Luz Rivas (CA-29) founded DIY Girls to empower young women in STEM. Rep. Maggie Goodlander (NH-02) served as counsel for the House Judiciary Committee during Trump's first impeachment trial. Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ-03) , the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council and the first Iranian American to represent Arizona in Congress, was previously the vice mayor of Phoenix. These women aren't just making history — they're defining what comes next for our party and our country. But extremist Republicans, billionaire donors, and anti-choice special interests are working around the clock to stop them. The fight for 2026 has already begun, and we're ready. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Senior Vice President of Communications and Content, EMILYs List = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Emailing again about Justice Allison Riggs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Because Republicans haven’t stopped trying to overturn her election.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102352617/528896480/823540626?refcode=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY3Mzc3Yi0zNGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYv3l41PRPDyQdIIKwf3zsECIxEH4zIvH9QjmjndPkw=&emci=f971377c-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1049176)
Three months after Election Day, North Carolina Republicans are still trying to steal a free and fair election. _The facts here are clear, Peter._ **Justice Allison Riggs won. Her victory was confirmed by _two_ recounts. But Republicans are asking the courts to unilaterally throw out valid ballots to change the outcome of an election they lost.** The GOP’s attempt to throw out over 60,000 legal ballots and prevent Justice Riggs from retaking her seat on the Supreme Court is an affront to the voters of North Carolina and a threat to the foundation of our democracy. **[Our elections have to mean something. Justice Riggs is still fighting to ensure the will of the voters is heard and the outcome of her election is respected, but she urgently needs your help. If you’re able, please donate to her legal fund right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102352618/528896481/1130625477?refcode=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY3Mzc3Yi0zNGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYv3l41PRPDyQdIIKwf3zsECIxEH4zIvH9QjmjndPkw=)** This case will continue to play out in state courts through the coming weeks, where Republicans have a wide majority on the NC Court of Appeals. If Republican judges decide to bow to their party and their losing candidate, it would set an ominous precedent of using technical issues to throw out the votes of people who are absolutely legal registered voters AFTER they have already voted! Even the most right-wing partisan judges should know this is an affront to the constitutional right to vote. Republicans, Democrats, and unaffiliated voters whose votes have been challenged are mad. And they have every right to be. This is a dangerous moment for our democracy. **[Justice Riggs needs to be able to fight for her victory for as long as it takes. Supporting her legal fund with a contribution today will help. Please click here to donate directly to Justice Riggs >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102352619/528896482/1130625477?refcode=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY3Mzc3Yi0zNGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYv3l41PRPDyQdIIKwf3zsECIxEH4zIvH9QjmjndPkw=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102352620/528896483/1130625477?refcode=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.61f7377b-34ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWY3Mzc3Yi0zNGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RYv3l41PRPDyQdIIKwf3zsECIxEH4zIvH9QjmjndPkw=)

| | Peter, The GOP is planning to pass a massive tax cut for their billionaire buddies — and they’re coming after your hard-earned benefits to do it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102353637/528899721/827090188?refcode=AU_VAH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzhkZDMyNi0zN2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TcO_D-Gcgc4CKBdjsa0hulnzSRVdd1gdKiGyn5m5BbA=) To pay for their billionaire-first agenda, House Republicans have set their sights on slashing critical benefits that hardworking Oregonians rely on. Their plan would cut funding for health care under Medicaid and raise taxes for families who pay for child care and single mothers. **This is unacceptable, Peter.** That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to defend working families from Donald Trump’s plans to line the pockets of his billionaire friends at the expense of working people, but I can’t do it alone. **[I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you to help me continue fighting for hardworking Oregonians. Their plan would cut funding for health care under Medicaid and raise taxes for families who pay for child care and single mothers. This is unacceptable, Peter. Friend,
The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee just announced that Minnesota is one of their top targets for 2026. They know we need to win back a majority in the Minnesota House to keep Republicans from passing dangerous legislation that makes it harder for people to live, let alone thrive.
National partners are committing to the hard work we have ahead of us, and we’re committed, too. Now, we just need you. Will you help us win by making a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb25?refcode=021825]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dflhc-feb25?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=021825]

We really appreciate all your support, friend. With all that’s going on right now, it’s more important than ever that we work together. Adam Kopel

body:

New York Republicans JUST AXED Liberals’ bill – a Special Election will now take place within 90 days
| |
---
| | | Sorry to interrupt your day but this is urgent:

---
**FIRST: New York Liberals introduced a bill to DELAY the Special Election to replace Elise Stefanik - _denying representation to 700K+ New Yorkers_

THEN: We urgently called on 10,000 Patriots to help save our House Majority - _and we were blown away by your support_

NOW: New York Republicans SUCCESSFULLY blocked the bill - _now the Democrat Governor will be forced to call a Special Election within 90 days_**

Because immediately after Elise Stefanik's confirmation, our Conservative House Majority will shrink by ONE MORE SEAT. We already hold the Majority by the smallest margin in a CENTURY and there are two more Special Elections happening just weeks from right now.

_**[So we need to move FAST...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1b214da15fa4660b919ce96ada88dda&_e=QDnfSbNkE3GwD4flhG-gQZKITZgEnR6dJBX4BCTNW2zf385Y6Si4aKqRCAh-ewEdTLuK3hrEFM6jW7vyNYto4sj5jk7xe8lRbgej7_ZQova36XHQaiXdF_StN7ArwQaWPXwe1NaGqdykWHDzZQZ3qdaNaXZ2RwEH5-heC2I9lg6M0RDtdXUCp0fmk6HETqKQG3lOrVupei0wDXfZ7fHTQbzMQhLqbAYTaUxE56vzDun6fZeHy4INC5ZS-wAptxP6wZi2jnmZuVozTgGw-RpqzdWH5LxJxVwF1RI4K5bVIu1rSxTMKaQSb4Ji1wePnLPi1_Qo5PrGGe8AN4eZ-IGAun4-lGOroJ3bQYdtP90lerQZWVhGWN-fNUtDdbBaK8JI3QrYPNXKrDO4LtnKQWCCKiWGxXj076T4uYjY7V2mWHw%3D "So we need to move right here and right now... ")**_

We have no choice but to kick our efforts into hyperdrive to win these key races and SAVE our House Majority.

**Friend - we did the math. And our team concluded we need AT LEAST 10,000 contributions before the end of the week to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.**

---

We won't beat around the bush with you. If too many folks ignore our call to action, we risk:

**1\. LOSING all three Special Elections
2\. SURRENDERING our House Majority to the Democrats
3\. ALLOWING for a full blockade of Trump's agenda **

Every single contribution is mission-critical to helping Conservatives refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and build winning campaigns.

Don't underestimate the impact of your dollar. We can't win key races like this without YOU.

But the question is - will you step up?

_**INCOMING: 3 SPECIAL ELECTIONS**_ | [PITCH IN NOW](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e1b214da15fa4660b919ce96ada88dda&_e=QDnfSbNkE3GwD4flhG-gQZKITZgEnR6dJBX4BCTNW2zf385Y6Si4aKqRCAh-ewEdTLuK3hrEFM6jW7vyNYto4sj5jk7xe8lRbgej7_ZQova36XHQaiXdF_StN7ArwQaWPXwe1NaGqdykWHDzZQZ3qdaNaXZ2RwEH5-heC2I9lg6M0RDtdXUCp0fmk6HETqKQG3lOrVupei0wDXfZ7fHTQbzMQhLqbAYTaUxE56vzDun6fZeHy4INC5ZS-wAptxP61Q77LVFRgS4EhdfIRsX8cLmAZpkJ7cIIUn-aegtsr7wLK1SqDvD5TCFl0z2kLaLjmJSN8WlXMronqUlW9Tps_PA7FGQcZ4-dYcqyn7xXsdlXnUQfwL9EfwHHG-g_NzOL_Gt5M9oXdtpPTaLtN-kTA1i9YUUU8oqSh2BtC-VZe0k%3D "HELP WIN ALL THREE: PITCH IN NOW")

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMM0Cogus7ZTj8YjTc5oP6R8TJSTTCdzIPzJba5kbu_aRAslGOAIPFamSPkDFUGGpvOeHiIgtN-vt-P3UwV6PdaFUr3L5RBU8QoasyK8JpwX-remVl_reJNy--9HLKrTBW3nOUzbvjX9n3seuFe1yuDw%3D)

| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMMdviPK8_OemAjr_2rc-1Jtfg8HWnehX7ntjfbFI4V-ot_Bp0rtAY8lcj_68S1LoLseB-R1uioED9QU1jOU2XK8cvqsB7Vh0QKkgbp6wcwDvmPgRiXdE3CrBZqGgbVq8KuJ0TlR-QKzXSVPChIEtzPw%3D)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMIkEEqiyrUoVbNd1BqKjIKV4Za_cROXOcjSNR7XJhmIQ1eEjR6TyDMItAzsZupHSgQxmpJl7CBKqcibaw7s7NttLP3DxAAwEnB1vVzi_yVKtwXH5k2DJ-tonYts88OH0CA0fF2THr7KemcLtg9gOiWE%3D)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Cuo0jHxjSeEvbpwW91WGXHv83WfcakOOC5D--MDe3264-lxb_tuz5WM6gpnjyAgV1mh8A2f7YLqoyJqRF4hVV1AJjMbxHWDFA1bd-zkKtOynARCgMD7AOsBCL0-Xw1JHaR0CVU2Q8fo5xkCyFJpQtPFFS3CET8rrqU5yRt_e5GSqOla3_YlaGNIh9PA-41rtuE%3D)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMIHyPKEwiSasLKPdDIPbeFQnvqqf7s8-3CyVqPVtHjoGgfMqitxL6V5QHKnR7T9ifhQZXgQM2bjca05ZFPH1wFKSNK51swUeAkYNCNy9XkUiE3P5htXCvN22vgWu8c3wV_6-l7qOeIJRsQH2cdr8Nkc%3D)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpME7pXCW14gIcGWjNtVBEjE_nzBsl82nC8t1O5YQ3ud4n9dLLgYbJlAdyFkT6lE4fiHym87NRMTX12sm7yopZw_WftQSf07IDdvWxbcpKNdfAhsRJuA8QuhpFyAhAqcXhKgHgJcYE4HM2AX_TkXj9RQ0%3D)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMAJ3jo7a4GW5KpnuiEgNmrpVDSQtIdOOohceXi490G347xbgqMDnP3DCSjDJFchehza_MvovtMWqqGud65BFsC7gkvmllhMaJqz-R6xX8OKsv-n8Gc52rahU3SpgVx1bPpB0Pv2YQvFO3JVnJ4dBHp8%3D), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMAeUsRBY6p6OkUX9uvzJQkDNV056udmOqWlMHWFpHpGmZQGXcet-z7Y6rgULSpC-lOjlCvDOob63kjN8HTn9Dze8rkuHUc9X1ofcbhOzglAaQsLIE4_oKrrAI9GGtvwMCgfcp2VATR_3ervcXBk0Nxk%3D)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMDjVKbwEAE5jQL6PNmHmrUK_emtl2n6QxTEJui9SeZtaBJ9FKihh7V93HIuz_qVwJWAKc_3qzXpb0uWkieG6tognKpVBwXRLH9qOXCvzf5mQ_TxFpzWR9xXTPtjEAp80SoYwz8mGyrXCDaiWmrbcFbc%3D)

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=54608b3e1697431ca6f66e4999caa24b&_e=PB0nsYa1mbND8l0FGnEbW_lvd3o3HZwhoC_Hd3ur4Ctar5GCRwKYkL8DOMwJE8G9LuOb8TnhJXH4o2DYyakDpXIqGuxv3RdzZDrYD-uTqGeCrdMnOThGP6IXf-QBIUcSzjXp19VdKPcHXaTan5df9YUuMTnkZXmC0KLOBhh9yB4sJClEw5RESW6ssR680yk-PV-i8lx67aOy3Icp5MHpMOXZWaO-1u5IjaATT8oJHu2Chq0A5btBMLhNeMfeDtFHGUIPGxH9fBuNssO_x9M6PX4DsmOPBlE7nUSqczY_2OicN121mBuPGDVatEv-ZD-lHtsYZUCInTCclU0ec8JtjQ5HQj8HD5DXPP2xUk9fO-Y%3D)

clean_body: | | | | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. | | | | “A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president. So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”~ Elon Musk | | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives and the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is already being watered down in Congress. Your vote is already being watered down in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully canceled out in future elections. American elections should be decided by American citizens., here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was before the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. But I can’t do it without you. No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,honest elections... none of it matters.Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have expressly banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020. This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. , I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions. The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. It means we can’t be bought. On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling billions to dark money “non-profit” groups to “reshape ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting and banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. subject: A $130 poll tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354749/528903618/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=)
Center for American Progress: _The SAVE Act Would Disenfranchise Millions of Citizens_
**MAGA Republicans are pushing for a federal takeover of our elections through the so-called SAVE Act – legislation that would make it harder for MILLIONS of Americans to vote. ****[**Sign on to STOP the SAVE Act >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354750/528903622/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=&emci=de8172ba-35ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=5d77bd5b-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**
| | **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354751/528903623/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=&emci=de8172ba-35ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=5d77bd5b-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**
---
Picture this, folks:
You go in to vote, and you're turned away at the polls – despite having voted at the same location for years.
_Why?_ You don’t have a passport, and you’re missing your birth certificate.
**The GOP’s SAVE Act is proposing this exact scenario,** and it will slam the door on millions -- soldiers serving abroad, rural Americans, tribal members, disaster survivors, working families, and women who took their spouse's name.
150 million citizens --_half the country_ \-- lack passports. And at **$130** each, that's no small barrier. Millions more don’t have their birth certificates on file either.
Make no mistake, folks: this is another step in the GOP’s calculated ploy to keep the American people from the ballot box.
[**We've seen this playbook before, but the good news is we can fight back. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll sign the petition to STOP the SAVE Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354753/528903624/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=&emci=de8172ba-35ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=5d77bd5b-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)
| **[STOP THE SAVE ACT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354755/528903626/1857494260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=&emci=de8172ba-35ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=5d77bd5b-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26828920)**
---
We’re hoping for at least two 43614 signatures by midnight tonight. Thank you in advance for your commitment to defending the sacred right to vote.
-Team DASS
| Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the _only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. _Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354756/528903634/-664592562?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDc3YmQ1Yi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IA0-a23TVrjhnfIBQw6wuSCif8OiMRwUjXPG54pjhDA=)

subject: Support Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library 🦋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Become a citizen co-sponsor of this crucial bill that improves the literacy and lives of our children: |
#
---
| | **“We know that every child is full of promise. Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library is another key step to improve how we support our kids as they learn to read,”** Governor Kotek said. “By supporting **House Bill 2811** , we can make a critical investment in our children’s future by building early, positive connections with reading.” | | [ENDORSE HB 2811](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354876/528904035/1806332530?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkNDA4Zi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_7GHWJcnnX7-AkzqJod-JTwGbASBlksjf39426FZKE=&emci=5a117b88-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d25d408f-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729)
---
Peter,
Pour yourself a tall cup of ambition — we urgently need your support to keep Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library program running for kids in Oregon!
Tina introduced House Bill 2811 to expand and strengthen this children’s program that sparks joy and builds positive connections with reading for young readers and their families. This program will help improve reading proficiency and high school graduation rates.
Passing this bill ensures this program can continue its wonderful work supporting our children’s early literacy and success later in life.
Adding your name as a co-sponsor of House Bill 2811 right now will help show Tina’s colleagues the widespread support for programs that only stand to improve our lives, like Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library program.
[_**Peter, add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of HB 2811:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354878/528904037/1806332530?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkNDA4Zi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_7GHWJcnnX7-AkzqJod-JTwGbASBlksjf39426FZKE=&emci=5a117b88-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d25d408f-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102354880/528904039/1806332530?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjVkNDA4Zi0zYmVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_7GHWJcnnX7-AkzqJod-JTwGbASBlksjf39426FZKE=&emci=5a117b88-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d25d408f-3bee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15353729)

clean_body: Become a citizen co-sponsor of this crucial bill that improves the literacy and lives of our children: | | | “We know that every child is full of promise. Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library is another key step to improve how we support our kids as they learn to read,” Governor Kotek said. “By supporting House Bill 2811 , we can make a critical investment in our children’s future by building early, positive connections with reading.” | | Peter, Pour yourself a tall cup of ambition — we urgently need your support to keep Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library program running for kids in Oregon! Tina introduced House Bill 2811 to expand and strengthen this children’s program that sparks joy and builds positive connections with reading for young readers and their families. This program will help improve reading proficiency and high school graduation rates. Passing this bill ensures this program can continue its wonderful work supporting our children’s early literacy and success later in life. Adding your name as a co-sponsor of House Bill 2811 right now will help show Tina’s colleagues the widespread support for programs that only stand to improve our lives, like Dolly Parton’s Imagination Library program. Thank you for signing on, Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Rep. Brandon Gill
subject: This is insane
body:
The Left is using YOUR money to push their Woke Agenda but we’re cutting them off

| | | | |
---
Friend,

The Democrats are in a total meltdown - _and they should be._****
**You see, Elon Musk shared a video on X of me at the House DOGE Subcommittee hearing where I exposed the corruption in Washington.**
****
And now the entire Deep State machine is coming after me like never before.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**The truth is: they don’t want Americans waking up to the fact that YOUR tax dollars are being stolen and wasted in ways that we never thought possible!**
**NOT to secure our border, NOT to fix the economy, and NOT help struggling families b****ut to fund their radical woke agenda across the world.**
**_And they thought they could keep this quiet._**
But now, thanks to millions of eyes on this video, the truth is out and the Swamp is in full panic mode.
[WATCH THE VIDEO NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Instead of addressing the real issues, Democrats in Congress are OBSESSED with attacking Elon Musk.**
**They fear free speech, they fear the truth, and they fear anyone who exposes them.**
_**And now they’ve turned their attacks on me.**_
The media hit pieces have already started. The Left’s Deep State cronies are lying about me, smearing me, and doing everything possible to shut me down.
_**Because I refuse to play by their rules.**_
Friend, I won’t be intimidated by their attempts to silence me but I can’t fight them alone. I need you in this fight with me.
[JOIN THE FIGHT TO DRAIN THE SWAMP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**For years, the Democrats have built a shadow government of unelected bureaucrats, a fourth branch of government, that has gone unchecked and weaponized against YOU.**
That’s why President Trump and I are fighting to tear this corrupt system down and return power to the American people.
But the Left is pouring everything they have into stopping me.
_**Unless I have the resources to fight back, they’ll do everything they can to silence me for good.**_
**_[So I hope I can count on you to chip in $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me keep exposing the truth and Drain the Swamp once and for all](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[DRAIN THE SWAMP NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | We fought like hell to get here...
**Now, we MUST finish the job.**
---
_Thanks for standing strong,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Congressman Brandon Gill**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/a2nN/?__vbtrk=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjc2MjA3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Gay Valimont
subject: WHAT Did my Opponent Say??
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Dear Friends,
I’m Gay Valimont, and if there’s one thing I can’t stand, it’s hypocrisy—especially when it comes from politicians who claim to fight censorship while actively supporting it. As candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, I’m asking for your assistance before special elections to get our priorities back on track.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6433483255394B63386E7070584E7631502B6553734E5134525433495A49706A4F306C372B7273756B5470446F46337457306E77447A4B694B56777A79633344/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-02-18%20at%2011.30.32%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Recently, my Trump-backed opponent Jimmy Patronis tweeted: “Censorship is wrong and deeply un-American. Taxpayer money shouldn’t be used to fund it.” But in the same breath, he praised Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) and vowed to fight for Trump’s agenda in Congress. Let’s be clear—these are the same people who have championed some of the most aggressive book bans in the country, stripping school libraries of literature that teaches history, diversity, and critical thinking.
Censorship isn’t just happening in authoritarian regimes abroad—it’s happening right here in Florida classrooms. Books about civil rights, LGBTQ+ stories, and discussions of systemic racism are being banned under the guise of "protecting children." Meanwhile, the same politicians who push these bans claim they are fighting against censorship. It’s a lie, and we need to call it out. Every child deserves to grow up in a world where they can think freely, learn openly, and challenge ideas.
That’s why I’m running. I will fight to restore the freedom to read, to learn, and to teach the full truth of our history. Can I count on you to rush $9 to our campaign today to fight against carpetbagging politicians? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6433483255394B63386E7070584E7631502B6553734E5134525433495A49706A4F306C372B7273756B5470446F46337457306E77447A4B694B56777A79633344/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-24%20at%209.54.45%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Florida’s students deserve better than political games. If you agree, I need you with me in this fight.
Thank you for your continued support.
Gay Valimont
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/107746/images/GaySignoff.png]
Paid For By Gay Valimont
Gay Valimont For Congress
PO Box 1258
Gulf Breeze, FL 32562
United States

Top Trump agency recovers eye-popping sum after launching DOGE task force

U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) Secretary Scott Turner announced a new Department of Government Efficiency task force on Thursday to "eliminate waste, fraud and abuse" at his federal agency.

DOGE revealed that $1.9 billion in HUD money had been recovered as of Friday, saying the funds were misplaced during the Biden administration and were "earmarked for the administration of financial services, but were no longer needed."

https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=03dfd3fdcfe36e2a385ceb972ddc8ab635a1f4ea50dd9238010e4c077069d866c3d7e74926032e6081c888907a4932eb13822a3540bce2cd875826170bc6e830

Ed Department cuts $600M in taxpayer-funded grants pushing 'divisive ideologies'

The Department of Education (DOED) is pulling the plug on the use of taxpayer dollars to fund "divisive" and "inappropriate" training programs for educators, announcing hundreds of millions in cuts as the Trump administration cleans house on "wasteful" spending within the federal government.

On Monday, the DOED announced the cancelation of $600 million dollars in grants funding programs that teach educators "divisive ideologies" such as diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) and the "instruction on White privilege and White supremacy."

https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=03dfd3fdcfe36e2af659617f890844fa766f94a4ba943d579e8d5805b7897df9315db4926a9b21446e19e2a0abbc0789e8dc75dd3e41d7f267e4267d0abe6ef0

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Trump and the Billionaire Bros
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=NVS%2Be5v%2BfmgB0IGv2OSES1G3iYv3jhK5zxO7Dyej%2FwWuQhnc5Fx7EOeggYLTlcWnCR1nPemzOvJKF6adFtx59WiKTMUIJg8IXBcTZOR1x05wJikRAAeJlUQjaNrufCUJGqtM6A5XVbT9%2B9ANuPU5v92Z46mhZJZS3kpQKpylXCfMSIlhHRe4%2BQkUBZ%2B7B9zkg7nvuu1iBXokGUIRakMGUyNDz0nwizkZvF1Mtpst7mGBE0iFjceYYjgzTxOmGWQGHee1DyfJlOEfodadoqxA%2BmQtOaNx2yv3tD2trWjfo6TzX8Zihrs61WzGI3zpkFB4zpAtTw2Kx7JC46KlE3a%2FFfziW9iywFCt0kKsBZbnjI2vkDAOnnFS8How0%2BZpzcIDnrelrn6DaKpDn13mhdBQYJojf5ixl4H0IP9B0wDqpuP4WvmsC%2Fx4VmahFv3l3yLa)
---
| |
---
Trump and the Billionaire Bros have cut off and delayed funding that everyday Americans rely on. All to pay for huge tax cuts to benefit themselves.

If the freeze continues, millions of people, including children, will be hurt. **Trump needs to end this madness now.

[But we know that Trump doesn’t do anything that doesn’t benefit him directly. That’s why we need to work now to put roadblocks in his way.
