[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sX46OGhuxMVezgdAN7s9-o2W6h379-3lnELg2RAyt5c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157406949)
My wife Ayesha and I have an incredible 9-year-old daughter who suffers from a life threatening and incurable chronic illness. Last December we co-wrote a painful piece about how our health insurance company repeatedly denied her the life saving care she needs to live. The piece, [When Insurance Rejects Life Saving Care](https://substack.com/redirect/2162c26f-f2f9-4d58-883e-0c2e2495dc80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), went viral, and currently has more than 100,000 reads across platforms. Now in 2025, that same insurance company has denied our daughter's life saving medication once more--and we're no longer letting this suffering continue in silence. **Let 's Address This.**
**Take a moment to join 117,000+ like-minded activists and subscribe below to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sX46OGhuxMVezgdAN7s9-o2W6h379-3lnELg2RAyt5c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=157406949)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2c69c917-65e3-4091-8ad8-f6e7b672b1d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Credit: Image: Flickr / Michael Fleshman
## Why We're Going Public
This story is one story of millions. It is from the perspective of my opinion, and my lived experience. And in that lived experience, my wife Ayesha and I exhausted every resource we could think of before going public with our daughter's story. We previously did not name the insurance company, Oscar Health, because we had just submitted a claim for our daughter's medication for 2025, had upgraded to their Gold Plan (i.e. the most expensive plan available on the ACA), and hoped perhaps this time they would approve that critical medication. We were wrong, and instead received the below notice--once again rejecting our valid claim, declaring it was "Not Medically Necessary."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32f30bfb-f7bb-4704-8d0a-afbafcf50f91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After taking some time to compose myself and navigate our next steps, I finally decided that staying silent was not a viable path forward. In channeled rage I posted our struggle on social media--a post that also went viral. Remarkably, and unexpectedly, Oscar Health responded to us on Twitter directly.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4050bb51-549d-4772-82e8-7b00d2eaa601?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And then, within 12 hours, on a Sunday no less, Oscar Health called no less than seven times, leaving multiple messages, asking to speak. And just like that, our claim was approved not just for 2025 and not just for the the units of medication we requested--but unlimited units indefinitely (or at least until 2099).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8cebd578-a7b7-4a58-8a68-0c6920220c81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For those who have followed my work, you know I've written in detail about [America's Violent Health System](https://substack.com/redirect/50f22995-3bec-410c-a6d4-801760fa8352?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which enables 68,000 annual preventable deaths per the Lancet, and enables 500,000 annual medical bankruptcies. You've seen my research [debunking every prominent myth against universal healthcare as a human right](https://substack.com/redirect/8341d0da-28bc-49c8-bc67-042833cd01c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and making the case to ensure we move to a guaranteed healthcare system without insurance executives standing between us and our doctors. You've read my work where I've detailed the exploitative nature of [HELL Corporations ](https://substack.com/redirect/e29ff6a7-2e49-483a-9a44-96593c252342?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)(Health Exploitation Limited Liability Corporations) and how they exist not to protect our health, but to exploit our illnesses. Meanwhile, as insurance corporations deny us the care we need, they profit more than $88 Billion annually across industries.1
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sX46OGhuxMVezgdAN7s9-o2W6h379-3lnELg2RAyt5c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=157406949)
## Questions That Demand Answers
I share all this to prove a simple point.
It should not take someone who has researched the health insurance industry for years, who has worked as a human rights attorney for decades, and who has millions of social media followers, for a HELL Corporation to finally do what is right and provide the life saving healthcare a 9-year-old girl needs to live. Meanwhile, a plethora of questions need answering. What would happen to our daughter if any of the following were true?
* What if my wife and I were uninformed on the exploitative insurance industry in the United States and didn't know how to get our daughter the care she needed?
* What if we did not know or realize that it is _not_ normal that Oscar wrongfully rejected our valid claim 13 times (as the Oscar rep who called confirmed to me)?
* What if our financial situation was one in which we could not simply tighten our belts (which we absolutely did) to afford the absurd out of pocket costs--in addition to our Oscar premiums--to ensure our daughter did not die?
* What if my wife did not have the ability or time to spend literally hundreds of hours on the phone, dealing with insurance bureaucrats, hospital administrators, doctors, labs, and billing departments to navigate the dystopian maze that is the for profit health insurance industry?
* What if we did not learn about going directly to the drug manufacturer to ask them to provide the drug at a subsidized cost?
* What if we could not afford the hospital expenses, which ran into the thousands, after Oscar denied that coverage too?
* What if I did not have millions of social media followers as a platform to publicize these injustices and place public pressure on Oscar to approve our claim?
* What if my daughter was not still with us, but in the time it took to get the medication she needed, succumbed to becoming a statistic as one of the 68,000 Americans who annually die preventable deaths because the for-profit insurance industry denied her the care and medication she needed to live?

The harsh truth is that none of the above are hypotheticals, because at least one, if not all of them apply to every single person in this country. None of this suffering is necessary. All of it is preventable. And that can only happen when we recognize--as the vast majority of our nation has2--that healthcare must be a human right guaranteed to all people, not a for profit enterprise for the select few. But since we remain the only developed country on Earth without healthcare as a human right, here is how you can best protect yourself in response to denied care.
## How to Respond to Denied Care
Here are the steps Ayesha and I took to ensure our daughter got the care she needs. This is not an exhaustive list, but it is a list I wish we had when she was born nearly a decade ago.
1. Appeal every denial. Do not let HELL Corporations get away with a simple denial. Appeal, appeal, appeal, and demand they put their rejection explanation in writing. According to the American Medical Association, more than 82% of initial rejects are overturned on appeal.3 This is a wholly unnecessary and cruel hoop to force unwell people to jump through, but this is the current reality until we can pressure HELL Corporations to act with more expediency the first time. To this day I still do not understand why Oscar rejected our daughter's life saving medication 13 times. So, suffice it to say, do not stop appealing.
2. Seek "peer to peer" reviews, in which your physician prescribing the medication has the opportunity to speak with the HELL Corporation bureaucrats directly on a live call. Remember, it is impossible for HELL Corporations to be experts on every medical condition out there--they're not doctors (even though apparently no one told them that). Your doctor is your best advocate--have them go to bat for you.
3. Go directly to the drug manufacturer. As was the case for us, when HELL Corporations refuse to fulfill their duty, some drug manufacturers are willing to provide the drug at a lower or subsidized cost. This is not an endorsement of the Big Pharma industry, it is an acknowledgement of one more option that may exist to procure the medication your doctor has prescribed for you.
4. Publicize your story. Almost all of the above failed for Ayesha and I, but once we publicized our story, we saw a shift. Recall that last year when Blue Cross and Blue Shield announced a limit on anesthesia, then quickly reversed after public outrage and condemnation.4 Raise your voice and tell your story--it matters.
5. Be an ally to each other. I am hopeful our daughter's story is a reminder that this is not a battle between left and right, between MAGAs and Liberals, between Progressives and Moderates--this is class warfare of the wealthy elite against the working class. And for us to get through this, it is critical we look out for one another and elevate each other. You can be an ally by elevating the stories of those around you who are being denied care, especially for critical medications for cancer, chronic illnesses, or disabling diseases. Let HELL Corporations feel the pressure of public backlash against their unjust policies.

[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..sX46OGhuxMVezgdAN7s9-o2W6h379-3lnELg2RAyt5c?&gift=true)
## Conclusion
This was never about our daughter alone, but about every child and every person denied the care they need. It's why I spoke up loudly for universal healthcare as a human right _before_ our daughter was diagnosed with this life threatening illness, and why I will continue to speak up even after she's ostensibly getting the care she needs (though to be sure, my lawyer dad brain keeps me skeptical for now).
I am here to provide my platform as a resource for readers and for the benefit of the public interest--because healthcare access impacts us all. **If you have suffered rejection of life critical medication from your HELL Corporation, please email me your story at qasim.rashid@gmail.com and I will do my best, within my capacity, to publicize your story.** I want to do everything in my power to ensure the HELL Corporation denying you the care you need is publicly held accountable for their cruelty and greed. And while I can make no guarantees of resolution, I can do my best to ensure we are not silent. I do not care of your political affiliation, status, or faith--if a HELL Corporation is exploiting you, I will do my best to elevate your struggle and join your fight for human rights and justice. We will use the power of this platform to peacefully rebuke the violence imposed on us by HELL Corporations.
We are in this together. We will only survive if we work together. Let's get to work and end this hell imposed upon us.
**Thank you for your trust and support. I am doing everything in my power to counter injustice. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

clean_body: Our insurance company rejected the life saving medication our daughter needed for at least the 13th time, so we went public, and guess what happened next? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! Our insurance company rejected the life saving medication our daughter needed for at least the 13th time, so we went public, and guess what happened next? | | | Feb 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | My wife Ayesha and I have an incredible 9-year-old daughter who suffers from a life threatening and incurable chronic illness. Last December we co-wrote a painful piece about how our health insurance company repeatedly denied her the life saving care she needs to live. The piece, , went viral, and currently has more than 100,000 reads across platforms. Now in 2025, that same insurance company has denied our daughter's life saving medication once more--and we're no longer letting this suffering continue in silence. Let 's Address This. Take a moment to join 117,000+ like-minded activists and subscribe below to Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid. | | ---|---|--- Credit: Image: Flickr / Michael Fleshman Why We're Going Public This story is one story of millions. It is from the perspective of my opinion, and my lived experience. And in that lived experience, my wife Ayesha and I exhausted every resource we could think of before going public with our daughter's story. We previously did not name the insurance company, Oscar Health, because we had just submitted a claim for our daughter's medication for 2025, had upgraded to their Gold Plan (i.e. the most expensive plan available on the ACA), and hoped perhaps this time they would approve that critical medication. We were wrong, and instead received the below notice--once again rejecting our valid claim, declaring it was "Not Medically Necessary." | | ---|---|--- After taking some time to compose myself and navigate our next steps, I finally decided that staying silent was not a viable path forward. In channeled rage I posted our struggle on social media--a post that also went viral. Remarkably, and unexpectedly, Oscar Health responded to us on Twitter directly. | | ---|---|--- And then, within 12 hours, on a Sunday no less, Oscar Health called no less than seven times, leaving multiple messages, asking to speak. And just like that, our claim was approved not just for 2025 and not just for the the units of medication we requested--but unlimited units indefinitely (or at least until 2099). | | ---|---|--- For those who have followed my work, you know I've written in detail about , which enables 68,000 annual preventable deaths per the Lancet, and enables 500,000 annual medical bankruptcies. You've seen my research , and making the case to ensure we move to a guaranteed healthcare system without insurance executives standing between us and our doctors. You've read my work where I've detailed the exploitative nature of Exploitation Limited Liability Corporations) and how they exist not to protect our health, but to exploit our illnesses. Meanwhile, as insurance corporations deny us the care we need, they profit more than $88 Billion annually across industries.1 Questions That Demand Answers I share all this to prove a simple point. It should not take someone who has researched the health insurance industry for years, who has worked as a human rights attorney for decades, and who has millions of social media followers, for a HELL Corporation to finally do what is right and provide the life saving healthcare a 9-year-old girl needs to live. Meanwhile, a plethora of questions need answering. What would happen to our daughter if any of the following were true? What if my wife and I were uninformed on the exploitative insurance industry in the United States and didn't know how to get our daughter the care she needed? What if we did not know or realize that it is not normal that Oscar wrongfully rejected our valid claim 13 times (as the Oscar rep who called confirmed to me)? What if our financial situation was one in which we could not simply tighten our belts (which we absolutely did) to afford the absurd out of pocket costs--in addition to our Oscar premiums--to ensure our daughter did not die? What if my wife did not have the ability or time to spend literally hundreds of hours on the phone, dealing with insurance bureaucrats, hospital administrators, doctors, labs, and billing departments to navigate the dystopian maze that is the for profit health insurance industry? What if we did not learn about going directly to the drug manufacturer to ask them to provide the drug at a subsidized cost? What if we could not afford the hospital expenses, which ran into the thousands, after Oscar denied that coverage too? What if I did not have millions of social media followers as a platform to publicize these injustices and place public pressure on Oscar to approve our claim? What if my daughter was not still with us, but in the time it took to get the medication she needed, succumbed to becoming a statistic as one of the 68,000 Americans who annually die preventable deaths because the for-profit insurance industry denied her the care and medication she needed to live? The harsh truth is that none of the above are hypotheticals, because at least one, if not all of them apply to every single person in this country. None of this suffering is necessary. All of it is preventable. And that can only happen when we recognize--as the vast majority of our nation has2--that healthcare must be a human right guaranteed to all people, not a for profit enterprise for the select few. But since we remain the only developed country on Earth without healthcare as a human right, here is how you can best protect yourself in response to denied care. How to Respond to Denied Care Here are the steps Ayesha and I took to ensure our daughter got the care she needs. This is not an exhaustive list, but it is a list I wish we had when she was born nearly a decade ago. 1. Appeal every denial. Do not let HELL Corporations get away with a simple denial. Appeal, appeal, appeal, and demand they put their rejection explanation in writing. According to the American Medical Association, more than 82% of initial rejects are overturned on appeal.3 This is a wholly unnecessary and cruel hoop to force unwell people to jump through, but this is the current reality until we can pressure HELL Corporations to act with more expediency the first time. To this day I still do not understand why Oscar rejected our daughter's life saving medication 13 times. So, suffice it to say, do not stop appealing. 2. Seek "peer to peer" reviews, in which your physician prescribing the medication has the opportunity to speak with the HELL Corporation bureaucrats directly on a live call. Remember, it is impossible for HELL Corporations to be experts on every medical condition out there--they're not doctors (even though apparently no one told them that). Your doctor is your best advocate--have them go to bat for you. 3. Go directly to the drug manufacturer. As was the case for us, when HELL Corporations refuse to fulfill their duty, some drug manufacturers are willing to provide the drug at a lower or subsidized cost. This is not an endorsement of the Big Pharma industry, it is an acknowledgement of one more option that may exist to procure the medication your doctor has prescribed for you. 4. Publicize your story. Almost all of the above failed for Ayesha and I, but once we publicized our story, we saw a shift. Recall that last year when Blue Cross and Blue Shield announced a limit on anesthesia, then quickly reversed after public outrage and condemnation.4 Raise your voice and tell your story--it matters. 5. Be an ally to each other. I am hopeful our daughter's story is a reminder that this is not a battle between left and right, between MAGAs and Liberals, between Progressives and Moderates--this is class warfare of the wealthy elite against the working class. And for us to get through this, it is critical we look out for one another and elevate each other. You can be an ally by elevating the stories of those around you who are being denied care, especially for critical medications for cancer, chronic illnesses, or disabling diseases. Let HELL Corporations feel the pressure of public backlash against their unjust policies. Conclusion This was never about our daughter alone, but about every child and every person denied the care they need. It's why I spoke up loudly for universal healthcare as a human right before our daughter was diagnosed with this life threatening illness, and why I will continue to speak up even after she's ostensibly getting the care she needs (though to be sure, my lawyer dad brain keeps me skeptical for now). I am here to provide my platform as a resource for readers and for the benefit of the public interest--because healthcare access impacts us all. If you have suffered rejection of life critical medication from your HELL Corporation, please email me your story at qasim.rashid@gmail.com and I will do my best, within my capacity, to publicize your story. I want to do everything in my power to ensure the HELL Corporation denying you the care you need is publicly held accountable for their cruelty and greed. And while I can make no guarantees of resolution, I can do my best to ensure we are not silent. I do not care of your political affiliation, status, or faith--if a HELL Corporation is exploiting you, I will do my best to elevate your struggle and join your fight for human rights and justice. We will use the power of this platform to peacefully rebuke the violence imposed on us by HELL Corporations. We are in this together. We will only survive if we work together. Let's get to work and end this hell imposed upon us. Thank you for your trust and support. I am doing everything in my power to counter injustice. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- 1 2 70% of Americans support Medicare For All: 3 . 4 Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

subject: supporting our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I understand firsthand how crucial it is to make sure our children have access to a high-quality education.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102356108/528907874/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUzZDg4MjAtM2ZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BscIPMkBznmvhzMknh6FFlXyIaJ2MNyaUxxMvtCLf9o=)

| Peter,

As a mom of three girls in Virginia public schools — one in elementary school, one in middle school, and one in high school — the future of our public schools is personal to me. I understand firsthand how crucial it is to make sure our children have access to a high-quality education.

From addressing Virginia's teacher shortage to making critical investments in our schools, I am committed to ensuring that every child in Virginia receives the quality education they deserve. As Governor, I will prioritize the future of our children by strengthening our schools and supporting our educators.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to abolish the Department of Education — threatening support for Virginia schools. And some Republicans are focused on gutting public education and even banning books.

Here’s my promise: I will always work to make sure that every Virginia student — no matter their ZIP code — has the opportunities, resources, and support they need to thrive. Parents across our Commonwealth deserve a Governor who is dedicated to making Virginia’s K-12 public schools the best in America.

[_**But I can’t do this alone. I need your support to make this vision a reality. Will you stand with me and help make sure that every Virginia student — today, tomorrow, and for generations to come — has the chance to succeed?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102356110/528907875/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzUzZDg4MjAtM2ZlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BscIPMkBznmvhzMknh6FFlXyIaJ2MNyaUxxMvtCLf9o=)

clean_body: I understand firsthand how crucial it is to make sure our children have access to a high-quality education. | = | Peter, As a mom of three girls in Virginia public schools — one in elementary school, one in middle school, and one in high school — the future of our public schools is personal to me. I understand firsthand how crucial it is to make sure our children have access to a high-quality education. From addressing Virginia's teacher shortage to making critical investments in our schools, I am committed to ensuring that every child in Virginia receives the quality education they deserve. As Governor, I will prioritize the future of our children by strengthening our schools and supporting our educators. Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to abolish the Department of Education — threatening support for Virginia schools. And some Republicans are focused on gutting public education and even banning books. Here’s my promise: I will always work to make sure that every Virginia student — no matter their ZIP code — has the opportunities, resources, and support they need to thrive. Parents across our Commonwealth deserve a Governor who is dedicated to making Virginia’s K-12 public schools the best in America. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Tell Congress; No more contracts for SpaceX or Tesla
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

It’s obvious: unelected billionaire Elon Musk is slashing the federal
government to the bone, undermining its ability to function properly, and
intending to privatize much of it through corporate outsourcing to
companies like his.

Musk and DOGE have already laid off thousands of federal workers and civil
servants, including hundreds of FAA air traffic controllers mere weeks
after the worst U.S. commercial airplane crash in decades – only to
suggest bringing in SpaceX to “fix” the problem they created.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250218-stop-funding-spacex-tesla/?source=em20250218-36441&akid=36441%2E1203867%2EFRdROL ]Tweet by Brian O’Blivion, Esq.: To summarize: Elon Musk, in his
government capacity, went into the FAA and fired hundreds of air traffic
controllers. Now two weeks later, Elon Musk, in his capacity as CEO of
SpaceX, is in the FAA looking to privatize the very jobs he eliminated.

SpaceX has already received $20 BILLION in federal government contracts;
the startup company’s valuation increased from $210 billion to $350
billion in a single month after Donald Trump was elected. Tesla also saw
its stock rise recently after the State Department announced it may drop
$400 million on armored electric vehicles from the Musk-owned company.

Trump is letting Musk dismantle our government to enrich himself and other
billionaires like him, but Congress can do something about it.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250218-stop-funding-spacex-tesla/?source=em20250218-36441&akid=36441%2E1203867%2EFRdROL ]If every Democrat and enough Republican members come together, they can
successfully block any new government contracts to Musk’s companies,
forcing him out of our government. Add your name to demand Congress stop
funding SpaceX and Tesla now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/petition-20250218-stop-funding-spacex-tesla/?source=em20250218-36441&akid=36441%2E1203867%2EFRdROL ]Add Your Name

We need leaders in Washington to step up and fight harder to save our
democracy from Musk and Trump’s corporate coup. Thanks for raising your
voice with us.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250218-36441-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36441_1203867_FRdROL&akid=36441%2E1203867%2EFRdROL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36441%2E1203867%2EFRdROL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| 2025 SESSION Wednesday What can you expect?
---
|
### SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM
---
|
# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello 52 House bills are on the Senate floor tomorrow beginning at 11am. Just click the link below to see all of the House bills on the regular calendar on third read.
There are still other bills in a conference committee, waiting for House action and others waiting for Senate action. There are many moving parts now through Saturday, to end with voting on the final budget bill.
It's crunch time as Saturday is the deadline for all work to be done, including the budget.
As always, you can tune in to the Senate floor beginning tomorrow at 11am. Session usually begins with the "morning hour," which is when guests in the gallery are introduced by Senators.
If you tune in at noon, the Senate should be down to legislative business.
If you missed yesterday's floor session, you can watch the replay [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cSf2Z8wL1l0YSQQGaqFuSBauJbe5GuxiEcvrUhgPCBtHudKf4jded8hz8om0R20moFvPDD1B-HfSsiXd2m1SazH0hJaQuU8e-Hr41GAWTsLOM3FfK6Vwth-FlZye5_NRH-pzLiAc14W8DcgYEzn-aSHmmxt0U7FhdNwwewV3_cB7dFAQQM21y0GzAN-G5slSw75FlOhp3phgif4TmmJs2A==&c=WQRWmcT07Ijluj9APi0KbuIhDmHauxt5YJOfAyYKfL9XziEs77mp0g==&ch=a4VQTEZsxm9ePzGy8QWJ8Z10PmkALq_EoNjqwmXFxkhl-MViwhS55g==).

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION Wednesday What can you expect? | SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello 52 House bills are on the Senate floor tomorrow beginning at 11am. Just click the link below to see all of the House bills on the regular calendar on third read. There are still other bills in a conference committee, waiting for House action and others waiting for Senate action. There are many moving parts now through Saturday, to end with voting on the final budget bill. It's crunch time as Saturday is the deadline for all work to be done, including the budget. As always, you can tune in to the Senate floor beginning tomorrow at 11am. Session usually begins with the "morning hour," which is when guests in the gallery are introduced by Senators. If you tune in at noon, the Senate should be down to legislative business. If you missed yesterday's floor session, you can watch the replay ==. | | | | | | | | | | | | == | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | == | | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. body:
Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda will affect more than 22 million people. | | | Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda will affect more than 22 million people, Peter. Our friends, loved ones, coworkers, and neighbors who have made a deep and long-lasting impact on our country are being ruthlessly targeted by the Trump administration’s cruel and damaging policies. But he’s not working alone. Congress is playing a significant role in advancing his anti-immigration agenda. **That’s why we’re pressuring Congress to stop funding ICE and Trump’s deportation machine that’s tearing immigrant families and communities apart.** **[Our team is working around the clock to put an end to Congressional involvement in the Trump administration’s efforts to deport tens of millions of people. Trump has been in office for just under a month, and he’s already incited mass fear and panic across the country. In this short period, he has:
* Invoked an over 200-year-old law once used to intern Japanese-Americans in camps to target immigrants all across the country for mass deportations
* Flown immigrants from the U.S. to Guantánamo Bay, Cuba, as part of his plan to detain as many as 30,000 immigrants
* Ordered ICE agents to start going after immigrants in previously protected areas like churches, schools, and hospitals

While Trump is dead set on targeting immigrant communities, Congress must take action and refuse to approve funds that are bankrolling the Trump administration’s cruel policies.
**[Immigrants all across the country are being hurt by the Trump administration’s inhumane policies every single day, so we don’t have any time to waste. Will you rush in a donation today to help us keep the pressure on Congress to stop funding Trump’s deportation machine?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDU85mvcnzOEcRJLmQkai08ofI-40eyxcGAEV5C271na8OuFYNqcNLa7NYuk3wqmo-QKapKicGsiGLN7PFVpUND4NOHyWysehgvU3BMrdTFWFtWLH20uPoPbj64urbTEV8Mgtg-K9Hjg5lpW6Wa9eu_tMmmP7fUXzdicLk4k62MVj1fUgJd1wgISAwhlhAEiLdDmdvw9Cpyu0xZEINKTFrolTRAgajlpR536Rcn_v35Bvl8MnAVxreiaHeLMmmR0AOk/4e4/9Tt1okAwTOCCkVfcsWTWUg/h7/h001.aOjvo4MmeJ8wCxsUL6hz0Q7DlUj6E-v8xq7bRRluBUQ)**

clean_body: Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda will affect more than 22 million people. | | | Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda will affect more than 22 million people, Peter. Our friends, loved ones, coworkers, and neighbors who have made a deep and long-lasting impact on our country are being ruthlessly targeted by the Trump administration’s cruel and damaging policies. But he’s not working alone. Congress is playing a significant role in advancing his anti-immigration agenda. That’s why we’re pressuring Congress to stop funding ICE and Trump’s deportation machine that’s tearing immigrant families and communities apart. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Trump has been in office for just under a month, and he’s already incited mass fear and panic across the country. In this short period, he has: Invoked an over 200-year-old law once used to intern Japanese-Americans in camps to target immigrants all across the country for mass deportations Flown immigrants from the U.S. to Guantánamo Bay, Cuba, as part of his plan to detain as many as 30,000 immigrants Ordered ICE agents to start going after immigrants in previously protected areas like churches, schools, and hospitals While Trump is dead set on targeting immigrant communities, Congress must take action and refuse to approve funds that are bankrolling the Trump administration’s cruel policies. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. name: John Fetterman
subject: my take on DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
*Of course* I want to save billions of your money + make government more efficient!
#
Derek, the truth is the DOGE mission resonated here in PA — folks everywhere see that our government is broken, and they want it fixed.
And *of course* I want to save billions of your money + make government more efficient! So I’ve tried to look at it with common sense and an open-mind.
**But look, rummaging through your personal sh*t is NOT that.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-9914&refcode2=9914_434096_q-6aIb&akid=9914%2E434096%2Eq-6aIb)
For far too many folks in PA + across the country, this is causing **chaos and confusion.** They want their personal info secured + taxes spent wisely – *both* should be priorities.
I’ve always been clear: I will work with ANYONE to get good stuff done for PA, and I’ll always stand up against attacks on our rights – **and damn right that includes privacy.**
[**But Derek, I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me, will you kick in $5 to help me keep fighting these fights in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-9914&refcode2=9914_434096_q-6aIb&akid=9914%2E434096%2Eq-6aIb)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250218?amount=5&refcode=em20250218-9914&refcode2=9914_434096_q-6aIb&akid=9914%2E434096%2Eq-6aIb)**
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250218-9914-footer&t=1&refcode2=9914_434096_q-6aIb&akid=9914%2E434096%2Eq-6aIb)**

---
Next Gen Latino Vote with Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 4
| Chuck and Mike sit down with **Christina Tzintzún Ramirez, Executive Director of Next Gen America** , to dive deep into the transformative power of **young Latino voters**. The conversation unpacks how economic hardship, social isolation, and innovative digital outreach—from barbershop events to gaming platforms—are reshaping political allegiances. Discover why **the youth vote is the cornerstone of the Latino vote** and what both parties must do to truly invest in this pivotal demographic, all while finding hope amid a rapidly shifting political landscape.
---
|
---
| | | |

[The Latino Vote Podcast's latest guest Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez Website](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=b7e3de9422&e=5bd167f239) By: Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez

name: Blue Arizona
subject: Our plan for 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102356638/528909808/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMwYmFmZWItNDFlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4yJfhh8oHIlkQSedCvr8KDUF7_wGmrEFoZhBG7nlS0=)
---
Team, We have a crucial opportunity to secure a blue Arizona by 2026, but we must act now. Your support will fuel early grassroots investments, empowering us to plan big and create bold strategies that engage Arizonans statewide, from Bisbee to Bullhead City. **[If you’re ready to defeat the MAGA movement and empower everyday Arizonans — pitch in right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102356640/528909810/-94917156?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMwYmFmZWItNDFlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4yJfhh8oHIlkQSedCvr8KDUF7_wGmrEFoZhBG7nlS0=)** | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102356642/528909812/-94917156?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMwYmFmZWItNDFlZS1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4yJfhh8oHIlkQSedCvr8KDUF7_wGmrEFoZhBG7nlS0=)
---
We're facing tough battles ahead. House Republicans have targeted three seats in Arizona to expand Speaker Mike Johnson’s _extremely_ narrow House majority. Grassroots contributions will also support Democrats in competitive re-election campaigns, like Governor Hobbs, **_who is already facing a MAGA challenger._**

Businessman Kevin O'Leary **[SHOCKED Democrats on CNN](https://substack.com/redirect/5244d964-d7bb-4603-b9df-35c3466bcbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by saying he doesn't think Trump and Elon are moving fast enough or cutting enough from bloated federal agencies like USAID.
"Cut, cut, cut, more, more, more!!" O'Leary said bluntly, the the horror of the other panelists.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5244d964-d7bb-4603-b9df-35c3466bcbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5244d964-d7bb-4603-b9df-35c3466bcbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I think the issue is, they are not whacking enough!" he added. "All of these agencies are like big fat chickens dripping over barbecues of fat!!"
"I don't think it's happening fast enough. They aren't cutting enough! Keep slashing!" O'Leary kept going.
One CNN panelist fired back, "Even people with the nuclear codes? Cut them too?"
**[O'Leary's answered without hesitation,](https://substack.com/redirect/5244d964-d7bb-4603-b9df-35c3466bcbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Cut everything!! Because if you don't see what they're doing and they can't show you that they're adding value, you whack!"
The CNN panelists claimed Elon Musk had to rehire people that he erroneously fired, as if this was a major issue.
"Okay he gets it wrong once in a while, big deal, so what?!" O'leary snapped back.
Watch the meltdown unfold all because of O'Leary's brutally honest comment:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5244d964-d7bb-4603-b9df-35c3466bcbb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# MAGA savage SHUTS DOWN CNN's Pamela Brown for trying to trash DOGE and Elon Musk
GOP Rep. Tim Burchett **[DESTROYED CNN hack Pamela Brown](https://substack.com/redirect/fd545ead-103e-4660-a209-7ad51084f06c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for complaining about President Donald Trump & Elon Musk slashing government waste.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd545ead-103e-4660-a209-7ad51084f06c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd545ead-103e-4660-a209-7ad51084f06c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What do you have to say about what they're doing with the data and why they want access to private tax information from Americans, certainly as a member of the House Oversight Committee you have some questions?!" Brown asked.
Burchett answered decisively, "The only reason you have questions is if you are doing something crooked and you are going to see a lot of Congressmen with red faces when they follow this paper trail back. Where were they fussin' the past 3 or 4 years when hundreds of different groups had access to this information?! Now Elon Musk gets a hold of it and is going to make some changes that need to be made, and you are all pitching a fit!"
Brown interrupted, "No one is disagreeing that there's bloat and waste in the Federal Government, we have been covering it!"
Burchett fired back, "No you haven't! All y'all have done is run down Elon Musk and Donald Trump and you continuously do this, and that is why your ratings are in the tank ma'am!"
Pamela Brown ended the segment after the humiliating roast.
Watch the heated smackdown here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fd545ead-103e-4660-a209-7ad51084f06c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

Team — Our monthly survey is here, but there’s only one question on our minds today: **What do you want to tell Martin Heinrich _right now_?** **[Whether you want to share the issues you’d like to see Martin tackle, your concerns about Trump’s actions, or something that’s bringing you hope — we want to hear what you have to say. Will you take our survey today to let us know what’s top of mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102357129/528911606/-2033340570?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODVjOWZmMC00M2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-AeZQ7K2wxqdOmfxit8fBsY_Ta7xH59hbbLiR6w8ays=&emci=c55c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c85c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102357130/528911607/-2033340570?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODVjOWZmMC00M2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-AeZQ7K2wxqdOmfxit8fBsY_Ta7xH59hbbLiR6w8ays=&emci=c55c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c85c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=252045)
---
It seems nearly impossible to escape headlines about the Trump administration’s latest attacks on workers, our economy, and our environment.
That’s why Martin wants you to raise YOUR voice above the din of Trump’s chaos.
Whether you call your electeds, take to social media to share how you’ve been impacted, or complete surveys like this one — it all shows that folks are paying attention, and we’re taking a stand against lawless actions that cut to the core of our communities.
**[Folks, we want to know what you think. So please, if you have a moment, take our one-question survey today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102357131/528911608/-2033340570?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODVjOWZmMC00M2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-AeZQ7K2wxqdOmfxit8fBsY_Ta7xH59hbbLiR6w8ays=&emci=c55c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=c85c9ff0-43ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=252045)**

Nellie's entire public service career has been fighting for New Jersey families, and that won't stop now that she's in Washington.
— Nellie Pou HQ
| Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same.

## A breakdown of VP Vance's speech overseas that the media is so up in arms about:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/dddd2001-1cde-4eb7-915e-7a915b5cca87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## **Text me!**
Text "SPICER" to (833) 455-4513 to join my text list.
## **Stories I 'm Reading...**
[Associated Press and the White House remain in standoff over access ](https://substack.com/redirect/bdea35a7-728e-4329-b3a5-49f2db34c516?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)-- via Washington Post
[Venting at Democrats and Fearing Trump, Liberal Donors Pull Back Cash](https://substack.com/redirect/6e5a88dd-4b09-46c6-a464-c7568173331f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via New York Times
[Marshall, Durbin raked in donations of swipe fee crackdown](https://substack.com/redirect/7d499f2d-7c15-406c-b37e-32e254158ec7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via Politico
[CNN's Kaitlin Collins Promotes Luigi Mangione Defense Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/ee41fc84-fdf1-4284-95bf-28fe57e46691?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- via Hot Air
## Why Team Trump is Pushing back on the Associated Press
In recent days you may have heard that the Trump White House has "banned" the Associated Press (AP) from being in Oval Office meetings and flying on Air Force One.
The leftists in the press corps are calling this an assault on the First Amendment and freedom of the press.
But there is a lot more to this story - and a lot the AP isn't telling you.
So let's start with why this all started. In one of his first acts back in office on day one, President Trump renamed the Gulf of Mexico the Gulf of America. Federal entities and agencies complied with a the new name and within a short period of time thereafter both Google Maps and Apple Maps recognized it as well.
But the Associated Press did not.
Here's where it gets interesting...

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Elon Musk
is on a quest to DESTROY Social Security with right-wing disinformation
all over the social media website he owns.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21642?t=1011&akid=7725%2E5885482%2ElGLVrj ][IMG]

Musk’s goal is to slash the social safety net, take benefits from tens of
millions of Americans and enrich himself through bloated government
contracts for SpaceX and Tesla.

That’s why his DOGE team is forcing out career officials at the Social
Security Administration and trying to get their hands all over our
personal data.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21642?t=1012&akid=7725%2E5885482%2ElGLVrj ][IMG]

Musk is GUTTING the Social Security Administration. He’s coming for all of
our government services. Our Grassroots Army is fighting back to protect
Social Security from Musk — and we need our entire movement behind us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21642?t=1013&akid=7725%2E5885482%2ElGLVrj ]Will you add your name urging lawmakers to stop Elon Musk from
destroying Social Security and ripping benefits away from seniors across
America?

Musk is claiming widespread fraud in Social Security as a pretense for
taking down the entire program. It’s outrageous, baseless propaganda and
there’s an entire right-wing media ecosystem spreading his lies.

Meanwhile, there is legitimate media explaining that Musk is LYING.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21642?t=1015&akid=7725%2E5885482%2ElGLVrj ][IMG]

name: Supreme Court Alert
subject: Justice Sotomayor SPEAKS OUT!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **BREAKING: Justice Sotomayor speaks out as Trump and Musk escalate attacks on the free press!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&akid=19613%2E9716520%2EJuqtX6)
**Stand with Justice Sotomayor:****[Sign on our MASSIVE Democratic petition by midnight to support freedom of the press!>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&akid=19613%2E9716520%2EJuqtX6)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&akid=19613%2E9716520%2EJuqtX6)
---

Team -- Amid Donald Trump and Elon Musk's calls to demolish vital news sources like MSNBC, PBS, and NPR, Justice Sonia Sotomayor has a _dire warning:_ **Unless we stand up for a free press and independent media, "we're going to lose our democracy."**

Justice Sotomayor is 100% correct. Without reliable sources of truthful information, our country could suffer _unimaginable harm._ But that's exactly what Trump and Musk want!

We can't sit idly by as Trump's attacks on our media expand, so **we've launched an URGENT Rapid Response Petition to show that Democrats support PBS, MSNBC, NPR, and the independent journalism that's vital to our nation.** But as of 5:10 P.M., we're still waiting for your signature, and the petition closes at midnight! **Please, sign on now:**

**[Add your signature IMMEDIATELY to stand with PBS, NPR, MSNBC, and freedom of the press>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&akid=19613%2E9716520%2EJuqtX6)**
| [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21072?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250218-SupremeCourtAlert-SotomayorFreedomOfPress-ETG-sl1&akid=19613%2E9716520%2EJuqtX6)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

Jack Smith, the special counsel who brought two criminal cases
against President Donald Trump, received $140,000 in pro bono legal
services from a prominent Washington law firm before he resigned last
month. Attorney General Pam Bondi instructed a working group to
examine “Weaponization by Special Counsel Jack Smith and his staff
who spent more than $50 million targeting President Trump.

clean_body: Background on Special Counsel Jack Smith receiving a gift of free legal services [Advertisement] [] [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Special counsel Jack Smith discloses ‘gift’ of $140,000 in free legal services [] Source: Politico [] Jack Smith, the special counsel who brought two criminal cases against President Donald Trump, received $140,000 in pro bono legal services from a prominent Washington law firm before he resigned last month. Attorney General Pam Bondi instructed a working group to examine “Weaponization by Special Counsel Jack Smith and his staff who spent more than $50 million targeting President Trump. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] November 25, 2024 Judicial Watch Statement on Jack Smith Dropping Charges Against President Trump [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: The political decision to seek this dismissal is forced recognition that the American people essentially found President Trump innocent of the political and baseless lawfare charges brought against him by the Democratic Party machine. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] February 04, 2025 Court Orders Justice Department to Provide Information on Special Counsel Jack Smith’s Communication with DA Fani Willis [] Source: Judicial Watch [] A federal court ordered the Department of Justice to provide information on communications between Special Counsel Jack Smith and District Attorney Fani Willis regarding the prosecution of then-former President Donald Trump. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] July 15, 2025 Judicial Watch Statement on Judge Cannon’s Decision to Dismiss Trump Documents Prosecution [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton saluted Judge Aileen Cannon for dismissing the documents case against former President Donald Trump, “based on the unlawful appointment and funding” of Special Counsel Jack Smith. | **Happy Black History Month, Peter!** Obviously we celebrate Black History year-round, but we take this month to _really_ focus on the love and sacrifice that Black Americans have put into this country. I wouldn’t be in Congress without trailblazers like civil rights icon and Congressman John Lewis who made sacrifices for a better future – sacrifices like getting arrested over 40 times in his lifelong fight for equality. Rep. Lewis knew that progress requires forging on, even (especially) in the difficult times. **Now, Peter, we’re seeing Black History being scrubbed from American history _right in front of our eyes._** Fascists like DeSantis and Trump are banning books and unraveling whole government agencies to erase our stories. So while there’s no doubt that right now is a difficult time, I ask you to remember this quote from Rep. Lewis: _“Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble.”_ [**_Peter, we can’t let them undo decades of progress and centuries of heroism. Please, rush a donation right now so I can keep making some good, necessary trouble in Congress and fighting for the preservation of Black History. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/eU45mACcUeHcfduTkGN_zw~~/AAPPABA~/HnVEM8gSPOekKz0gfG0MgidhEdfSAMABYNgU8Z7A9sCHHF7hz-QMHhOP083UTRoe9HMIwWFo53dmSUVvVSDbWBw2FTFE_pCLg1b4X5W5w_FkxkibRhUF8bWgHw1AFPpEiK48OoB6fNjeSlSUl71bx6v2vlNt38-3YXNu7foaL3Qb8_PaNk8vUafdai0uiDh0h6cJGZpm2sB5AKePJDB6Z8_Z4sZfMVJbV43rwoSethpJSuovjm8dBcFBIrvf2Gdp4sv-M_Odknlc3JjYJfBW_maLVu--zxvY1nciu81Z0rBXrPL9mDWK5tRaUnA3u8Z5grW2Nwd7uEHsi5CTlcKg4g~~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/4RFMcmbpwvk-0_87OiUPNA~~/AAPPABA~/qjKZruR_eyD3Pj7cj2QP1XwqEVeEWy3dlRta0ZONBh5mN9d4XTIJyS_Hh1Dnbo_FlVTI8GmK1Vtcgfj0CrYrmHG0G2FJMOyooWKNEPG9vwuGBQQMQwd8dDw5t2NoYFdSROS3F6_D2zxdqDZKVZ0mRwUJ3Xsdm0FYJuOqORLLKIBZchZJwU-oAgy7oPPXNBjbD1_sva0ijRIDM3_41HFkSylR4rHkf3TpZZLL4IPRbdtbvjVCkwQvAFSXivOK0ezciJhM0lsistTiiHZxfM85MzVs5YVZ3Whd3Qnfb3_GaqfidmCiy00UFYrPrtdzvh4FOi-qBTGYujNUHxOIaA4e-0wKHLtBN0hh5x29rjPb9d4~)

body:
"To pay for Trump’s tax cuts, House Republicans could raise student loan bills for millions of borrowers" [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102358184/528914777/1107935008?ms=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=HSYWniinjDu1PdXz4mvqw4Eku1rm+bNjIu4ZMet4tfKB9kN3/a9pbby1kGdHJvCI2q5pJ9R8DAVvFCcGqoS8tsKfFbERDl7HxhM37oMT0e/AQ5Gnmntf8MzIjKBEONTNaWiVOVR6NsDKhmx1RViJ7OpXhQ/j+BIsTMTKT97blk4=&refcode2=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWFmNzllOS00N2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2x0vxIU63RBn1PvbQLCeR6NP_8zkRbn5poDR_61ek=&emci=c42244fe-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15820338) **To pay for Trump’s tax cuts, House Republicans could raise student loan bills for millions of borrowers**
* * *
Peter,

Donald Trump and his allies are pushing to expand and extend his disastrous 2017 tax cuts – _the same ones that gave massive breaks to millionaires while leaving working families behind._

And now, Republicans are already eyeing ways to pay for these new handouts for the ultra-rich. Their latest idea? **Jacking up costs for student loan borrowers and working Americans.** That’s not just unfair – it’s unacceptable.

Tax policies should help hardworking families, not Trump’s billionaire friends. In Congress, Kim is fighting to make sure tax policy puts working families first, but we need to show there’s a movement behind her. Add your name now if you agree: [**Tax cuts should benefit the middle class, not the ultra-wealthy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102358185/528914778/1107935008?ms=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=HSYWniinjDu1PdXz4mvqw4Eku1rm+bNjIu4ZMet4tfKB9kN3/a9pbby1kGdHJvCI2q5pJ9R8DAVvFCcGqoS8tsKfFbERDl7HxhM37oMT0e/AQ5Gnmntf8MzIjKBEONTNaWiVOVR6NsDKhmx1RViJ7OpXhQ/j+BIsTMTKT97blk4=&refcode2=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWFmNzllOS00N2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2x0vxIU63RBn1PvbQLCeR6NP_8zkRbn5poDR_61ek=&emci=c42244fe-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15820338) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102358186/528914779/1107935008?ms=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250218_taxcut_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=HSYWniinjDu1PdXz4mvqw4Eku1rm+bNjIu4ZMet4tfKB9kN3/a9pbby1kGdHJvCI2q5pJ9R8DAVvFCcGqoS8tsKfFbERDl7HxhM37oMT0e/AQ5Gnmntf8MzIjKBEONTNaWiVOVR6NsDKhmx1RViJ7OpXhQ/j+BIsTMTKT97blk4=&refcode2=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWFmNzllOS00N2VlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ys2x0vxIU63RBn1PvbQLCeR6NP_8zkRbn5poDR_61ek=&emci=c42244fe-19ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=41af79e9-47ee-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=15820338) Thanks for standing with us,

clean_body: "To pay for Trump’s tax cuts, House Republicans could raise student loan bills for millions of borrowers" To pay for Trump’s tax cuts, House Republicans could raise student loan bills for millions of borrowers Peter, Donald Trump and his allies are pushing to expand and extend his disastrous 2017 tax cuts – the same ones that gave massive breaks to millionaires while leaving working families behind. And now, Republicans are already eyeing ways to pay for these new handouts for the ultra-rich. Their latest idea? Jacking up costs for student loan borrowers and working Americans. That’s not just unfair – it’s unacceptable. Tax policies should help hardworking families, not Trump’s billionaire friends. In Congress, Kim is fighting to make sure tax policy puts working families first, but we need to show there’s a movement behind her. Add your name now if you agree: Thanks for standing with us, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. This is appalling.

Republicans are kissing up to Donald Trump left and right, but this latest attempt is the most embarrassing yet.

They want to add him to Mount Rushmore alongside some of America's best Presidents like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln.

We think this is LAUGHABLE - but Republicans are getting on board!!

[**_So we need to know what the smartest Democrats in your area think:_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59681?t=8&akid=22867%2E4449941%2ECAmQTr)
[**Do you think Donald Trump should be added to Mount Rushmore?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59681?t=9&akid=22867%2E4449941%2ECAmQTr)

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: I’m running for Congress. Join me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86958?t=6&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF) Friend,

My name is Christina Gagnier, and I'm proud to share that I’m launching my campaign for Congress in California’s 40th District. This is where I was born and raised, where I teach at UCI Law School, and where I served on the Chino Valley School Board to fight for our kids’ education.

I’m thrilled to share more about my campaign to flip this seat, but here’s the bottom line: **with the House so narrowly divided, the outcome here could decide majority control in 2026.**

[There’s not a moment to waste, and if we don’t fight back now, we can lose everything. If you’re ready to take action, please chip in a split $10 donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86958?t=7&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF) | [**DONATE $10 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86958?t=8&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
---
The country is at a crossroads, and we are nearing a point of no return.

There was a time when families could afford a home on a single income. When I was in college, a summer job could actually help pay for tuition. It wasn't easy, but the American Dream felt within reach.

Now, paying for health care, education, or a home to raise families feels outright impossible for most. Meanwhile, Trump and Musk want to gut more programs our community relies on like Head Start, Medicare, and Social Security.

Instead of solving problems, politicians like my opponent Young Kim would rather follow orders from Trump and his billionaire donors. While Southern California was burning, Kim was at Mar-a-Lago. That’s not leadership – that’s betrayal.

We have to act now, and I’m stepping up because standing up to bullies is what I have always done:
* I fought back when right-wing extremists tried hijacking our schools while I was on the Chino Valley School Board.
* I protected children from exploitation as part of the California Attorney General’s Cyber Exploitation Task Force.
* I’m stepping up again because Trump, Musk, and their enablers think they can tear apart the Department of Education and steamroll our rights. They’re wrong.

[This is the fight of our lives. We can either roll over and we let them win, or we can take a stand. If you’re with me, chip in a split $10 donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to send a message that we will not back down.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86958?t=9&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Christina Gagnier and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86959?t=10&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86960?t=11&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86961?t=12&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86962?t=13&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86963?t=14&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)
Thank you,

Christina
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18958%2E878179%2E6_1MMF)

name: [1] New Message
subject: Wow: Liberals are going ballistic over DOGE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Will you rise to the occasion and help us defeat the Democrats once and for all?
We’re in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we’re doing:
| |
---
| | | Here's some food for thought:

_Why are the Democrats going COMPLETELY BALLISTIC over Elon Musk, President Trump, Congressional Republicans, and DOGE trying to make our government more efficient and cut costs???_

We're in the midst of a coordinated political ambush to sabotage everything we're doing:
- The Hill fired off this headline: "A tidal wave of resistance is coming for Elon Musk"
- Ranking Member Jaime Raskin raised the idea of IMPEACHING Elon Musk
- Liberals are holding anti-Musk protests in front of government buildings
- Fake News outlets are trashing every plan we come up with
- The Democrat Legal Machine is bogging us down in dozens of court battles

name: Becky Edwards
subject: Governing Group Recognized Nationally!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
A major national spotlight just landed on Governing Group. In today’s New York Times, our work was featured as part of the growing movement in Utah.

| | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f9c673119b&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| | | | | Dear Friend,
A major national spotlight just landed on Governing Group. In today’s _New York Times_ , [our work was featured as part of the growing movement in Utah rejecting political chaos and embracing civility.](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=5d33a0189b&e=6484bb6dd5)
The article recognized what we’ve known all along—voters are exhausted by division and are searching for leaders who prioritize problem-solving over partisanship. That’s exactly what Governing Group stands for.
**Our model is working: 89% of our endorsed candidates won in November,** proving that candidates who commit to civil, solutions-focused leadership can succeed. [**But we need your help to keep this momentum going.**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=8da49f1f67&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| [Chip in to support civility](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e8b9081b52&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
|
Your donation today fuels:✅ Candidate training and coaching✅ Grassroots voter outreach✅ Critical campaign resources like ads and mailers
The fight for a better kind of politics isn’t over. Help us elect more principled leaders who reject political extremism and get things done.
[**Can we count on your support? A contribution of $25, $50, or $100 makes a real difference.**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=d3d3bdc228&e=6484bb6dd5)
Thank you for standing with us in this mission.
Becky
---

|

name: Congresswoman Boebert
subject: I just want to say thanks
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1l91i3jdtgmow43xb7c8cgtczd911kb4yv18fmtirr2zebdr1er83x2o86ibnv4q23tx5b299h129pit2xf&__stmp=srwipu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dapkvfc3csr9e0f33flrpikiajgisdb335ou0q0xmx0cejo85vy73c570swo4twvxrcb1xanalqz8zb3xfjpk86t9fa8eemxmqyyaeexbzpnnf8r55z3yoiki1lt51r0z6yzdr0gh463289oncxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dapkvfc3csr9e0f33flrpikikwjoavyjh2vjbwq8sjyxz825hd9pm9xb6la1x2lxtof12546dz8kwdqkql19wgs7kct7bcxx75ttvmf823qfycjy72cc9ov8wl9qxgkwlso0vhzgc5hevjoz9r1x&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srwipu&__onlt=t]]]]]]

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Dear Peter,
The American people are sicker than ever, but that changes now.
RFK Jr.’s confirmation as Secretary of Health and Human Services marks the beginning of a long-overdue effort to restore real health and stop the chronic disease epidemic.
_“A healthy person has a thousand dreams. A sick person only has one.”_
**Right now, 60% of Americans have only one dream: to get better.** They’re trapped in a system that profits from disease, where new diagnoses mean more prescriptions, not solutions.
Health agencies have ignored root causes and promoted treatments that only manage symptoms. Secretary Kennedy is committed to restoring real health—by investigating environmental toxins, eliminating conflicts of interest in medicine, and demanding accountability from those who have failed the public.
The goal isn’t managing disease—it’s preventing it. The best healthcare system is one where fewer people need it. **That’s the vision for America.**
* * *
If you want to help Secretary Kennedy [retire his campaign debt](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_one_2_17_25&n=5) so he can stay focused on restoring integrity to our health agencies, please consider a contribution today.
[Chip in today](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_one_2_17_25&n=6)
