clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Peter, The American people are sicker than ever, but that changes now. RFK Jr.’s confirmation as Secretary of Health and Human Services marks the beginning of a long-overdue effort to restore real health and stop the chronic disease epidemic. “A healthy person has a thousand dreams. A sick person only has one.” Right now, 60% of Americans have only one dream: to get better. They’re trapped in a system that profits from disease, where new diagnoses mean more prescriptions, not solutions. Health agencies have ignored root causes and promoted treatments that only manage symptoms. Secretary Kennedy is committed to restoring real health—by investigating environmental toxins, eliminating conflicts of interest in medicine, and demanding accountability from those who have failed the public. The goal isn’t managing disease—it’s preventing it. The best healthcare system is one where fewer people need it. That’s the vision for America. * If you want to help Secretary Kennedy so he can stay focused on restoring integrity to our health agencies, please consider a contribution today. subject: More lies from the Left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
Please read this full message
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3cff40f78aa24fe494fcd1f806e86ef3&_e=xPAzY52QgjYB8zj54bzAUKGaKPjbEd2yHlYsAZ-RKChdFfYEl4BOT5bkqfJcV3H1FFzl3TKecUBFs-nVrLrBP5TW-0gBJBhVED_8MQpzXpUkc5hcaHvMLNBPiIF-CLxUhvWJlMj9JQxZ_1eMtPO1bVk3oA0lpt4NjgKY_th52QlUtx67PuI0CtwsvhMVFrE-Bn2mNgOaL6P4oC6nriBO43fwEbeGPmEBDqose5Of8h9hZ1tpqKmj3-Cs0KvEVl3vXF5R2B6L84ACZ17evSRObHcugdgbWYJf3PBDFBJnYxcPziolNGE3vyRESPqwhZHmEn0LsGFLEcbfv7gUm1pxww4s5FiNx93L1xUFbS6n7_C1rh3X53uaH6KmY0ZH1-mluy6Dw3ZzxZvzFHF7AR4TPZSE04b-WG5qjRIdr7ECm28%3D)

Patriot ,

**At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. **

_In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKED**until now.**_

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election.

I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day.

**But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers.** **[They are doing everything they can to stop us and I WON'T TOLERATE IT.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3cff40f78aa24fe494fcd1f806e86ef3&_e=xPAzY52QgjYB8zj54bzAUKGaKPjbEd2yHlYsAZ-RKChdFfYEl4BOT5bkqfJcV3H1FFzl3TKecUBFs-nVrLrBP5TW-0gBJBhVED_8MQpzXpUkc5hcaHvMLNBPiIF-CLxUhvWJlMj9JQxZ_1eMtPO1bVk3oA0lpt4NjgKY_th52QlUtx67PuI0CtwsvhMVFrE-Bn2mNgOaL6P4oC6nriBO43fwEbeGPmEBDqose5Of8h9hZ1tpqKmj3-Cs0KvEVl3vXF5R2B6L84ACZ17evSRObLo4F5ZyxNxblVntV6sGLOjXWxPIKcFGHrWuBYisd-X3sholhqusdU3s6wj4KhTffSKS7zM1FNPnXClYloo6V2sXSVKfmUWIhR2U1dq6xII9PiHk46I2dRGgyUwOBXy7xeDaGxPmLNCWACsagBdLSFo%3D)**

**This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end.**

I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road.

I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3cff40f78aa24fe494fcd1f806e86ef3&_e=xPAzY52QgjYB8zj54bzAUKGaKPjbEd2yHlYsAZ-RKChdFfYEl4BOT5bkqfJcV3H1FFzl3TKecUBFs-nVrLrBP5TW-0gBJBhVED_8MQpzXpUkc5hcaHvMLNBPiIF-CLxUhvWJlMj9JQxZ_1eMtPO1bVk3oA0lpt4NjgKY_th52QlUtx67PuI0CtwsvhMVFrE-Bn2mNgOaL6P4oC6nriBO43fwEbeGPmEBDqose5Of8h9hZ1tpqKmj3-Cs0KvEVl3vXF5R2B6L84ACZ17evSRObEimTGzhI75nlclHxwQ31EXxdLuXUjRcs9QeRZBL44md3tAf_pYXvBFQ9Bte7EaR9smktKh4Yskn4hLhjvY3c0e2AKozU2iFR2muxxa8MaAzml_tEnWRg7u8y-Mho1agpy8XtJy81yGTWamWC60_nVQ%3D)

clean_body: Please read this full message Patriot , At West Point, we had a code: cadets don't lie, cheat, steal, or tolerate those who do. In just a few short weeks, the new administration and Congressional majorities have exposed an egregious amount of WASTE, FRAUD, and ABUSE of taxpayer dollars that has gone UNCHECKEDuntil now. I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and last November I defeated an entrenched career politician in the #1 swing state of the 2024 election. I made a promise to come to the Senate and work with fellow political outsiders like President Trump to shake up Washington, and I'm working to do that every single day. But the entrenched political class is terrified that we are uncovering their decades-long grift of lies and stealing from taxpayers. This is a long message and I hope you will read all the way to the end. I grew up in Bloomsburg, Pennsylvania. We lived on campus at Bloomsburg State College and my parents owned a farm ten minutes down the road. I had summer jobs baling hay and trimming Christmas trees at nearby farms. My dad started his career teaching history, economics, & democracy at Punxsutawney High. My mom began teaching fourth through sixth graders at a public school near Pittsburgh. I'm incredibly proud that my dad was chosen to be president of Bloomsburg State College (now Bloomsburg University) at only 34 years old. I'm so proud of my parents' teaching careers and to have been raised in Bloomsburg. It was there that I wrestled and played football and was nominated to the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. And it was there that I came home to a parade after serving in combat during the Gulf War. After the Army, I earned a Ph.D. in international relations before moving to Pittsburgh to start a career in business. I worked my way up to become the CEO of FreeMarkets, a successful tech startup that employed hundreds in Western Pennsylvania. I was then called to service again, this time in the highest levels of government as Under Secretary of Treasury and as Deputy National Security Advisor. Following this, I joined Bridgewater Associates, one of the largest, most successful investment firms in the world, which manages the pension plans of groups including teachers, firefighters and law enforcement. I have lived the American Dream. When I ran for the U.S. Senate to bring my decades of experience and love for our country to fix our broken economy that is a direct result of policies supported by the far left, I became a national target for outright LIES from mainstream media outlets like The New York Times and CNN. I have been asked why I ran for political office. I opened myself and my family up to attacks from the left, and every day felt like a battle. But I believe in America 's strength and resilience. And I believe our nation needs leaders who place service to others above all else. Thanks to the support of TENS OF THOUSANDS of grassroots patriots, I was able to fight back against the lies with the TRUTH about my life and business record. I'm no stranger to fighting for what is right and if we don 't continue pushing every single day to clean up the mess the career politicians made, we will lose America as we know it! Here's where I need your help, Patriot . We need to combat the Democrats ' lies and attacks with the TRUTH about how American tax dollars are being spent. I hate asking for money -- I'm not a career politician, and it's not in my nature -- but I have no choice but to ask if we're going to hit our fundraising goal this month. The Democrats know if they lose ground to the outsiders working to bring CHANGE, it will be IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to take back their majority in the next election. That's why I'm hoping you can spare Your donation will take us one step closer to bringing the CHANGE Americans voted for in November, and I am so grateful for your support. Thank you, Dave McCormick P.S. Democrats from all over the country are panicking and pulling out all the stops to attack Republicans who are shaking up Washington. Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick. Our mailing address is: PO BOX 23537 PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

Peter, This isn’t like last time around. For much of the first term, the Trump Administration’s incompetence tended to mitigate some of their malevolence. Even then, they still managed to do serious damage to our democracy and enact parts of an extreme agenda when the checks in our Constitutional system didn’t work as they should have. **But now, with a Republican-led Congress seemingly unwilling or incapable to stand up to this administration — or worse, eager to assist its most extreme power grabs — it’s clear that the best check left on Trump’s power is _us_.** _It’s the power of the people — a power that — history proves — is too often underestimated._ When they try to contort electoral maps to sculpt an electorate that’s friendlier to their partisan pursuit of power, it’s on us to push back in the name of fairness. When they try to undermine the census and even change the constitutional definition of citizenship, it’s on us to fight back with everything we’ve got. And when the voters head back to the polls, it’s on us to champion Democracy Defenders who will help right the ship and minimize the damage. [**I can promise you that the NDRC will not back down from these fights — so today, I am personally asking you to make a donation to help fund the hard work of protecting our democracy from those who want to break it.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102360336/528921704/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MidMonth1_email_20250218-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250218-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth1_&utm_campaign=MidMonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzYmM0MTMyLTRlZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JbyaEebv2Ftmj8ifHJIl7Jb5ZRnM0x1DQbfs4CD9_0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

There is no doubt the path ahead will be rocky. We will fight on many fronts and we will lose some battles. But if we don’t fight them, in every way we can, we will lose everywhere and our democracy will be unalterably damaged, if not destroyed.
And listen, there’s no team I’d rather be working alongside. Remember, President Obama and I founded the NDRC just days before Donald Trump was inaugurated in 2017. We quickly learned not just how to play defense but even how to make progress amidst this broken landscape — whether it be by successfully advocating for fair maps or electing pro-democracy champions in state-level races across the country.
**Remember — we are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we still have it in our power to shape our country’s future.**
[**The hard work of fighting for our rights and fighting for what’s right is happening all around us, and we need you with us every step of the way, Peter. Will you make a donation to the NDRC today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/102360343/528921711/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MidMonth1_email_20250218-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth1_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250218-NDRC-Tier1-MidMonth1_&utm_campaign=MidMonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzYmM0MTMyLTRlZWUtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-JbyaEebv2Ftmj8ifHJIl7Jb5ZRnM0x1DQbfs4CD9_0=)

Eric H. Holder, Jr.

clean_body: | Peter, This isn’t like last time around. For much of the first term, the Trump Administration’s incompetence tended to mitigate some of their malevolence. Even then, they still managed to do serious damage to our democracy and enact parts of an extreme agenda when the checks in our Constitutional system didn’t work as they should have. But now, with a Republican-led Congress seemingly unwilling or incapable to stand up to this administration — or worse, eager to assist its most extreme power grabs — it’s clear that the best check left on Trump’s power is us. It’s the power of the people — a power that — history proves — is too often underestimated. When they try to contort electoral maps to sculpt an electorate that’s friendlier to their partisan pursuit of power, it’s on us to push back in the name of fairness. When they try to undermine the census and even change the constitutional definition of citizenship, it’s on us to fight back with everything we’ve got. And when the voters head back to the polls, it’s on us to champion Democracy Defenders who will help right the ship and minimize the damage. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = There is no doubt the path ahead will be rocky. We will fight on many fronts and we will lose some battles. But if we don’t fight them, in every way we can, we will lose everywhere and our democracy will be unalterably damaged, if not destroyed. And listen, there’s no team I’d rather be working alongside. Remember, President Obama and I founded the NDRC just days before Donald Trump was inaugurated in 2017. We quickly learned not just how to play defense but even how to make progress amidst this broken landscape — whether it be by successfully advocating for fair maps or electing pro-democracy champions in state-level races across the country. Remember — we are still in control of our own destiny. We are the stewards of our democracy. And we still have it in our power to shape our country’s future. = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2de203a8a4df4a9db0af2f2becef710f&_e=_X1VKcsGyMaNQB2C7G1H7J7loa8wzwJui5103x0HM1Z2ajwv0XN2R8Hb1bZ089XrnYB2O7GwEOl4fFIaFUnbBjekgVfAwQ1ZP40ebOM53QTSYAi6iv96AJ3oXk89ZFUP2mtX7McSDRNpkP09IzAiKNUDLiZeuG0uFnGjzwglyp0-JSriSJQYJbPJ-jinQQJ4EwCXQh80mihf6MD8pe6YNM5cT6Gf9FbXx1_L_wtkA7ue6p_aJBTWH2b5xm5ngCTiqbQ8twvgc2ZbbeGzcYNQhXV9fuuNWDN7FGT2yPUwkzWtdWjqLPtkHFumIoIIjumlNgpblqm3u5mv8m_NrZd4h9JphQsTl5ViyysKe0GJcETlud1Sm86SvKDm9upAxJJlx_8QZWMU20C8srOAetPEOUhnLJR1Y7IOlUUb4s7VUBgInbCcK6A6LEXb4W3rlVv-)

| | Peter, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2de203a8a4df4a9db0af2f2becef710f&_e=_X1VKcsGyMaNQB2C7G1H7J7loa8wzwJui5103x0HM1Z2ajwv0XN2R8Hb1bZ089XrnYB2O7GwEOl4fFIaFUnbBjekgVfAwQ1ZP40ebOM53QTSYAi6iv96AJ3oXk89ZFUP2mtX7McSDRNpkP09IzAiKNUDLiZeuG0uFnGjzwglyp0-JSriSJQYJbPJ-jinQQJ4EwCXQh80mihf6MD8pe6YNM5cT6Gf9FbXx1_L_wtkA7ue6p_aJBTWH2b5xm5ngCTiqbQ8twvgc2ZbbeGzcYNQhXV9fuuNWDN7FGT2yPUwkzVougq3-FvXgd6eA-xKkxRdhy4bQCUzqL-A-qrQX8ETwz1-otcTdE5RH1Fh_yuAplONtojguj8g0cxBFq3XvDNdkuef6Z8PaFkNlOVMbaVvQPAULfqB-bvm_kAGfcfGweaAf1YCdYOOd3TicD6ejtmV)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2de203a8a4df4a9db0af2f2becef710f&_e=_X1VKcsGyMaNQB2C7G1H7J7loa8wzwJui5103x0HM1Z2ajwv0XN2R8Hb1bZ089XrnYB2O7GwEOl4fFIaFUnbBjekgVfAwQ1ZP40ebOM53QTSYAi6iv96AJ3oXk89ZFUP2mtX7McSDRNpkP09IzAiKNUDLiZeuG0uFnGjzwglyp0-JSriSJQYJbPJ-jinQQJ4EwCXQh80mihf6MD8pe6YNM5cT6Gf9FbXx1_L_wtkA7ue6p_aJBTWH2b5xm5ngCTiqbQ8twvgc2ZbbeGzcYNQhXV9fuuNWDN7FGT2yPUwkzWFaRQiNs9dt0PprInABLT6f2tWoDCPg3_1YBWIW7BRVKqm8zSw0uEOFCqq4u9ij8tTts8SgoT4xeHACqkQplDnwn-f-2Msjl5GNfEZp-bTkoZPt7-_LiK-L7gIzcO8CBCL06RMERzYzXRVJEnL8PJO)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2de203a8a4df4a9db0af2f2becef710f&_e=_X1VKcsGyMaNQB2C7G1H7J7loa8wzwJui5103x0HM1Z2ajwv0XN2R8Hb1bZ089XrnYB2O7GwEOl4fFIaFUnbBjekgVfAwQ1ZP40ebOM53QTSYAi6iv96AJ3oXk89ZFUP2mtX7McSDRNpkP09IzAiKNUDLiZeuG0uFnGjzwglyp0-JSriSJQYJbPJ-jinQQJ4EwCXQh80mihf6MD8pe6YNM5cT6Gf9FbXx1_L_wtkA7ue6p_aJBTWH2b5xm5ngCTiqbQ8twvgc2ZbbeGzcYNQhXV9fuuNWDN7FGT2yPUwkzVYswoWx4XDJQS88HeuH0FF9_afEAOypmrpZweyVRHzevlNT_ISpF1sslusiy-1AxzlcLBedzvGZ-y2_cDeYim6sNMrgk-2rrGcPu9IuyF8XtSAjTfxTL8U93_jHBJPgTGCPMfX2_01CiTyICIrp7SN).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Peter,

**The federal government is not the solution to improving our nation 's education system.**

Our children deserve an education system that sets them up for success. This starts and ends at the local level. Parents, students, and local administrators can work together to create viable solutions to improve our existing public schools.

_The federal government has no business dictating what our children can and cannot learn._

I stand with President Trump and DOGE as they work to eliminate government waste, including in the Department of Education.

As we work to make our government efficient again, I'm requesting your input:

[**DO YOU SUPPORT PRESIDENT TRUMP AND DOGE SHUTTING DOWN THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=58fba673640246878e197482f805b5cb&_e=yYzVqD6Mck72xZIqJrwck-KzkpQI2ktJP5eGUyLXI5o2UbI6eU_e-OxIvr7DlA-4SXEn8buvEde9nxzHY__qsELtwwgbpP7iv6TNcfYigtEQ6uZgImIJ0MG0g8NdAKI2BladABPemFaH2qHYE8CDY44oeMg4Bd4HtiUPDXe0OCgFbAS50meKBoilh_HSaLUxzeHWMqztOGxoBUgz0rHgS6ixXaY9o799MTT7p6nrFzvaPfP8wFQKT5jUufgcw9co0haSoi1pBBOO5lJkOi7EwWQJGGDVvGtyKHXyt2IIyAzuja8q6PimtLADo_fk7lcuQUJPv8ctkTzZltg_cvwCLg%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=58fba673640246878e197482f805b5cb&_e=yYzVqD6Mck72xZIqJrwck-KzkpQI2ktJP5eGUyLXI5o2UbI6eU_e-OxIvr7DlA-4SXEn8buvEde9nxzHY__qsELtwwgbpP7iv6TNcfYigtEQ6uZgImIJ0MG0g8NdAKI2BladABPemFaH2qHYE8CDY44oeMg4Bd4HtiUPDXe0OCgFbAS50meKBoilh_HSaLUxNrTU9U8nPqXdFm02tVbjV3v70f08VJPRfek35HSh-T3HKLU5EFvd82OuL4_vcJ5avd_ZXqfvZylCJuZgGURMFhFJizH3YqbtZMR7Q4sbjE5x_NuEy4ZJ7nJm9X1M4o6ngpmxbZMtwb-62evq2u5vUw%3D%3D)

clean_body: The federal government has no business dictating what our children can and cannot learn. | Peter, The federal government is not the solution to improving our nation 's education system. Our children deserve an education system that sets them up for success. This starts and ends at the local level. Parents, students, and local administrators can work together to create viable solutions to improve our existing public schools. The federal government has no business dictating what our children can and cannot learn. I stand with President Trump and DOGE as they work to eliminate government waste, including in the Department of Education. As we work to make our government efficient again, I'm requesting your input: | Your input is crucial to shaping our future. Thank you, Tommy Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND PO Box 590012, Birmingham, Alabama 35259 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

subject: On the chopping block: The Department of Education.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Meanwhile, Republicans in Ohio are proposing cuts to school funding.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102360760/528922932/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250218chopping_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWE4Zjc0YS01MGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MoCNoY9p0dSbBwKc_XVs7cm70DEjKOPX7w8_XAWxig=) **On the chopping block: The Department of Education.**

You read that right, Peter. In alignment with Trump’s Project 2025, the administration is working to ELIMINATE the Department of Education.

First, Trump is directing the Secretary of Education, Linda McMahon, to develop a plan to gut the department, telling her that he expects her to “put herself out of a job.” Then, he called on Congress to **_end_** the department.

**This is just the latest attack on Trump’s efforts to dismantle our government and put the American people at risk.** Among other critical functions, the department helps to bolster education for low-income students and children with disabilities. Now, Trump wants to strip that support away from states.

Meanwhile, Republicans in Ohio are proposing cuts to school funding. Where does it end?

**Republicans up and down the ballot are working to slash education to our children in the name of politics. We should be supporting the next generation – instead, they are stripping away their opportunities for a brighter future.** [**It’s disgusting. clean_body: Meanwhile, Republicans in Ohio are proposing cuts to school funding. = On the chopping block: The Department of Education. You read that right, Peter. In alignment with Trump’s Project 2025, the administration is working to ELIMINATE the Department of Education. First, Trump is directing the Secretary of Education, Linda McMahon, to develop a plan to gut the department, telling her that he expects her to “put herself out of a job.” Then, he called on Congress to end the department. This is just the latest attack on Trump’s efforts to dismantle our government and put the American people at risk. Among other critical functions, the department helps to bolster education for low-income students and children with disabilities. Now, Trump wants to strip that support away from states. Meanwhile, Republicans in Ohio are proposing cuts to school funding. Where does it end? Republicans up and down the ballot are working to slash education to our children in the name of politics. We should be supporting the next generation – instead, they are stripping away their opportunities for a brighter future. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = In solidarity, Team Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/102360825/528923010/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250218_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmE4Zjc0YS01MGVlLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NiBBBlQIE1o4NyJwbm6fyptK8dP94ZxoISbLvZvPrvs=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Daniel Greenfield
subject: These individuals have enormous power and zero accountability
body:
| | | The results? A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people.
---
| |
---
| | Friend, For decades, the **USAID** has operated as a rogue entity, funneling billions of taxpayer dollars into wasteful, left-wing pet projects and even terrorist organizations—with virtually no oversight or accountability.The results? A shocking record of waste and outright betrayal of the American people. Here are just a few examples of what _Freedom Center Investigates_ ' exclusive investigation found.USAID has been directing YOUR tax dollars to enemy countries:
---
**$2.3B** to Somalia including **$200,000** for global warming prep **$3.7B** for Afghanistan including **$16** million to promote “positive masculinity”**$3.4B** to Yemen including for an “art exhibition” while our countries are at war**$700M** to Iraq including opening the first movie theater in Nineveh**$3.4B** to Syria including almost a million COVID masks**$1.1B** to Lebanon including or promoting “youth activism”
---
Our investigation found that USAID spent over $18 billion on Islamic terror states and $9.3 billion on countries responsible for killing over 3,000 American soldiers.It's outrageous. And that's just the beginning.And how did they get away with it _?_**_Because MASSIVE government unions have been protecting these bureaucrats from accountability..._** Friend, it’s time to take them down. Gutting the agencies is not enough – the unions who have facilitated this madness must go.** ** **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d83530df7fd945db987f1b3888f5aeff&_e=z7qQkopYDkguev1clN0Efejiq4BmHsV7D532CrrJQkpkXOYaFJRCsyoAzlaS9QDXObDbZDKzQLhjqUdKsVgM_7-5gJFO9BqcBitendpOZ-cmYzKzGb0_SfmjO7ONYFEA9HNA-QrUlCvKy2Qjnyy1YSX82vXCow8-ykHndRnN5cHow0SmtOY41bVMHwP0SATWtwPSe56NcfxfuyVhdH1XV80hMMxJ87B2MsMMeFHdvHbdUNCElI3s-bC6tXLXt3A9PYxu7VcnK0pVhOLaSm5hqZs5wiTZ5d_oncshCjWgErIU6l8x-nuRI36xUUKgxpiqcKskSF9GnAmBBNMriuIH1buoG5XPoRkq8qma8oGwzemryAk2b9MjnTUUjEWEJhLWJx2U-izl5LRU94UvZ5Eud5sUy464Lw0iTePCW6cEqn0%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%.__ _
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d83530df7fd945db987f1b3888f5aeff&_e=z7qQkopYDkguev1clN0Efejiq4BmHsV7D532CrrJQkpkXOYaFJRCsyoAzlaS9QDXObDbZDKzQLhjqUdKsVgM_7-5gJFO9BqcBitendpOZ-cmYzKzGb0_SfmjO7ONYFEA9HNA-QrUlCvKy2Qjnyy1YSX82vXCow8-ykHndRnN5cHow0SmtOY41bVMHwP0SATWtwPSe56NcfxfuyVhdH1XV80hMMxJ87B2MsMMeFHdvHbdUNCElI3s-bC6tXLXt3A9PYxu7VcnK0pVhOLaSm5hqcfrg1CsugZD0em3qHDNPeYa8GK4S0IgcOVnbqwf0iX9lKZ1sjWUR8ZEAYZT47QmYkFrvuel5PCXGdVg0y1n2r0Zgx02PmoClf5Sx54gdURx3BbGlp6ifnohgWK9uavX8D-DtVN88_E6llWABYvJ_yc%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servants”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability. It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America.Today, I’m asking you to help the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d83530df7fd945db987f1b3888f5aeff&_e=z7qQkopYDkguev1clN0Efejiq4BmHsV7D532CrrJQkpkXOYaFJRCsyoAzlaS9QDXObDbZDKzQLhjqUdKsVgM_7-5gJFO9BqcBitendpOZ-cmYzKzGb0_SfmjO7ONYFEA9HNA-QrUlCvKy2Qjnyy1YSX82vXCow8-ykHndRnN5cHow0SmtOY41bVMHwP0SATWtwPSe56NcfxfuyVhdH1XV80hMMxJ87B2MsMMeFHdvHbdUNCElI3s-bC6tXLXt3A9PYxu7VcnK0pVhOLaSm5hqYSWFHpExdZTFov9NwGPPWk_Z5ZkpJ6GawF9fnKFBcOeGM6IzaktuGIJ5XQkAm6sVwjrZzX7U8ijWoiiwR1ZN36VmzYywK28WKF0FUlGR1mZTnmThOEveQ-s0WlFBev_yxzKUxFtRNydo6c00nrU27k%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. We’re gaining traction, spreading the word, and getting results.And our investigative journalism is being amplified by huge names like **Elon Musk, Charlie Kirk, Steve Bannon, Mark Levin, Ayaan Hirsi Ali, Larry Elder.** Now is the time to push forward while we have the momentum. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=d83530df7fd945db987f1b3888f5aeff&_e=z7qQkopYDkguev1clN0Efejiq4BmHsV7D532CrrJQkpkXOYaFJRCsyoAzlaS9QDXObDbZDKzQLhjqUdKsVgM_7-5gJFO9BqcBitendpOZ-cmYzKzGb0_SfmjO7ONYFEA9HNA-QrUlCvKy2Qjnyy1YSX82vXCow8-ykHndRnN5cHow0SmtOY41bVMHwP0SATWtwPSe56NcfxfuyVhdH1XV80hMMxJ87B2MsMMeFHdvHbdUNCElI3s-bC6tXLXt3A9PYxu7VcnK0pVhOLaSm5hqZvAk3X69MeaYnWouG7CUwx-yegdZCv71AuQG2tyLVaQzx3O-EeMhjDx_qDxr_qE1EaDL1NJs5u5VoFcnjoxtjC53g9a39ePPcGNc84cfd3dsSqtnnZIIVkIBwsgE8yPTEXt76mD-a6lT2MXV5zDxxw%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a generous renewal contribution** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.As a friend of the Freedom Center you know that we will maximize every dollar you contribute. So please hurry. With your renewed support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
**Daniel Greenfield,**_Shillman Fellow and Journalist_ David Horowitz Freedom Center

name: DNC HQ
subject: Here is what Democrats are doing to stand up to Trump and Elon Musk:
body:
---
Derek, Democrats are standing up to Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Here’s what’s happened in the last few weeks:
1. Every single Senate Democrat voted against confirming RFK Jr. as secretary of Health and Human Services, and Tulsi Gabbard as director of national intelligence.
2. A coalition of 191 House and Senate Democrats sent a letter demanding the removal of Elon Musk’s operatives from the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.
3. The DNC has filed an amicus brief in a case against the Georgia State Election Board, part of Democrats’ continued efforts to protect Georgians from Republicans’ shameless attacks on their voting rights.
4. Governor Josh Shapiro is taking legal action to defend Pennsylvania’s funding from the Trump administration’s freeze.
5. Democratic attorneys general filed a federal lawsuit to challenge the decisions Elon Musk has made within DOGE.
6. House and Senate Democrats rallied outside the Department of Veterans Affairs to stand for veterans and VA workers.
7. Senator Chris Murphy and Representative Maxwell Frost introduced the Office of Gun Violence Prevention Act, after Trump eliminated the office in the first few days of his presidency.
8. Representative Sharice Davids pushed the Department of Transportation to implement FAA safety reforms that Congress passed last year to improve air traffic control.
9. Representative Pramila Jayapal reintroduced the We the People Amendment to reverse the _Citizens United_ decision and stop corporations from controlling politics.
10. Arkansas Senate Democrats successfully voted down a bill to allow municipalities to remove fluoride from their water systems.

Democrats will keep doing everything in our power to protect Americans from Trump and Elon Musk’s disastrous agenda — and we’ll keep you updated as the work continues. Thank you, The Democrats **The road to taking back Congress — and ultimately the White House — starts right here, with this team.** **[Can you make a $3 contribution now to help fund the DNC’s work to elect as many Democrats as possible, all over the country?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250218_2813_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2813_22930333_ckfcI1&akid=2813%2E22930333%2EckfcI1)** _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250218_2813_fr&refcode2=2813_22930333_ckfcI1&akid=2813%2E22930333%2EckfcI1)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This is complete trash
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Elon Musk and Donald Trump just fired 1000 VA staff, many of them veterans themselves. All of those staff in one way or another served veterans, or their families, or the people they left behind.
#

I’m sick of hearing about how Trump loves veterans, Peter.
Complete garbage.
Elon Musk and Donald Trump just fired 1000 VA staff, many of them veterans themselves. All of those staff in one way or another served veterans, or their families, or the people they left behind.
He just told all the people depending on VA health clinics and hospitals — take a hike.
Anybody who might call the Veterans Crisis Line — figure it out yourself.
Veterans who worked another job and switched to the VA less than a year ago? Fired.
That’s not even mentioning thousands more veterans across the federal government who have served for years and were fired without cause over the last three weeks.
All because Elon Musk (the richest guy on earth) and Donald Trump (who dodged the draft five times) want to save a quick buck and pass a tax cut for themselves. How is that America First? They don’t stand for our military, and they sure as hell don’t back veterans.
It’s on us to fight back. **I’m going to do everything I can in the Senate to defend the VA, improve it, and help it meet the needs of the generations of veterans that depend on it.**
If you’re with me, please:
[**Help us keep it up by making a donation today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb25.RCmV-L&refcode=em250218-1-120&t=1&akid=3724%2E734936%2EOrsdR8)

If you’re with me, please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Every day brings something new on our Squad
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250218-1232-foote&t=1001&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ]Squad Victory Fund

Hi Peter, it's
Ilhan!

No two days are ever the same as a member of the Squad! I’m honored to
share a few of these moments with you, but before we dive in:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ]Will you chip in $3 or any amount to our Squad and
support our fight against the Trump administration's attempt to dismantle
our democracy?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ]Contribute ››

Every day brings something new, but here’s a glimpse of what my day looked
like last month!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ][IMG]

I started the morning by launching a door knock in Northeast Minneapolis
for an endorsed candidate and dear friend in a special election for the
Minnesota legislature.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ][IMG]

Later, I met with a candidate for municipal office in a locally owned
South Minneapolis coffee shop and bakery, Patisserie 46. Their chefs have
won international awards for their baked goods! 🍩 To top it off, we
crossed paths with Hennepin County Commissioner Angela Conley during the
meeting, talk about a nice surprise!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ][IMG]

Every year, Team Ilhan hosts a gathering of former staff, supporters, and
community members at Memory Lanes, a popular local bowling alley. I love
bowling so much that we get fun bowling shirts printed for everyone,
especially for this yearly party! 🎉

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ][IMG]

Even with so many people to catch up with, I always make sure to bowl at
least a few frames myself! 🎳

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1026&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ][IMG]

Every year this is a great opportunity to be with our community, without
any political asks! It’s just a time to eat, bowl, and catch up with
friends they don’t always see off of the campaign trails.

If you’ve made it this far down in the email, I owe you so much gratitude
for allowing me to share just a snippet of my life with you. Our Squad
wouldn’t be possible without supporters like you who believe in our fight
for true justice and equality for all, not just the privileged and wealthy
few.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250218.r3Iq2t&refcode=em20250218-1232&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1027&akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1 ]Will you chip in to support our Squad’s collective work to protect our
rights, our communities, and our democracy from the far-right?

Thank you for being in this work with us. ❤️

In solidarity,

Ilhan Omar
Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1232%2E342411%2ESELOX1

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| With your support, Adam will continue to hold Trump’s feet to the fire for every violation of the rule of law.

What does it say about the state of our government that Donald Trump is firing Inspectors General, shuttering oversight agencies like the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, and attacking federal judges across the country?
**_Trump is unraveling checks and balances and eliminating all oversight of his administration’s work._**
Adam and his fellow Senate Democrats have never had a more important role, Derek. They are the last line of defense against Trump’s unruly agenda — and they’ll be working around the clock to speak out and prevent Trump from bending the rules even further.
[**Pitch in to help Adam and Senate Dems continue to provide oversight and accountability over Trump and his administration.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q12025_abs_em.OeZ3Kx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250218_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8312%2E5257348%2EWB5wD4)

subject: Republicans introduced a national abortion ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39444%2E3422442%2ER9IQV7)
Derek, did you see that a **Republican Congressman just introduced a bill that would outlaw abortion nationwide?**
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250218-abortionban/?source=em20250218-39444&akid=39444%2E3422442%2ER9IQV7)
Ever since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, Republicans–now with full control of the federal government–have set their sights on passing an extreme national ban.
Abortion bans are deadly and dangerous. They are misogynistic and aim to control women’s health care decisions.
**[So please, sign on to say that you support protecting safe and legal abortion. We need to stand together and show right-wing extremists that we aren’t backing down.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250218-abortionban/?source=em20250218-39444&akid=39444%2E3422442%2ER9IQV7)**
[Sign On ››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp_em20250218-abortionban/?source=em20250218-39444&akid=39444%2E3422442%2ER9IQV7)
Thank you,
Truth to Power

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250218-39444&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39444_3422442_R9IQV7&akid=39444%2E3422442%2ER9IQV7)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: They’re stealing your money and stuffing their own pockets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
I’m fighting back, and I could use your help.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250218-4779-footer&t=1&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)
**Peter, Elon Musk’s takeover of the federal government is corruption plain and simple.**
Trump and Elon are cutting programs that fund cancer research, dismantling mechanisms that keep us safe while flying, and trying to loosen regulations around workplace safety — all while Elon’s net worth grows:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-4779&amount=3&refcode2=4779_420207_VRq7yq&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)
**He is stealing your money, screwing this country over, and stuffing his own pockets. That’s why I’m fighting back, and I could use your help.[Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to fuel our fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-4779&amount=3&refcode2=4779_420207_VRq7yq&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)**
Our campaign is funded by everyday people giving a little at a time, Peter. I don’t take money from corporations or their PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. That’s why your grassroots support is so important.
Every dollar you give does two things:
1. **It helps me keep building momentum for this grassroots movement** at a time when lots of deep-pocketed folks would like to see me lose.

2. **It sends a message to the rest of the Democratic Party** that we need to be fighting on behalf of the people EVERY SINGLE DAY, even if it means drawing the ire of Elon Musk.

This is a people-powered movement, Peter, and we can’t keep up the fight without you.
[**If you’re with me, will you consider chipping in $3 today to power our movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250218?refcode=em20250218-4779&amount=3&refcode2=4779_420207_VRq7yq&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250218?amount=3&refcode=em20250218-4779&refcode2=4779_420207_VRq7yq&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250218-4779-footer&t=2&refcode2=4779_420207_VRq7yq&akid=4779%2E420207%2EVRq7yq)**

Trump and Elon are cutting programs that fund cancer research, dismantling mechanisms that keep us safe while flying, and trying to loosen regulations around workplace safety — all while Elon’s net worth grows: He is stealing your money, screwing this country over, and stuffing his own pockets. That’s why I’m fighting back, and I could use your help. Our campaign is funded by everyday people giving a little at a time, Peter. I don’t take money from corporations or their PACs, and I don’t seek out billionaires to use as ATMs. That’s why your grassroots support is so important. Every dollar you give does two things: 1. It helps me keep building momentum for this grassroots movement at a time when lots of deep-pocketed folks would like to see me lose. 2. It sends a message to the rest of the Democratic Party that we need to be fighting on behalf of the people EVERY SINGLE DAY, even if it means drawing the ire of Elon Musk. This is a people-powered movement, Peter, and we can’t keep up the fight without you. In solidarity, Pramila Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Friend,

This may be the hardest email I ever had to write to you. The graphic content that is being pushed on little kids is despicable.

Every year, children across our nation are exposed to book fairs laden with materials that compromise educational integrity and childhood innocence. The book fair events put on by Scholastic often feature and promote books containing adult content and inappropriate themes that are often not disclosed to parents or educators.

What you and I remember as a purveyor of innocent childhood fun is now promoting books with harmful and confusing gender-transitioning storylines and graphic sexualized content to kids as young as 5 years old!

I’ll be honest... I sometimes feel overwhelmed by the number of ways in which our kids are under attack.

That’s why I’m excited to partner with **SkyTree Book Fairs, the wholesome and age-appropriate alternative book fair experience**. SkyTree carries a wide range of titles, and they just started sending my book, _Chasing Embers_ , to middle schools across the country!

[SkyTree has received a record number of book fair requests, and they need our help to fulfill them. Will you join me in supporting them today? Donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to help SkyTree put wholesome stories that are rooted in truth into the hands of schoolchildren across America.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGOmzAURb_G7ED42cZhwaIpjdQ2I1WqplN1Ezn2Y7BiDGMbZujXV6A02-Oje3311DA5260NkUcC0FsTCQBhnwjAnNgv9fz8FNb8fOYmf2eAGyfw-a4u8JC9VkdZzW_Ox3Pkv-XXH9_Fn4U-9LRO-JDvpQUOyrqNyjYzDQdFO51hQyWra2CUl1nfaMqk0qUQV1FqXvNKGU21oIbVtdSHQ2YbKEGUQA_AxIFDgYYaTlVdUS2krhTh5V5UdAEx9dbfMBhl3Vrocchc06c0xf1jJwKneFtTQMyv43jLO2VDLAIuS6HH7fGam9GrhISd5jRcEoaBsLZLhhKoNqLVMCn76glrgdOylHc-oLHz5gZcYq8C3nkc56CRsDZe_yeMPqFPhLUJP9LFWX_bwi_eWUNY-_Hz5WmaXsLbsMP9YqxdhDymv9_Mlyw0Znq3ztlYScLL1335NnRp4F8AAAD__3O1mcg)

[Donate](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGPnCAUh_8avGnkgSIHD93aSdqdJr1ss9nL5I08VzqKFtCN_esb7XSuH1_4-AUc58F2W83UEwPorQkMgIlPDGCJ4ie-vHz3W3o-S5N-CKCdM_h8V1d4yK7FJ1UuvwcXzkG-qq8_nou3lT_0uM30kO_RjEa0w05Vk5haAvKuTajmSmgNgss86WtVUGk019p0UmmNuqt4xXOsJELOUSe2hhyKHHgFoqgkZGS4kRx1ydtCtSUymR-hrPNEsbfuRt6gHbasncZkqPsY53A87MTgFG5b9ETpdZpuaYfWh8zTumbttB9eUzM5jMTEaYnjJZIfmWi6aDiDcictjjPad8dEA5LnubrzkYxddtfTGnr0dOdhWnxLTDTh-v-GyUVykYnmX-pyXWKc3B64uMEaJhpU2nWv5tfb8wGPXxPNWqin-Oeb-ZL42swfdhhsKBWT-fuxfh-71vA3AAD__4CWmp8)

Across the country, parents, grandparents, teachers, and librarians are waking up to the reality that they can no longer trust that a children’s book is free from messaging about gender transitioning, explicit sexual content, or politically divisive themes.

That’s why they’re turning toward SkyTree.

**In 2024, SkyTree Book Fairs...**
* Hosted over 320 book fairs in 48 states
* Reviewed and added 300+ titles to our book fair collection
* Impacted over 86,000 students

Each book offered at a SkyTree fair has been carefully vetted to ensure it aligns with their mission to uphold wholesome values in our kids through literacy that is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate.

_The best part?_ SkyTree is a non-profit organization. They offer their wholesome book fair experience to schools free of charge and work to have the lowest possible book prices. This ensures that more kids can leave with a developmentally appropriate book!

Private _and_ public schools are seeking them out because teachers and librarians know that when they book a fair with SkyTree, they don’t have to worry about screening every book or parents keeping kids home during book fair week out of fear over what they might be exposed to.

[Donate today to help SkyTree Book Fairs nurture childhood innocence through wholesome, age-appropriate book fairs! Your gift will put uplifting stories into the hands of kids across America. name: Politivist Action PAC
subject: How are you building in your community?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250218_community_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_pap_em-25q1?refcode=em_250218_community_act]
Hi Peter,
Movements are built one relationship at a time – and right now, we need to move fast.
Every day, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are working to dismantle our government and strip away our rights. The fascist march to overthrow our government isn’t slowing down, and we can’t afford to either.
That’s why Politivist Action PAC was created — to fight back with everything we’ve got.
At Politivist Action PAC, we believe in the power of activism and politics working together to drive change. That’s why Cori Bush coined the term "politivist"— a powerful union of politician and activist.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/Q55_gjNo-EGfLb_st0qIcA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Q55_gjNo-EGfLb_st0qIcA2]
Cori Bush is a politivist.
From standing on the frontlines in Ferguson to making history as the first Black woman to represent Missouri in Congress, she has always led with courage and conviction, while refusing corporate money, fighting for racial, economic, and social justice, and bringing the power of activism into policymaking.
You don’t just find politivists in Congress. They’re in every community, organizing, mobilizing, and fighting for justice. Our neighbors, friends, coworkers all have the power to become politivists... And that includes you.
